from pathlib import Path
import json, textwrap, zipfile, hashlib, os, re, datetime

out_root = Path("/mnt/data/spec_addendum_v0003")
if out_root.exists():
    # clean deterministically
    for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*"), reverse=True):
        if p.is_file():
            p.unlink()
        else:
            try:
                p.rmdir()
            except OSError:
                pass
out_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# ---------- Helper writers ----------
def write_text(rel, s):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(s, encoding="utf-8")

def write_json(rel, obj):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

# ---------- JSON Schemas (Draft 2020-12) ----------
DRAFT = "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"

def base_schema(schema_id, title, description):
    return {
        "$schema": DRAFT,
        "$id": schema_id,
        "title": title,
        "description": description,
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": False
    }

# Shared definitions
shared_defs = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json",
    "title": "LitigationOS Shared Schema Definitions",
    "type": "object",
    "$defs": {
        "IsoDateTime": {"type": "string", "format": "date-time"},
        "IsoDate": {"type": "string", "format": "date"},
        "SemVer": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^v?\d+\.\d+\.\d+(-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?(\+[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$"},
        "Sha256": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[0-9a-f]{64}$"},
        "Crc32": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[0-9a-fA-F]{8}$"},
        "Path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "Uri": {"type": "string", "format": "uri"},
        "JsonPointer": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^(/([^/~]|~0|~1)*)*$"},
        "NonEmptyString": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "StableId": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]{2,127}$"},
        "EvidencePinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["source_path", "captured_at"],
            "properties": {
                "source_path": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Path"},
                "page_or_timecode": {"type": "string"},
                "bates_or_hash_optional": {"type": "string"},
                "captured_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "note": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "LawPinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["authority_id", "chunk_pointer", "effective_date"],
            "properties": {
                "authority_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "section": {"type": "string"},
                "effective_date": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDate"},
                "chunk_pointer": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "RunRef": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["run_id", "started_at"],
            "properties": {
                "run_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "started_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "ended_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["RUNNING", "SUCCESS", "FAIL", "PARTIAL"]},
                "host": {"type": "string"},
                "app_version": {"$ref": "#/$defs/SemVer"}
            }
        },
        "ErrorObject": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["code", "message", "ts"],
            "properties": {
                "ts": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "code": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "message": {"$ref": "#/$defs/NonEmptyString"},
                "detail": {"type": "object"}
            }
        },
        "JsonlEnvelope": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["ts", "event", "run_id"],
            "properties": {
                "ts": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "event": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "run_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "level": {"type": "string", "enum": ["TRACE", "DEBUG", "INFO", "WARN", "ERROR"]},
                "message": {"type": "string"},
                "data": {"type": "object"}
            }
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/shared.defs.schema.json", shared_defs)

def ref_shared(def_name):
    return {"$ref": f"https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json#/$defs/{def_name}"}

# RUN_MANIFEST schema
run_manifest = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/run_manifest.schema.json",
    "RUN_MANIFEST",
    "Deterministic record of a single orchestrated run, including inputs, outputs, tool versions, hashes, and policy/gate outcomes."
)
run_manifest["required"] = ["run", "inputs", "outputs", "tools", "policies", "artifacts", "errors"]
run_manifest["properties"] = {
    "run": ref_shared("RunRef"),
    "inputs": {
        "type": "array",
        "minItems": 1,
        "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["source_path", "sha256", "bytes", "ingested_at"],
            "properties": {
                "source_path": ref_shared("Path"),
                "sha256": ref_shared("Sha256"),
                "bytes": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
                "ingested_at": ref_shared("IsoDateTime"),
                "media_type": {"type": "string"},
                "origin": {"type": "string", "enum": ["LOCAL_DRIVE", "RCLONE_REMOTE", "USER_UPLOAD", "OTHER"]}
            }
        }
    },
    "outputs": {
        "type": "array",
        "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["path", "sha256", "bytes", "role"],
            "properties": {
                "path": ref_shared("Path"),
                "sha256": ref_shared("Sha256"),
                "bytes": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
                "role": {"type": "string", "enum": ["EXTRACTED_TEXT", "OCR_PDF", "TRANSCRIPT", "GRAPH_IMPORT", "REPORT", "BUNDLE", "LOG", "OTHER"]}
            }
        }
    },
    "tools": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": False,
        "required": ["python", "neo4j", "tika", "ocr", "llm", "rclone"],
        "properties": {
            "python": {"type": "string"},
            "neo4j": {"type": "string"},
            "tika": {"type": "string"},
            "ocr": {"type": "string"},
            "llm": {"type": "string"},
            "rclone": {"type": "string"}
        }
    },
    "policies": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": False,
        "required": ["truth_lock", "mi_authority_lock", "pcw_gate", "pcg_gate", "offline_first"],
        "properties": {
            "truth_lock": {"type": "string", "enum": ["STRICT", "STANDARD"]},
            "mi_authority_lock": {"type": "boolean"},
            "pcw_gate": {"type": "string", "enum": ["ENFORCED", "DISABLED"]},
            "pcg_gate": {"type": "string", "enum": ["FAIL_CLOSED", "DISABLED"]},
            "offline_first": {"type": "boolean"}
        }
    },
    "artifacts": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": False,
        "required": ["run_log_jsonl", "manifest_path"],
        "properties": {
            "run_log_jsonl": ref_shared("Path"),
            "manifest_path": ref_shared("Path"),
            "bundle_manifest": ref_shared("Path"),
            "pcw_report": ref_shared("Path"),
            "auth_snapshot_index": ref_shared("Path")
        }
    },
    "errors": {
        "type": "array",
        "items": ref_shared("ErrorObject")
    }
}
write_json("schemas/run_manifest.schema.json", run_manifest)

# PCW_REPORT schema
pcw_report = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/pcw_report.schema.json",
    "PCW_REPORT",
    "Proof-Carrying Workflow report: vehicles/forms selected, proof obligations, status, and the pinned evidence/authority that satisfies each obligation."
)
pcw_report["required"] = ["run", "case_ref", "vehicle_map", "proof_obligations", "pcg", "errors"]
pcw_report["properties"] = {
    "run": ref_shared("RunRef"),
    "case_ref": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": False,
        "required": ["case_id", "court"],
        "properties": {
            "case_id": {"type": "string"},
            "court": {"type": "string"},
            "judge": {"type": "string"}
        }
    },
    "vehicle_map": {
        "type": "array",
        "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["relief_id", "vehicle_id", "form_id", "authority_pins"],
            "properties": {
                "relief_id": ref_shared("StableId"),
                "vehicle_id": ref_shared("StableId"),
                "form_id": ref_shared("StableId"),
                "authority_pins": {"type": "array", "items": ref_shared("LawPinpoint"), "minItems": 1}
            }
        }
    },
    "proof_obligations": {
        "type": "array",
        "minItems": 1,
        "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["po_id", "status", "required_pins", "satisfied_by", "tests"],
            "properties": {
                "po_id": ref_shared("StableId"),
                "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["OPEN", "PARTIAL", "SATISFIED"]},
                "required_pins": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "additionalProperties": False,
                    "required": ["authority_min", "evidence_min"],
                    "properties": {"authority_min": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0}, "evidence_min": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0}}
                },
                "satisfied_by": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "additionalProperties": False,
                    "required": ["authority", "evidence"],
                    "properties": {
                        "authority": {"type": "array", "items": ref_shared("LawPinpoint")},
                        "evidence": {"type": "array", "items": ref_shared("EvidencePinpoint")}
                    }
                },
                "tests": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                        "type": "object",
                        "additionalProperties": False,
                        "required": ["test_id", "result", "validator_ver", "assurance", "ts"],
                        "properties": {
                            "test_id": ref_shared("StableId"),
                            "result": {"type": "string", "enum": ["PASS", "FAIL", "SKIP"]},
                            "validator_ver": {"type": "string"},
                            "assurance": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0, "maximum": 1.0},
                            "ts": ref_shared("IsoDateTime"),
                            "detail": {"type": "object"}
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    },
    "pcg": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": False,
        "required": ["gate_result", "blocked_reasons"],
        "properties": {
            "gate_result": {"type": "string", "enum": ["PASS", "FAIL"]},
            "blocked_reasons": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}
        }
    },
    "errors": {"type": "array", "items": ref_shared("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/pcw_report.schema.json", pcw_report)

# AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX schema
auth_snapshot = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/auth_snapshot_index.schema.json",
    "AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX",
    "Index of authority snapshots used in a run: each entry pins a source, effective date, and chunk pointers used by propositions."
)
auth_snapshot["required"] = ["run", "snapshots", "errors"]
auth_snapshot["properties"] = {
    "run": ref_shared("RunRef"),
    "snapshots": {
        "type": "array",
        "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["authority_id", "effective_date", "source_path", "sha256", "chunks"],
            "properties": {
                "authority_id": ref_shared("StableId"),
                "effective_date": ref_shared("IsoDate"),
                "source_path": ref_shared("Path"),
                "sha256": ref_shared("Sha256"),
                "publisher": {"type": "string"},
                "chunks": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {
                        "type": "object",
                        "additionalProperties": False,
                        "required": ["chunk_pointer", "text_span"],
                        "properties": {
                            "chunk_pointer": {"type": "string"},
                            "text_span": {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": False, "required": ["start", "end"], "properties": {"start": {"type": "integer"}, "end": {"type": "integer"}}}
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    },
    "errors": {"type": "array", "items": ref_shared("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/auth_snapshot_index.schema.json", auth_snapshot)

# VEHICLEMAP_INDEX schema
vehiclemap = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/vehiclemap_index.schema.json",
    "VEHICLEMAP_INDEX",

)
vehiclemap["required"] = ["version", "vehicles"]
vehiclemap["properties"] = {

    "vehicles": {
        "type": "array",
        "minItems": 1,
        "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["vehicle_id", "name", "governing_authority", "proof_obligations", "service_chain"],
            "properties": {
                "vehicle_id": ref_shared("StableId"),
                "name": {"type": "string"},
                "governing_authority": {"type": "array", "items": ref_shared("LawPinpoint"), "minItems": 1},
                "proof_obligations": {"type": "array", "items": ref_shared("StableId"), "minItems": 1},
                "deadlines": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": False, "required": ["deadline_id", "trigger", "rule_pin"], "properties": {
                        "deadline_id": ref_shared("StableId"),
                        "trigger": {"type": "string"},
                        "rule_pin": ref_shared("LawPinpoint"),
                        "calculation": {"type": "string"}
                    }}
                },
                "service_chain": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": False, "required": ["step", "rule_pin"], "properties": {"step": {"type": "string"}, "rule_pin": ref_shared("LawPinpoint")}}
                },
                "forms": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}
            }
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/vehiclemap_index.schema.json", vehiclemap)

# FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT schema
form_overlay = base_schema(

        "field": {"type": "string"},
        "value_source": {"type": "string", "enum": ["GRAPH", "OPERATOR", "DERIVED"]},
        "pinpoint": ref_shared("EvidencePinpoint")
    }}},
    "field_map": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": False, "required": ["field", "value", "provenance"], "properties": {
        "field": {"type": "string"},
        "value": {"type": ["string","number","boolean","null"]},
        "provenance": {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": False, "required": ["derives_from"], "properties": {"derives_from": {"type":"array","items":ref_shared("EvidencePinpoint"),"minItems":1}}
    }}}},
    "outputs": {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": False, "required": ["pdf_path", "sha256"], "properties": {"pdf_path": ref_shared("Path"), "sha256": ref_shared("Sha256")}},
    "errors": {"type": "array", "items": ref_shared("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/form_overlay_audit.schema.json", form_overlay)

        "quality": {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": False, "required": ["text_coverage", "confidence"], "properties": {

            "confidence": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0, "maximum": 1.0}
        }},
        "text_pointer": {"type": "string"}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type": "array", "items": ref_shared("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/ocr_report.schema.json", ocr_report)

    }}}},

        "type": {"type": "string"},
        "mentions": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}
    }}},

        "type": {"type": "string"},
        "src": ref_shared("StableId"),

    }},

        "sbom_format": {"type": "string", "enum": ["CYCLONEDX_JSON", "SPDX_JSON", "NONE"]},
        "offline_build": {"type": "boolean"}
    }}
}

# ---------- OpenAPI 3.1 contracts ----------
OPENAPI_DIALECT = "https://spec.openapis.org/oas/3.1/dialect/2024-11-10"

def openapi_doc(title, description, service_name, port, paths):
    # OpenAPI 3.1 YAML, minimal but complete.
    # Avoid anchors/aliases for maximum compatibility.
    servers = [
        {"url": f"http://127.0.0.1:{port}", "description": "Localhost (default)"},
    ]
    # Simple YAML writer (deterministic)
    def y(s): return s.replace("\t","  ")
    lines = []
    lines.append("openapi: 3.1.0")
    lines.append("info:")
    lines.append(f"  title: {title}")
    lines.append("  version: v1.0.0")
    lines.append("  description: |")
    for ln in description.splitlines():
        lines.append(f"    {ln}")
    lines.append(f"jsonSchemaDialect: {OPENAPI_DIALECT}")
    lines.append("servers:")
    for srv in servers:
        lines.append(f"  - url: {srv['url']}")
        lines.append(f"    description: {srv['description']}")
    lines.append("tags:")
    lines.append(f"  - name: {service_name}")
    lines.append("paths:")
    lines.extend(paths)
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"

def path_block(path, method, tag, summary, req_schema_ref=None, resp_schema_ref=None, stream=False):
    # returns YAML lines for a path/method
    m = method.lower()
    lines = [f"  {path}:", f"    {m}:", f"      tags:", f"        - {tag}", f"      summary: {summary}"]
    if req_schema_ref:
        lines += [
            "      requestBody:",
            "        required: true",
            "        content:",
            "          application/json:",
            "            schema:",
            f"              $ref: '{req_schema_ref}'"
        ]
    # responses
    lines += ["      responses:", "        '200':", "          description: OK", "          content:"]
    if stream:
        # NDJSON stream
        lines += [
            "            application/x-ndjson:",
            "              schema:",
            "                type: object",
            "                description: One JSON object per line (NDJSON/JSONL).",
            "            text/event-stream:",
            "              schema:",
            "                type: string",
            "                description: Server-Sent Events stream."
        ]
    else:
        lines += ["            application/json:", "              schema:"]
        if resp_schema_ref:
            lines.append(f"                $ref: '{resp_schema_ref}'")
        else:
            lines.append("                type: object")
    return lines

# Common schema refs
schema_run_manifest = "https://litigationos.local/schemas/run_manifest.schema.json"
schema_pcw_report = "https://litigationos.local/schemas/pcw_report.schema.json"
schema_ocr_report = "https://litigationos.local/schemas/ocr_report.schema.json"
schema_nlp_report = "https://litigationos.local/schemas/nlp_report.schema.json"

# Orchestrator API (FastAPI)
orch_paths = []
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/health", "get", "orchestrator", "Health probe (liveness/readiness).")
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/version", "get", "orchestrator", "Service version and dependency versions.")
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/capabilities", "get", "orchestrator", "Capability matrix (enabled adapters, offline mode, OCR availability).")
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/runs", "post", "orchestrator", "Start a new run (ingest -> extract -> graph -> reports).",
                         req_schema_ref=schema_run_manifest, resp_schema_ref=schema_run_manifest)
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/runs/{run_id}/events", "get", "orchestrator", "Stream run events/logs (NDJSON + optional SSE).", stream=True)
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/runs/{run_id}/pcw", "get", "orchestrator", "Fetch PCW report for run.", resp_schema_ref=schema_pcw_report)
orch_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Orchestrator API",
    "Local workflow orchestrator contract. Provides run lifecycle control, streaming events, and access to run reports.\nAll endpoints are localhost-bound by default. Offline-first; network access is opt-in.",
    "orchestrator",
    32111,
    orch_paths
)
write_text("openapi/orchestrator_api.yaml", orch_yaml)

# Graph API (Neo4j façade)
graph_paths = []
graph_paths += path_block("/v1/health", "get", "graph", "Graph API health probe.")
graph_paths += path_block("/v1/version", "get", "graph", "Graph API version.")
graph_paths += path_block("/v1/capabilities", "get", "graph", "Graph feature flags (constraints, migrations, import modes).")
graph_paths += path_block("/v1/migrations/apply", "post", "graph", "Apply idempotent migrations (constraints/indexes/seed).")
graph_paths += path_block("/v1/query/cypher", "post", "graph", "Execute a whitelisted Cypher query set (read-only by default).")
graph_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Graph API",
    "Service boundary in front of Neo4j. Enforces read-only defaults, whitelists query templates, and applies migrations idempotently.",
    "graph",
    32112,
    graph_paths
)
write_text("openapi/graph_api.yaml", graph_yaml)

# Tika Adapter
tika_paths = []
tika_paths += path_block("/v1/health", "get", "tika", "Tika adapter health probe.")
tika_paths += path_block("/v1/extract", "post", "tika", "Extract text and metadata from a file using Tika.", resp_schema_ref=None)
tika_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Tika Adapter",
    "Adapter contract for Apache Tika server mode (default 9998). Provides deterministic extraction with content-type normalization and metadata capture.",
    "tika",
    32113,
    tika_paths
)
write_text("openapi/tika_adapter.yaml", tika_yaml)

# OCR Adapter (OCRmyPDF)
ocr_paths = []
ocr_paths += path_block("/v1/health", "get", "ocr", "OCR adapter health probe.")
ocr_paths += path_block("/v1/ocr", "post", "ocr", "Run OCR on a PDF and emit OCR_REPORT + OCR'd PDF pointer.", resp_schema_ref=schema_ocr_report)
ocr_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS OCR Adapter",
    "Adapter contract for OCR execution (OCRmyPDF + Tesseract). Supports rotate-pages and deskew decisions and emits OCR_REPORT.",
    "ocr",
    32114,
    ocr_paths
)
write_text("openapi/ocr_adapter.yaml", ocr_yaml)

# Ollama Adapter
ollama_paths = []
ollama_paths += path_block("/v1/health", "get", "ollama", "Ollama adapter health probe.")
ollama_paths += path_block("/v1/capabilities", "get", "ollama", "List local models and context window sizes (no remote calls).")
ollama_paths += path_block("/v1/infer", "post", "ollama", "Run local inference with strict citation/pin gating (no invention).")
ollama_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Ollama Adapter",
    "Adapter contract for local LLM inference (Ollama). All prompts are run through Truth-Lock and citation/pin gating; outputs are blocked when required pins are missing.",
    "ollama",
    32115,
    ollama_paths
)
write_text("openapi/ollama_adapter.yaml", ollama_yaml)

# rclone Adapter (rc / rcd)
rclone_paths = []
rclone_paths += path_block("/v1/health", "get", "rclone", "rclone adapter health probe.")
rclone_paths += path_block("/v1/remotes", "get", "rclone", "List configured remotes (operator-controlled).")
rclone_paths += path_block("/v1/sync", "post", "rclone", "Run a controlled sync/mirror job and emit run events.")
rclone_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS rclone Adapter",
    "Adapter contract for rclone operations. Uses rclone rc/rcd for structured control; operator retains control over config and credentials.",
    "rclone",
    32116,
    rclone_paths
)
write_text("openapi/rclone_adapter.yaml", rclone_yaml)

# ---------- Spec Addendum Markdown (20 cycles) ----------
now = datetime.datetime.utcnow().replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() + "Z"
spec_md = f"""# LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0 — SPEC ADDENDUM v0003 (Chained Expansion Cycles 01–20)

Generated: {now}

## A. Canonical escalations added in this addendum

This addendum elevates the Build Charter into a **machine-checkable, interface-contract-driven, audit-hard** spec set. It adds:

1. **Draft 2020-12 JSON Schemas** for core manifests/reports:
   - `RUN_MANIFEST`, `PCW_REPORT`, `AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX`, `VEHICLEMAP_INDEX`, `FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT`
   - OCR/NLP/Packaging/Supply-chain extensions: `OCR_REPORT`, `NLP_REPORT`, `BUNDLE_MANIFEST`, `LICENSE_LEDGER`
2. **OpenAPI 3.1 contracts** for each local service boundary:
   - `orchestrator_api.yaml`, `graph_api.yaml`, `tika_adapter.yaml`, `ocr_adapter.yaml`, `ollama_adapter.yaml`, `rclone_adapter.yaml`
3. **Streaming contracts**:
   - NDJSON/JSONL for event/log streaming (one JSON object per line).
   - Optional Server-Sent Events for UI progress channels.
4. **Deterministic service ports** (overrideable via Settings):
   - Orchestrator 32111, Graph 32112, Tika adapter 32113, OCR 32114, Ollama 32115, rclone 32116
5. **Audit invariants**:
   - Append-only run logs (`run_log.jsonl`) with stable `run_id`.
   - Hash-first manifests (sha256) for every material input/output.
   - Fail-closed gate outcomes captured in `PCW_REPORT.pcg`.

## B. Canonical global invariants (normative)

### B1) JSON dialect invariants
- All schemas are Draft 2020-12.
- OpenAPI 3.1 contracts declare a JSON Schema dialect and prohibit undefined keywords.
- Every produced JSON report MUST validate against its schema at build time (`audit`) and at runtime (`/v1/runs/{{run_id}}/...`).

### B2) Event/log invariants
- All services MUST emit structured events as NDJSON with schema `JsonlEnvelope` (`shared.defs.schema.json`).
- Event stream endpoints MUST support `application/x-ndjson`. Optional `text/event-stream` is permitted for SSE UI channels.

### B3) Trust and provenance invariants
- Every derived artifact MUST include a `DERIVES_FROM` edge in the graph and a source hash chain in manifests.
- Every proposition MUST include either an `EvidencePinpoint` or `LawPinpoint`. If not, it MUST be classified as `DISPUTED` and generate `PINPOINT_MISSING`.

## C. Chained Expansion Cycles (01–20)

Each cycle is written as an **append-only delta** that can be applied without rewriting earlier versions. “Deliverables” are concrete files/contracts/tests.

---

### Cycle 01 — Contract unification: the “Local Service Boundary Standard”
**Objective:** identical health/version/capabilities endpoints, error envelope, and streaming semantics across all services.

**Deliverables:**
- `/v1/health`, `/v1/version`, `/v1/capabilities` implemented everywhere.
- `ErrorObject` and `JsonlEnvelope` enforced in every response stream.

**Acceptance:**
- UI can swap services without special-case parsing.

---

### Cycle 02 — Run identity: deterministic `run_id`, monotonic versioning, and run DAG
**Objective:** every action is traceable to a run; every run is traceable to inputs, policies, and outputs.

**Deliverables:**
- `RUN_MANIFEST` is emitted on run creation, updated append-only, finalized at run end.
- Run DAG edges in Neo4j: `(:Run)-[:DERIVES_FROM]->(:Source)`; `(:Bundle)-[:DERIVES_FROM]->(:Run)`.

---

### Cycle 03 — Streaming-first UX: NDJSON + optional SSE (no polling)
**Objective:** the UI never polls for progress; it subscribes.

**Deliverables:**
- `/v1/runs/{{run_id}}/events` returns NDJSON.
- Optional SSE channel mirrors NDJSON events as `data:` frames.

---

### Cycle 04 — Harvest autonomy: watcher + scheduler + idempotent queue
**Objective:** autonomous intake without operator micromanagement.

**Deliverables:**
- File watcher emits `INTAKE_DISCOVERED` events.
- Queue is idempotent by hash; duplicates become `DEDUP_HIT` events.

---

### Cycle 05 — OCR lane: adaptive OCR policy with page-level decisions
**Objective:** OCR triggers only when necessary, but is aggressive when required.

**Deliverables:**
- `OCR_REPORT` per PDF.
- Page actions: ROTATE_PAGES, DESKEW, DENOISE, OCR, SKIP.

**Acceptance:**
- OCR is never run when extracted text coverage ≥ threshold unless operator forces.

---

### Cycle 06 — Text extraction lane: Tika-first with deterministic metadata normalization
**Objective:** consistent extraction outputs across formats.

**Deliverables:**
- Tika adapter produces:
  - normalized plaintext
  - metadata JSON
  - content-type certainty score
- On failure: fallbacks are recorded as explicit events.

---

### Cycle 07 — NLP lane: entity/event/relation extraction as first-class reports
**Objective:** convert text into graphable units without hallucination.

**Deliverables:**
- `NLP_REPORT` with:
  - entities (typed spans)
  - events (typed mentions)
  - relations (typed edges, confidence)
- Only evidence-backed relations are committed to the graph; low-confidence are stored as candidates.

---

### Cycle 08 — QuoteDB & Pinpoint discipline: every quote gets a pin or is rejected
**Objective:** “QuotePin” is enforceable; no orphan quotes.

**Deliverables:**
- Quote objects require `EvidencePinpoint` or `LawPinpoint`.
- UI hover cards always include pinned location.

---

### Cycle 09 — Authority snapshot indexing: versioned, effective-date aware authority graph
**Objective:** authority is never floating or ambiguous.

**Deliverables:**
- `AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX` per run.
- `AuthorityChunk` nodes include effective date, source hash, chunk_pointer.

---

### Cycle 10 — VehicleMap hardening: relief->vehicle/form selection is deterministic
**Objective:** Forms-first selection cannot drift across runs.

**Deliverables:**
- `VEHICLEMAP_INDEX` is versioned; selection emits `VEHICLE_SELECTED` events.
- Every selection records governing authority pins.

---

### Cycle 11 — PCW/PCG: machine-checkable proof obligations and fail-closed export
**Objective:** exports cannot occur unless proof obligations are SATISFIED and PCG passes.

**Deliverables:**
- `PCW_REPORT` is required for any export request.
- `pcg.gate_result` must be PASS, else export endpoint returns 409 + blockers.

---

### Cycle 12 — Graph canon: constraints, migrations, and seed packs
**Objective:** graph integrity is guaranteed.

**Deliverables:**
- Idempotent constraints (IF NOT EXISTS style).
- Seed “nuclei” perspectives A–E are loaded deterministically.

---

### Cycle 13 — Bloom-style graph UX: open-source exploration parity
**Objective:** deliver Bloom-like discovery without proprietary Bloom.

**Deliverables:**
- Graph Explorer supports:
  - perspectives
  - search
  - hover cards
  - style rules by label/type
  - saved queries

---

### Cycle 14 — Provenance model: PROV-aligned derivations
**Objective:** provenance is not ad hoc; it is modeled.

**Deliverables:**
- `DERIVES_FROM` edges align to Entity/Activity/Agent concepts.
- Run is an Activity; Orchestrator is an Agent; files are Entities.

---

### Cycle 15 — Observability: OpenTelemetry trace/metrics/log alignment
**Objective:** unified telemetry without external vendors.

**Deliverables:**
- Each service emits:
  - traces per run_id
  - metrics for throughput/errors
  - logs as NDJSON
- Collector is optional; stdout is default.

---

### Cycle 16 — Offline-first networking policy: opt-in network, explicit egress controls
**Objective:** nothing phones home.

**Deliverables:**
- Central Network Policy toggles:
  - allow rclone
  - allow model downloads
  - allow update checks
- Default denies all outbound calls.

---

### Cycle 17 — Supply-chain hygiene: SBOM + license ledger + reproducible build hints
**Objective:** releases are trustworthy and auditable.

**Deliverables:**
- `LICENSE_LEDGER` generated per build.
- `BUNDLE_MANIFEST.attestations` includes SLSA target + SBOM format selection.
- SBOM format preference: CycloneDX JSON or SPDX JSON (external artifact).

---

### Cycle 18 — Release mechanics: FULL vs PATCH, size budgets, immutability
**Objective:** packaging never surprises; size never explodes unnoticed.

**Deliverables:**
- Bundle builder emits:
  - projected size budget
  - include/exclude rationale
- Weights/media/binaries are excluded by default.

---

### Cycle 19 — Safety escalations: redaction, PII gating, and operator review checkpoints
**Objective:** prevent accidental disclosure or unsafe exports.

**Deliverables:**
- Redaction pass produces `REDACTION_REPORT` (future schema).
- Export requires operator “final confirm” when risk score ≥ threshold.

---

### Cycle 20 — Autonomy governor: policy-driven “hands-off” modes with fail-closed behavior
**Objective:** maximize autonomy while guaranteeing safe failure.

**Deliverables:**
- Modes:
  - DISCOVERY (index-only)
  - BUILD_GRAPH (write graph, no exports)
  - BUILD_EXPORTS (requires PCG PASS)
- Each mode locks capabilities and produces mode-specific acceptance tests.

## D. File inventory in this pack

### Schemas
- `schemas/shared.defs.schema.json`
- `schemas/run_manifest.schema.json`
- `schemas/pcw_report.schema.json`
- `schemas/auth_snapshot_index.schema.json`
- `schemas/vehiclemap_index.schema.json`
- `schemas/form_overlay_audit.schema.json`
- `schemas/ocr_report.schema.json`
- `schemas/nlp_report.schema.json`
- `schemas/bundle_manifest.schema.json`
- `schemas/license_ledger.schema.json`

### OpenAPI
- `openapi/orchestrator_api.yaml`
- `openapi/graph_api.yaml`
- `openapi/tika_adapter.yaml`
- `openapi/ocr_adapter.yaml`
- `openapi/ollama_adapter.yaml`
- `openapi/rclone_adapter.yaml`

## E. Audit checklist (machine-checkable)

1. Validate all JSON Schemas (Draft 2020-12).
2. Validate each OpenAPI 3.1 document.
3. Run contract conformance tests:
   - health/version/capabilities on all ports
   - NDJSON event streaming works
4. Generate a sample `RUN_MANIFEST` and validate.
5. Generate a sample `PCW_REPORT` with OPEN obligations and verify export is blocked.
6. Generate `LICENSE_LEDGER` and include in the bundle manifest.

"""
write_text("SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0003.md", spec_md)

# ---------- Pack into zip ----------
zip_path = Path("/mnt/data/LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0__SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0003.zip")
if zip_path.exists():
    zip_path.unlink()

with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, "w", compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z:
    for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*")):
        if p.is_file():
            arc = str(p.relative_to(out_root)).replace("\\","/")
            z.write(p, arcname=arc)

# Verify non-zero and compute sha256
size = zip_path.stat().st_size
h = hashlib.sha256(zip_path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
(size, h, str(zip_path))

LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0 — Chained Spec Escalation Cycles 01–20 (Canonical “God-Grade”)

You already have the Build Charter plus service-boundary contract direction. The next escalation is to force determinism, auditability, and autonomy through machine-checkable contracts that make the system impossible to “drift” as it grows.

This expansion hardens the spec into a contract-first, report-first, gate-first operating system where every run produces verifiable artifacts and every service boundary is mechanically testable.
Global Canonical Invariants (now mandatory)
1) Contract dialect lock: OpenAPI 3.1 + JSON Schema 2020-12

    All service contracts are OpenAPI 3.1 and explicitly declare a JSON Schema dialect aligned to the OpenAPI 3.1 Schema Object Dialect, which itself is anchored to JSON Schema Draft 2020-12.

    All machine-checkable reports/manifests use JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 with $schema = https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema.

2) Streaming is first-class: NDJSON/JSONL + optional SSE

    Run progress, logs, and adapter telemetry are streams, not polls:

        NDJSON/JSON Lines for process-to-process streaming and audit logs.

        Optional Server-Sent Events for browser UI push using EventSource.

3) Deterministic local service posture

    Tika server is run locally and visited on a localhost URL (commonly http://localhost:9998/) with explicit --host/--port override capability.

    rclone remote-control API is standardized around localhost default URL http://localhost:5572/ and daemon control via rclone rcd with --rc-addr.

    Neo4j connectivity uses Bolt (default TCP 7687), with explicit port control supported.

4) Idempotent migrations and fail-closed gates

    Neo4j constraints and migrations MUST be idempotent using IF NOT EXISTS to avoid non-repeatable installs and “works once” states.

    PCW blocks drafting-to-filing transitions; PCG blocks irreversible outputs unless all core obligations are SATISFIED (fail-closed).

5) Provenance and observability are architecture, not add-ons

    Provenance model aligns to PROV concepts and relations (Entity, Activity, Agent) as the canonical foundation for derivations and audit chains.

    Observability uses OpenTelemetry semantics for spans and attributes to standardize cross-service traces (run-scoped).

6) Supply chain hygiene is mandatory

    SBOM support is standardized to recognized formats such as CycloneDX and SPDX.

    Release integrity escalates against SLSA controls as your north-star checklist.

Cycle Chain 01–20 (Extremely Dense, Spec-Executable)

Each cycle is an append-only addendum: it adds constraints, schemas, and tests without rewriting prior decisions. The rule is: a new capability is not “real” until it has (1) a schema, (2) a contract, (3) a test, (4) a log stream, and (5) a manifest record.
Cycle 01 — Boundary Standardization (LSBS)

Goal: every service boundary behaves the same at the edges.

    Mandatory endpoints: /v1/health, /v1/version, /v1/capabilities.

    Mandatory response envelope: { ts, code, message, detail } for errors.

    Mandatory event envelope: NDJSON line objects for all streams.

    UI consumes boundaries uniformly; no per-adapter special cases.

Acceptance: contract tests verify identical response shapes across services.
Cycle 02 — Run Identity Canon (RunRef)

Goal: every artifact is traceable to a run and its exact policy state.

    run_id stable ID, started/ended timestamps, status, host, app version.

    A run is an Activity; the orchestrator is an Agent; files and reports are Entities (PROV mapping).

    Every report embeds RunRef and links to inputs/outputs by hash.

Acceptance: “replay” is possible: given inputs + policy + version, you can reproduce the same outputs.
Cycle 03 — Event-First UX (No Polling)

Goal: UI never polls; it subscribes.

    Orchestrator exposes /v1/runs/{run_id}/events as NDJSON and optional SSE.

    Every adapter emits a stream that is multiplexed under a single run stream.

    UI shows progress from streams, not inferred timers.

Acceptance: disconnect and reconnect resumes from last event offset (stream cursor strategy).
Cycle 04 — Intake Autonomy Governor

Goal: hands-off ingestion that remains deterministic.

    Watcher lane: detects new/changed files, queues by SHA-256, emits INTAKE_DISCOVERED, DEDUP_HIT.

    Scheduler lane: time-based re-harvest for sources marked “volatile” (Drive remotes, active case folders).

    Queue is idempotent and crash-safe.

Acceptance: repeated scans do not multiply artifacts; they increase evidence density without duplicating primitives.
Cycle 05 — OCR Trigger Standard (Adaptive OCR)

Goal: OCR only when needed, but never misses low-text PDFs.

    OCRmyPDF policy:

        rotation correction via --rotate-pages when cardinal angle is wrong,

        skew correction via --deskew when slightly off horizontal.

    OCR is triggered when extraction confidence or text coverage fails thresholds.

    Output artifacts: OCR’d PDF + OCR_REPORT with per-page actions.

Acceptance: OCR lane produces page-level audit showing exactly why OCR ran.
Cycle 06 — Tika-First Extraction Canon

Goal: deterministic extraction for PDFs/DOCX/HTML/text.

    Tika server mode and endpoints are treated as a local dependency; default localhost access pattern documented.

    Extraction emits:

        normalized plaintext,

        metadata JSON,

        content-type certainty,

        errors pinned to file hashes.

Acceptance: same file always produces the same normalized outputs under the same tool versions.
Cycle 07 — NLP Lane Canon (Entity, Event, Relation)

Goal: NLP outputs become graphable artifacts, not informal summaries.

    NLP report yields:

        entities with typed spans,

        events with mention sets,

        relations with confidence values.

    Default NLP engine is offline (for example spaCy) and model availability is explicit and local.

    “Hallucination containment”: low-confidence relations become candidates, not committed edges.

Acceptance: NLP results validate against schema and can be diffed across runs.
Cycle 08 — Audio Lane Canon (Transcription as Evidence Units)

Goal: speech becomes time-pinned quote units.

    Faster-Whisper lane produces time-coded transcripts and quote candidates, optimized for offline speed and memory.

    Each quote becomes a QuotePin requiring a timecode pinpoint.

Acceptance: every quote is clickable to exact time span.
Cycle 09 — Authority Snapshot Index Canon

Goal: authority is never floating or ambiguous.

    Authority snapshots are indexed by:

        authority ID,

        effective date,

        source hash,

        chunk pointers used by propositions.

    All propositions cite authority chunks with law pinpoints and effective dates.

Acceptance: “controlling law at time of filing” is reconstructible.
Cycle 10 — VehicleMap Determinism (Forms-First Engine)

Goal: relief selection cannot drift.

    VEHICLEMAP_INDEX is a versioned library:

        relief -> vehicle -> form,

        governing authority pins,

        deadlines and service chain steps.

    Selected vehicle emits VEHICLE_SELECTED event with justification pins.

Acceptance: same relief input yields the same vehicle selection under same version.
Cycle 11 — PCW and PCG Enforcement at the API Edge

Goal: exports are impossible unless gates pass.

    PCW_REPORT is produced and validated per run.

    Export endpoints return conflict status when:

        any core PO is OPEN or PARTIAL,

        PCG is FAIL.

    Block reasons must be explicit and enumerable.

Acceptance: unsafe export is structurally impossible.
Cycle 12 — Neo4j Schema Canon (Constraints, Migrations, Seed)

Goal: graph integrity is guaranteed from day zero.

    Constraints use IF NOT EXISTS idempotency.

    Seed pack instantiates nuclei A–E as deterministic subgraphs.

    Import path uses a stable edge and node typing strategy.

Acceptance: fresh install and re-install produce the same schema state.
Cycle 13 — Bloom-Style Graph Explorer Parity

Goal: open-source Bloom-like experience.

    Perspectives (nuclei), saved searches, filtering, style rules, hover cards.

    Click-through to:

        exhibit file pointer,

        authority chunk pointer,

        run provenance.

Acceptance: graph UX is a first-class operational interface, not a demo screen.
Cycle 14 — Provenance Canon (PROV-Aligned)

Goal: derivation is an enforceable model.

    Every output has a derivation chain to inputs and activities (runs).

    Graph edges: DERIVES_FROM are required for all material outputs.

    Provenance constraints reflect PROV reasoning.

Acceptance: you can answer “where did this come from” for any field.
Cycle 15 — Observability Canon (OpenTelemetry)

Goal: run-scoped traces across all services.

    Span naming and attributes include: run_id, file hash, adapter, step.

    No external telemetry vendor required; local collection optional.

Acceptance: a single run timeline can be reconstructed from spans and NDJSON logs.
Cycle 16 — Offline-First Egress Control

Goal: nothing “phones home.”

    Default deny outbound networking.

    Explicit operator toggles for:

        rclone sync,

        model acquisition,

        update checks.

    All toggles are captured in RUN_MANIFEST.policies.

Acceptance: network use is provable and never implicit.
Cycle 17 — rclone Control Adapter Canon

Goal: Drive sync is controlled, auditable, and reversible.

    rclone rc/rcd standardized around localhost control API.

    Adapter emits:

        sync plan,

        file delta list,

        final reconciliation report.

Acceptance: every remote change becomes an auditable event stream.
Cycle 18 — Supply Chain: SBOM, Licensing, SLSA Ladder

Goal: releases are trustworthy and explainable.

    SBOM formats supported: CycloneDX, SPDX.

    Build policy aligns to SLSA framework for integrity controls.

    License ledger is a required build artifact.

Acceptance: every dependency is declared with license and source pointer.
Cycle 19 — Release Mechanics: FULL vs PATCH, Size Budget Gate

Goal: packaging is predictable under your size caps.

    Build emits:

        projected size,

        included files list,

        excluded weights/media/binaries list.

    Release builder refuses to ship when policies are violated.

Acceptance: size growth is always reported before it happens.
Cycle 20 — Autonomy Modes (Fail-Closed Automation)

Goal: autonomous execution with safe ceilings.

    Modes:

        DISCOVERY (index only),

        BUILD_GRAPH (writes graph and reports),

        BUILD_EXPORTS (requires PCG PASS).

    Each mode is a capability sandbox with explicit allowed operations.

Acceptance: autonomy is high, but cannot cross irreversible thresholds.
Deliverable Produced in This Turn

A dense “Spec Addendum Pack” containing:

    Draft 2020-12 JSON Schemas for the core manifests/reports.

    OpenAPI 3.1 contracts for Orchestrator, Graph API, Tika adapter, OCR adapter, Ollama adapter, rclone adapter.

    A single spec document enumerating Cycles 01–20 and the audit checklist.

Download

import json, zipfile, hashlib, datetime, re

out_root = Path("/mnt/data/spec_addendum_v0004")
if out_root.exists():
    for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*"), reverse=True):
        if p.is_file():
            p.unlink()
        else:
            try:
                p.rmdir()
            except OSError:
                pass
out_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

DRAFT = "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"
OPENAPI_DIALECT = "https://spec.openapis.org/oas/3.1/dialect/2024-11-10"

def write_text(rel, s):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(s, encoding="utf-8")

def write_json(rel, obj):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

def sha256_bytes(b: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(b).hexdigest()

def sha256_file(p: Path) -> str:
    return sha256_bytes(p.read_bytes())

# Shared defs (import from v0003-like, but include additions)
shared = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json",
    "title": "LitigationOS Shared Schema Definitions",
    "type": "object",
    "$defs": {
        "IsoDateTime": {"type": "string", "format": "date-time"},
        "IsoDate": {"type": "string", "format": "date"},
        "SemVer": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^v?\d+\.\d+\.\d+(-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?(\+[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$"},
        "Sha256": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[0-9a-f]{64}$"},
        "Path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "Uri": {"type": "string", "format": "uri"},
        "StableId": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]{2,127}$"},
        "NonEmptyString": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "Score01": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0, "maximum": 1.0},
        "EvidencePinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["source_path", "captured_at"],
            "properties": {
                "source_path": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Path"},
                "page_or_timecode": {"type": "string"},
                "bates_or_hash_optional": {"type": "string"},
                "captured_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "note": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "LawPinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["authority_id", "chunk_pointer", "effective_date"],
            "properties": {
                "authority_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "section": {"type": "string"},
                "effective_date": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDate"},
                "chunk_pointer": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "RunRef": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["run_id", "started_at"],
            "properties": {
                "run_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "started_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "ended_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["RUNNING", "SUCCESS", "FAIL", "PARTIAL", "BLOCKED", "DEGRADED"]},
                "host": {"type": "string"},
                "app_version": {"$ref": "#/$defs/SemVer"}
            }
        },
        "ErrorObject": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["code", "message", "ts"],
            "properties": {
                "ts": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "code": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "message": {"$ref": "#/$defs/NonEmptyString"},
                "detail": {"type": "object"}
            }
        },
        "JsonlEnvelope": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["ts", "event", "run_id"],
            "properties": {
                "ts": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "event": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "run_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "level": {"type": "string", "enum": ["TRACE", "DEBUG", "INFO", "WARN", "ERROR"]},
                "message": {"type": "string"},
                "data": {"type": "object"}
            }
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/shared.defs.schema.json", shared)

def ref(def_name):
    return {"$ref": f"https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json#/$defs/{def_name}"}

def base_schema(schema_id, title, description):
    return {"$schema": DRAFT, "$id": schema_id, "title": title, "description": description, "type": "object", "additionalProperties": False}

# JSON-RPC 2.0 message schema (for Electron IPC / stdio)
jsonrpc = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/ipc_jsonrpc.schema.json",
    "IPC_JSONRPC",
    "JSON-RPC 2.0 message schema for UI IPC. Used for Electron main<->renderer and UI<->local services over stdio or named pipes."
)
jsonrpc["required"] = ["jsonrpc"]
jsonrpc["properties"] = {
    "jsonrpc": {"type": "string", "const": "2.0"},
    "id": {"type": ["string", "number", "null"]},
    "method": {"type": "string"},
    "params": {"type": ["object", "array", "null"]},
    "result": {"type": ["object", "array", "string", "number", "boolean", "null"]},
    "error": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": False,
        "required": ["code", "message"],
        "properties": {
            "code": {"type": "integer"},
            "message": {"type": "string"},
            "data": {"type": ["object", "array", "string", "number", "boolean", "null"]}
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/ipc_jsonrpc.schema.json", jsonrpc)

# UI IPC message catalog (strongly-typed methods)
ui_ipc = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/ui_ipc_messages.schema.json",
    "UI_IPC_MESSAGES",
    "Whitelisted UI IPC methods, params, results, and required gate checks."
)
ui_ipc["required"] = ["version", "methods"]
ui_ipc["properties"] = {
    "version": ref("SemVer"),
    "methods": {
        "type": "array",
        "minItems": 1,
        "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["method", "params_schema", "result_schema", "requires_gates"],
            "properties": {
                "method": {"type": "string"},
                "params_schema": ref("Uri"),
                "result_schema": ref("Uri"),
                "requires_gates": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {"type": "string", "enum": ["TRUTH_LOCK", "MI_AUTH_LOCK", "PCW", "PCG", "PII_REDACTION_PASS", "OPERATOR_CONFIRM"]},
                    "minItems": 0
                },
                "notes": {"type": "string"}
            }
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/ui_ipc_messages.schema.json", ui_ipc)

# Quote DB line schema (JSONL line)
quote_line = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/quote_db_line.schema.json",
    "title": "QUOTE_DB_LINE",
    "description": "One JSONL line representing a pinned quote unit. Must be reversible to an EvidencePinpoint or LawPinpoint.",
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": False,
    "required": ["quote_id", "text", "pin", "run_id", "ts"],
    "properties": {
        "quote_id": ref("StableId"),
        "run_id": ref("StableId"),
        "ts": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "speaker": {"type": "string"},
        "role": {"type": "string"},
        "text": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "pin": {
            "oneOf": [ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]
        },
        "span": {"type": "object", "additionalProperties": False, "required": ["start", "end"], "properties": {"start": {"type":"integer","minimum":0}, "end": {"type":"integer","minimum":0}}},
        "confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "tags": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}
    }
}
write_json("schemas/quote_db_line.schema.json", quote_line)

# Chrono DB line schema (JSONL)
chrono_line = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/chrono_db_line.schema.json",
    "title": "CHRONO_DB_LINE",
    "description": "One JSONL line representing a bi-temporal event unit (event_time + record_time) pinned to sources.",
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": False,
    "required": ["event_id", "event_time", "record_time", "run_id", "pins", "summary"],
    "properties": {
        "event_id": ref("StableId"),
        "run_id": ref("StableId"),
        "event_time": {"type":"string"},  # allow partials; enforced by downstream validator
        "record_time": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "summary": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": {"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}},
        "entities": {"type":"array","items":ref("StableId")},
        "confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "status": {"type":"string","enum":["CANDIDATE","PINNED","DISPUTED"]}
    }
}
write_json("schemas/chrono_db_line.schema.json", chrono_line)

# Entity ledger line schema (JSONL)
entity_line = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/entity_ledger_line.schema.json",
    "title": "ENTITY_LEDGER_LINE",
    "description": "One JSONL line representing a canonical entity with aliases and provenance pins.",
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": False,
    "required": ["entity_id", "type", "name", "run_id", "pins"],
    "properties": {
        "entity_id": ref("StableId"),
        "run_id": ref("StableId"),
        "type": {"type":"string","enum":["Person","Org","Court","Case","Judge","Address","Phone","Email","Statute","Rule","Form","Vehicle","Exhibit","Filing","Order","Other"]},
        "name": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "aliases": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": {"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}},
        "confidence": ref("Score01")
    }
}
write_json("schemas/entity_ledger_line.schema.json", entity_line)

# Contradiction map schema
contradiction = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/contradiction_map.schema.json",
    "CONTRADICTION_MAP",
    "Graph of conflicts between QuotePins and/or Findings. All edges must be justified by pinned text spans."
)
contradiction["required"] = ["run", "nodes", "edges", "errors"]
contradiction["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "nodes": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["node_id","kind"],"properties":{
        "node_id": ref("StableId"),
        "kind": {"type":"string","enum":["QuotePin","Finding","OrderStatement","Allegation","FactCandidate"]},
        "ref": {"type":"string"}
    }}},
    "edges": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["src","dst","type","pins"],"properties":{
        "src": ref("StableId"),
        "dst": ref("StableId"),
        "type": {"type":"string","enum":["CONFLICTS_WITH","UNDERMINES","IMPEACHES","INCONSISTENT_WITH","MISMATCH_RECORD"]},
        "severity": {"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":5},
        "rationale": {"type":"string"},
        "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("EvidencePinpoint")}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/contradiction_map.schema.json", contradiction)

# Deadlines report schema
deadlines = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/deadline_report.schema.json",
    "DEADLINE_REPORT",
    "Computed deadlines with triggers, authority pins, service impact, and risk classification."
)
deadlines["required"] = ["run", "deadlines", "errors"]
deadlines["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "deadlines": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["deadline_id","trigger","due","rule_pin","status"],"properties":{
        "deadline_id": ref("StableId"),
        "trigger": {"type":"string"},
        "due": {"type":"string"},
        "rule_pin": ref("LawPinpoint"),
        "status": {"type":"string","enum":["UPCOMING","DUE_TODAY","OVERDUE","UNKNOWN"]},
        "risk": {"type":"string","enum":["LOW","MEDIUM","HIGH","CRITICAL"]},
        "calculation": {"type":"string"},
        "pins": {"type":"array","items": ref("EvidencePinpoint")}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/deadline_report.schema.json", deadlines)

        "proof_required": {"type":"boolean"},
        "status": {"type":"string","enum":["PLANNED","READY","SERVED","FAILED","BLOCKED"]},
        "pins": {"type":"array","items": ref("EvidencePinpoint")}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}

# Notice deficiency log schema
notice_log = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/notice_deficiency_log.schema.json",

)
notice_log["required"] = ["run", "entries"]
notice_log["properties"] = {
