Step-by-step execution on your machine (deterministic, one-click)
1) Extract the ZIP to your canonical root

Create a folder and extract the pack here:

    C:\Users\andre\Downloads\LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0__SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0010\FormsCorporaPack_v0006\

After extraction, confirm these exist:

    FormsCorporaPack_v0006\config\paths.json

    FormsCorporaPack_v0006\launcher\ONECLICK_FORMS_CORPORA_HARVEST.ps1

config/paths.json is set to root_discovery.mode=auto, so ROOT is derived from where you extracted the pack. OUT/CAS/GOV default under ROOT unless you explicitly set them.
2) Run the one-click launcher

Option A (recommended): right-click and run in PowerShell

    launcher\ONECLICK_FORMS_CORPORA_HARVEST.ps1

Option B: run from a PowerShell window opened in the pack root

Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass
.\launcher\ONECLICK_FORMS_CORPORA_HARVEST.ps1

3) Verify outputs

After success, inspect:

    OUT\REPORTS\PATHS_HEALTH_REPORT.json (must be PASS)

    OUT\REPORTS\RUN_REPORT.json (must be PASS)

    CAS\index\cas_index.jsonl (must exist and grow)

    OUT\ENVELOPES\ (must contain per-artifact envelope JSON files)

    OUT\RELEASES\ (must contain the lane ZIPs)

4) SCOTUS portal exports (authenticated)

Place SCOTUS portal export ZIPs here:

    INBOX\SCOTUS_PORTAL_EXPORTS\

Then re-run the launcher. The harvester ingests them into CAS and emits envelopes.
Pack code (exact, ready-to-run)
launcher/ONECLICK_FORMS_CORPORA_HARVEST.ps1

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest

# Resolve ROOT = folder containing this launcher -> .. (pack root)
$LauncherDir = Split-Path -Parent $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path
$Root = Resolve-Path (Join-Path $LauncherDir "..")

Write-Host "LitigationOS Forms Corpora Harvester — ROOT = $Root"

# Create venv
$Venv = Join-Path $Root ".venv"
if (!(Test-Path $Venv)) {
  py -3.11 -m venv $Venv
}

# Activate venv
& (Join-Path $Venv "Scripts\Activate.ps1")

# Install deps
pip install --upgrade pip
pip install -r (Join-Path $Root "tools\requirements.txt")

# Install Playwright Chromium for SCAO index capture (best-effort)
python -m playwright install chromium

# Ensure config exists
if (!(Test-Path (Join-Path $Root "config\paths.json"))) {
  Write-Error "Missing config\paths.json. Extract the pack into the target ROOT and retry."
}

# Run (STRICT by default)
python (Join-Path $Root "tools\forms_corpora_harvest.py") --root $Root --strict --scao-playwright-index
$exit = $LASTEXITCODE

if ($exit -ne 0) {
  Write-Host "RUN FAILED (exit=$exit). Check OUT\REPORTS\RUN_REPORT.json and PATHS_HEALTH_REPORT.json"
  exit $exit
}

Write-Host "RUN PASS. See OUT\RELEASES\ for corpus ZIPs."

tools/forms_corpora_harvest.py

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
LitigationOS Forms Corpora Harvester (Autonomous, Fail-Closed)

Primary objective:
- Produce lane-specific corpora bundles:
  - SCAO (forms PDFs + instruction PDFs) OR captured index export
  - Muskegon local packets/forms
  - WDMI pro se forms
  - SCOTUS public PDFs + ingest operator portal exports (if provided)

This script is designed to run on the operator machine with internet access.
In offline environments it can still build seed indexes and emit PINPOINT_MISSING.

Usage (recommended):
  python tools/forms_corpora_harvest.py --root . --strict

Inputs:
  - config/paths.json (single source of truth)
  - registries/corpora_registry.v0001.jsonl (authoritative entry points)
  - optional: RUNS/<seed_build>/OUT/REPORTS/CAPTURED_INDEX_EXPORT__FORMS_LINKS.csv

Outputs:
  - OUT/DERIVED/<LANE>/... downloaded artifacts
  - CAS objects + CAS index jsonl
  - OUT/ENVELOPES per artifact (mandatory)
  - OUT/REPORTS indexes + run report
  - OUT/RELEASES per-lane zips + rollup zip

Network policy:
  - allowlist domains from config/paths.json; deny private ranges by default.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse, csv, hashlib, json, os, re, socket, sys, time, zipfile
from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Dict, Any, List, Tuple, Optional
from urllib.parse import urlparse, urljoin

try:
    import requests
except Exception as e:
    requests = None

try:
    from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
except Exception:
    BeautifulSoup = None

URL_RE = re.compile(r'(https?://[^\s\)\"\'<>]+)', re.IGNORECASE)

def utc_now_iso() -> str:
    import datetime
    return datetime.datetime.utcnow().replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() + "Z"

def sha256_bytes(b: bytes) -> str:
    h = hashlib.sha256(); h.update(b); return h.hexdigest()

def sha256_file(p: Path) -> str:
    h = hashlib.sha256()
    with p.open("rb") as f:
        for chunk in iter(lambda: f.read(1024*1024), b""):
            h.update(chunk)
    return h.hexdigest()

def ensure_dir(p: Path):
    p.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

def read_json(p: Path) -> dict:
    return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

def write_json(p: Path, obj: Any):
    ensure_dir(p.parent)
    p.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding="utf-8")

def write_jsonl(p: Path, rows: List[dict]):
    ensure_dir(p.parent)
    with p.open("w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        for r in rows:
            f.write(json.dumps(r, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")

def append_jsonl(p: Path, row: dict):
    ensure_dir(p.parent)
    with p.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(row, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")

def is_private_ip(ip: str) -> bool:
    import ipaddress
    try:
        addr = ipaddress.ip_address(ip)
        return addr.is_private or addr.is_loopback or addr.is_link_local
    except Exception:
        return True

def resolve_host_ips(host: str) -> List[str]:
    ips = []
    try:
        for res in socket.getaddrinfo(host, None):
            ips.append(res[4][0])
    except Exception:
        return []
    seen=set(); out=[]
    for ip in ips:
        if ip not in seen:
            seen.add(ip); out.append(ip)
    return out

def domain_allowed(url: str, allowlist: List[str], deny_private: bool) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
    u = urlparse(url)
    host = (u.hostname or "").lower()
    if not host:
        return False, "NO_HOST"
    if host not in [d.lower() for d in allowlist]:
        return False, f"HOST_NOT_ALLOWLISTED:{host}"
    if deny_private:
        ips = resolve_host_ips(host)
        if not ips:
            return False, "DNS_RESOLUTION_FAILED"
        for ip in ips:
            if is_private_ip(ip):
                return False, f"PRIVATE_IP_BLOCKED:{ip}"
    return True, "OK"

def http_get(url: str, timeout: int = 60) -> Tuple[bytes, str]:
    if requests is None:
        raise RuntimeError("requests not installed. Install requirements first.")
    headers = {"User-Agent":"LitigationOS/FormsHarvester v0001"}
    r = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=timeout)
    r.raise_for_status()
    ctype = r.headers.get("content-type", "application/octet-stream")
    return r.content, ctype

def sanitize_filename(name: str) -> str:
    name = re.sub(r'[<>:"/\\|?*\x00-\x1F]', "_", name)
    name = re.sub(r'\s+', " ", name).strip()
    return (name[:200] if name else "artifact")

def extract_links_html(html: bytes, base_url: str) -> List[str]:
    if BeautifulSoup is None:
        raise RuntimeError("beautifulsoup4 not installed.")
    soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "html.parser")
    links=[]
    for tag in soup.find_all(["a","link"]):
        href = tag.get("href")
        if not href:
            continue
        u = urljoin(base_url, href)
        if u.lower().startswith("http://") or u.lower().startswith("https://"):
            links.append(u)
    seen=set(); out=[]
    for u in links:
        if u not in seen:
            seen.add(u); out.append(u)
    return out

def guess_ext_from_ctype(ctype: str) -> str:
    c = ctype.lower()
    if "pdf" in c: return ".pdf"
    if "html" in c: return ".html"
    if "json" in c: return ".json"
    if "zip" in c: return ".zip"
    return ""

@dataclass
class Paths:
    ROOT: Path
    OUT: Path
    CAS: Path
    GOV: Path
    OUT_DERIVED: Path
    OUT_ENVELOPES: Path
    OUT_REPORTS: Path
    OUT_RELEASES: Path
    LANES: Dict[str, Path]
    ALLOWLIST: List[str]
    DENY_PRIVATE: bool

def load_paths(root: Path) -> Paths:
    pj = root / "config" / "paths.json"
    if not pj.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Missing {pj}")
    obj = read_json(pj)
    mode = (obj.get("root_discovery") or {}).get("mode", "auto")
    roots = dict(obj.get("roots") or {})
    if mode == "auto":
        roots["ROOT"] = str(pj.resolve().parent.parent)
        for k in ["OUT","CAS","GOV"]:
            if not roots.get(k):
                roots[k] = str(Path(roots["ROOT"]) / k)
    ROOT = Path(roots["ROOT"])
    OUT = Path(roots["OUT"])
    CAS = Path(roots["CAS"])
    GOV = Path(roots["GOV"])
    out_layout = obj.get("out_layout") or {}
    OUT_DERIVED = Path(roots["ROOT"]) / out_layout.get("DERIVED", r"OUT\DERIVED")
    OUT_ENVELOPES = Path(roots["ROOT"]) / out_layout.get("ENVELOPES", r"OUT\ENVELOPES")
    OUT_REPORTS = Path(roots["ROOT"]) / out_layout.get("REPORTS", r"OUT\REPORTS")
    OUT_RELEASES = Path(roots["ROOT"]) / out_layout.get("RELEASES", r"OUT\RELEASES")
    lanes = obj.get("lanes") or {}
    LANES = {k: (Path(roots["ROOT"]) / v) for k,v in lanes.items()}
    net = (obj.get("policies") or {}).get("network_policy") or {}
    allow = net.get("allowlist_domains") or []
    deny_private = bool(net.get("deny_private_ranges", True))
    return Paths(ROOT=ROOT, OUT=OUT, CAS=CAS, GOV=GOV,
                 OUT_DERIVED=OUT_DERIVED, OUT_ENVELOPES=OUT_ENVELOPES, OUT_REPORTS=OUT_REPORTS, OUT_RELEASES=OUT_RELEASES,
                 LANES=LANES, ALLOWLIST=allow, DENY_PRIVATE=deny_private)

def path_policy_gate(paths: Paths) -> dict:
    checks: List[dict] = []

    def chk(name: str, p: Path, require_write: bool) -> bool:
        existed_before = p.exists()
        if not existed_before:
            ensure_dir(p)

        exists = p.exists()
        readable = os.access(str(p), os.R_OK) if exists else False
        writable = os.access(str(p), os.W_OK) if exists else False

        checks.append({
            "name": name,
            "path": str(p),
            "exists": exists,
            "existed_before": existed_before,
            "readable": readable,
            "writable": writable
        })

        if require_write and not writable:
            return False
        if (not require_write) and not readable:
            return False
        return True

    ok = True
    ok &= chk("OUT", paths.OUT, True)
    ok &= chk("CAS", paths.CAS, True)
    ok &= chk("GOV", paths.GOV, True)
    ok &= chk("ROOT", paths.ROOT, False)

    for p in [paths.OUT_DERIVED, paths.OUT_ENVELOPES, paths.OUT_REPORTS, paths.OUT_RELEASES]:
        ensure_dir(p)

    report = {
        "report_type": "PATHS_HEALTH_REPORT",
        "schema_version": "v0001",
        "created_at": utc_now_iso(),
        "status": "PASS" if ok else "FAIL",
        "checks": checks,
        "paths_config_source": str(paths.ROOT / "config" / "paths.json"),
        "paths_config_sha256": sha256_file(paths.ROOT / "config" / "paths.json"),
        "expanded_paths": {
            "ROOT": str(paths.ROOT),
            "OUT": str(paths.OUT),
            "CAS": str(paths.CAS),
            "GOV": str(paths.GOV),
            "OUT_DERIVED": str(paths.OUT_DERIVED),
            "OUT_ENVELOPES": str(paths.OUT_ENVELOPES),
            "OUT_REPORTS": str(paths.OUT_REPORTS),
            "OUT_RELEASES": str(paths.OUT_RELEASES),
            "LANES": {k: str(v) for k, v in paths.LANES.items()}
        }
    }

    write_json(paths.OUT_REPORTS / "PATHS_HEALTH_REPORT.json", report)
    if not ok:
        raise RuntimeError("PATH_POLICY_GATE_FAIL")
    return report

def cas_put(paths: Paths, content: bytes) -> dict:
    digest = sha256_bytes(content)
    aa = digest[:2]
    obj_path = paths.CAS / "objects" / "sha256" / aa / digest
    ensure_dir(obj_path.parent)
    if not obj_path.exists():
        obj_path.write_bytes(content)
    return {"sha256": digest, "cas_path": str(obj_path), "bytes": len(content)}

def write_envelope(paths: Paths, envelope: dict) -> Path:
    payload = json.dumps(envelope, sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8")
    env_id = sha256_bytes(payload)
    p = paths.OUT_ENVELOPES / f"{env_id}.json"
    write_json(p, envelope)
    return p

def download_and_ingest(paths: Paths, *, url: str, lane: str, corpus_id: str, subdir: str, ingest_method: str, params: dict) -> dict:
    allowed, reason = domain_allowed(url, paths.ALLOWLIST, paths.DENY_PRIVATE)
    if not allowed:
        raise RuntimeError(f"URL_BLOCKED:{reason}:{url}")
    content, ctype = http_get(url)
    ext = guess_ext_from_ctype(ctype)
    filename = sanitize_filename(Path(urlparse(url).path).name or (corpus_id + ext))
    out_dir = paths.LANES[lane] / corpus_id / subdir
    ensure_dir(out_dir)
    out_path = out_dir / filename
    out_path.write_bytes(content)

    cas_obj = cas_put(paths, content)
    cas_index_row = {
        "record_type":"CAS_OBJECT",
        "created_at": utc_now_iso(),
        "sha256": cas_obj["sha256"],
        "bytes": cas_obj["bytes"],
        "cas_path": cas_obj["cas_path"],
        "observed_path": url,
        "observed_at": utc_now_iso(),
        "ingest_method": ingest_method,
        "content_type": ctype,
        "lane": lane,
        "corpus_id": corpus_id,
        "output_path": str(out_path)
    }
    append_jsonl(paths.CAS / "index" / "cas_index.jsonl", cas_index_row)

    envelope = {
      "envelope_type":"TRANSFORM_ENVELOPE",
      "schema_version":"v0001",
      "created_at": utc_now_iso(),
      "origin":{
        "cas_origin_pointer":{
          "sha256": cas_obj["sha256"],
          "observed_path": url,
          "observed_at": utc_now_iso(),
          "ingest_method": ingest_method
        }
      },
      "transform":{
        "tool":"tools/forms_corpora_harvest.py",
        "version":"v0001",
        "params": params
      },
      "io":{
        "input_url": url,
        "content_type": ctype,
        "output_sha256": sha256_file(out_path)
      },
      "output_relpath": str(out_path)
    }
    env_path = write_envelope(paths, envelope)
    return {"url": url, "content_type": ctype, "output_path": str(out_path), "cas_sha256": cas_obj["sha256"], "envelope_path": str(env_path)}

def harvest_crawl_page(paths: Paths, *, page_url: str, lane: str, corpus_id: str, file_ext_allow: List[str], strict: bool) -> List[dict]:
    allowed, reason = domain_allowed(page_url, paths.ALLOWLIST, paths.DENY_PRIVATE)
    if not allowed:
        raise RuntimeError(f"URL_BLOCKED:{reason}:{page_url}")
    html, ctype = http_get(page_url)
    results=[]
    results.append(download_and_ingest(paths, url=page_url, lane=lane, corpus_id=corpus_id, subdir="HTML_SNAPSHOTS",
                                       ingest_method="crawl_snapshot", params={"kind":"html_snapshot"}))
    links = extract_links_html(html, page_url)
    filtered=[]
    for u in links:
        up = urlparse(u).path.lower()
        if any(up.endswith(ext) for ext in file_ext_allow):
            filtered.append(u)
    for u in filtered:
        try:
            results.append(download_and_ingest(paths, url=u, lane=lane, corpus_id=corpus_id, subdir="FILES",
                                               ingest_method="crawl_linked_file", params={"kind":"linked_file","from":page_url}))
            time.sleep(0.15)
        except Exception as e:
            if strict:
                raise
            else:
                results.append({"url": u, "error": str(e), "from": page_url})
    return results

def write_lane_index(paths: Paths, lane: str, rows: List[dict], basename: str):
    jsonl_path = paths.OUT_REPORTS / f"{basename}.jsonl"
    csv_path = paths.OUT_REPORTS / f"{basename}.csv"
    write_jsonl(jsonl_path, rows)
    fields = ["url","content_type","output_path","cas_sha256","envelope_path","error","from"]
    with csv_path.open("w", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as f:
        w = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fields)
        w.writeheader()
        for r in rows:
            w.writerow({k: r.get(k,"") for k in fields})

def zip_lane(paths: Paths, lane: str, corpus_id_prefix: str, zip_name: str):
    out = paths.OUT_RELEASES / zip_name
    if out.exists():
        out.unlink()
    base = paths.LANES[lane]
    with zipfile.ZipFile(out, "w", compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z:
        if base.exists():
            for p in base.rglob("*"):
                if p.is_file():
                    z.write(p, arcname=str(p.relative_to(paths.ROOT)))
        for p in paths.OUT_REPORTS.glob("*"):
            if p.is_file():
                z.write(p, arcname=str(p.relative_to(paths.ROOT)))
        for p in paths.OUT_ENVELOPES.glob("*.json"):
            if p.is_file():
                z.write(p, arcname=str(p.relative_to(paths.ROOT)))
        cas_index = paths.CAS / "index" / "cas_index.jsonl"
        if cas_index.exists():
            z.write(cas_index, arcname=str(cas_index.relative_to(paths.ROOT)))
    return out

def run_scao_playwright_index_export(root: Path, paths: Paths, strict: bool) -> Optional[Path]:
    """
    Best-effort: captures PDF URLs visible/loaded from the official SCAO form search UI.
    Writes OUT/REPORTS/SCAO_FORMS_INDEX_EXPORT__PLAYWRIGHT.jsonl and .csv.
    Returns the jsonl path if created.
    """
    script = root / "tools" / "scao_playwright_index_export.py"
    if not script.exists():
        if strict:
            raise FileNotFoundError(f"Missing {script}")
        return None
    import subprocess
    cmd = [sys.executable, str(script), "--root", str(root)]
    p = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    if p.returncode != 0:
        if strict:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Playwright index export failed: {p.stdout}\n{p.stderr}")
        return None
    out = paths.OUT_REPORTS / "SCAO_FORMS_INDEX_EXPORT__PLAYWRIGHT.jsonl"
    return out if out.exists() else None

def main() -> int:
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--root", required=True, help="Pack root (contains config/paths.json)")
    ap.add_argument("--strict", action="store_true", help="Fail-closed on any download/crawl error.")
    ap.add_argument("--offline-only", action="store_true", help="Do not download; emit seed indexes and missing report only.")
    ap.add_argument("--scao-playwright-index", action="store_true", help="Attempt Playwright-based SCAO search-page PDF URL capture and write SCAO_FORMS_INDEX_EXPORT.* before downloads.")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    paths = load_paths(root)

    path_policy_gate(paths)

    reg_path = root / "registries" / "corpora_registry.v0001.jsonl"
    if not reg_path.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Missing {reg_path}")
    registry=[]
    for line in reg_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines():
        line=line.strip()
        if line:
            registry.append(json.loads(line))

    lane_results: Dict[str, List[dict]] = {"SCAO_FORMS":[], "MUSKEGON_LOCAL":[], "WDMI_PRO_SE":[], "SCOTUS":[]}
    errors=[]
    missing=[]

    scotus_inbox = root / "INBOX" / "SCOTUS_PORTAL_EXPORTS"
    if scotus_inbox.exists():
        for zf in scotus_inbox.glob("*.zip"):
            b = zf.read_bytes()
            cas_obj = cas_put(paths, b)
            append_jsonl(paths.CAS / "index" / "cas_index.jsonl", {
                "record_type":"CAS_OBJECT","created_at":utc_now_iso(),"sha256":cas_obj["sha256"],"bytes":cas_obj["bytes"],
                "cas_path":cas_obj["cas_path"],"observed_path":str(zf),"observed_at":utc_now_iso(),"ingest_method":"operator_upload",
                "content_type":"application/zip","lane":"SCOTUS","corpus_id":"SCOTUS_PORTAL_EXPORTS","output_path":str(zf)
            })
            env = {
              "envelope_type":"ORIGIN_ENVELOPE","schema_version":"v0001","created_at":utc_now_iso(),
              "origin":{"cas_origin_pointer":{"sha256":cas_obj["sha256"],"observed_path":str(zf),"observed_at":utc_now_iso(),"ingest_method":"operator_upload"}},
              "transform":{"tool":"tools/forms_corpora_harvest.py","version":"v0001","params":{"kind":"portal_export_ingest"}},
              "io":{"input":{"path":str(zf)},"output":{"sha256":sha256_file(zf)}},
              "output_relpath":str(zf)
            }
            write_envelope(paths, env)

    if args.offline_only:
        if not scotus_inbox.exists() or not any(scotus_inbox.glob("*.zip")):
            missing.append({"missing_id":"SCOTUS_PORTAL_EXPORTS_MISSING","lane":"SCOTUS","blocker":"No portal export bundles found in INBOX/SCOTUS_PORTAL_EXPORTS/.",
                            "acquire_plan":["Export portal artifacts to ZIP and place in INBOX/SCOTUS_PORTAL_EXPORTS/ then re-run."]})
        write_json(paths.OUT_REPORTS / "PINPOINT_MISSING__PORTAL_EXPORTS.json", {
            "report_type":"PINPOINT_MISSING","schema_version":"v0001","created_at":utc_now_iso(),"missing":missing
        })
        write_json(paths.OUT_REPORTS / "RUN_REPORT.json", {
            "run_type":"FORMS_CORPORA_HARVEST","mode":"offline_only","created_at":utc_now_iso(),
            "status":"PASS" if not errors else "FAIL","errors":errors,"missing":missing
        })
        return 0

    if args.scao_playwright_index:
        try:
            run_scao_playwright_index_export(root, paths, strict=args.strict)
        except Exception as e:
            errors.append({"lane":"SCAO_FORMS","corpus_id":"MI__SCAO_FORMS__SEARCH_UI","url":"(playwright)","error":str(e)})
            if args.strict:
                write_json(paths.OUT_REPORTS / "RUN_REPORT.json", {
                    "run_type":"FORMS_CORPORA_HARVEST","mode":"online","created_at":utc_now_iso(),
                    "status":"FAIL","errors":errors,"missing":missing
                })
                return 2

    file_allow = [".pdf",".doc",".docx",".rtf",".txt",".zip",".xlsx",".xls"]
    for item in registry:
        lane = item["lane"]
        corpus_id = item["corpus_id"]
        kind = item.get("kind","")
        url = item.get("source_url","")

        try:
            if kind == "crawl":
                res = harvest_crawl_page(paths, page_url=url, lane=lane, corpus_id=corpus_id, file_ext_allow=file_allow, strict=args.strict)
                lane_results[lane].extend(res)
            elif kind == "seed_urls":
                seeds = (root / "docs" / "scotus_public_seed_urls.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines()
                for su in [s.strip() for s in seeds if s.strip() and s.strip().startswith("http")]:
                    lane_results[lane].append(download_and_ingest(paths, url=su, lane=lane, corpus_id=corpus_id, subdir="PUBLIC",
                                                                 ingest_method="seed_url_download", params={"kind":"seed_url"}))
            elif kind == "dynamic_index":
                missing.append({
                    "missing_id":"SCAO_DYNAMIC_INDEX_NOT_SCRAPED",
                    "lane":"SCAO_FORMS",
                    "blocker":"Dynamic SCAO search UI requires Playwright-based index export step.",
                    "acquire_plan":[
                        "Run: python tools/scao_playwright_index_export.py OR use your seed URL exports.",
                        "Then re-run with --strict to enforce full coverage."
                    ]
                })
            elif kind == "static_assets_root":
                continue
            else:
                continue
        except Exception as e:
            errors.append({"lane": lane, "corpus_id": corpus_id, "url": url, "error": str(e)})
            if args.strict:
                break

    write_lane_index(paths, "SCAO_FORMS", lane_results.get("SCAO_FORMS", []), "SCAO_FORMS_INDEX_EXPORT")
    write_lane_index(paths, "MUSKEGON_LOCAL", lane_results.get("MUSKEGON_LOCAL", []), "MUSKEGON_LOCAL_INDEX_EXPORT")
    write_lane_index(paths, "WDMI_PRO_SE", lane_results.get("WDMI_PRO_SE", []), "WDMI_PRO_SE_INDEX_EXPORT")
    write_lane_index(paths, "SCOTUS", lane_results.get("SCOTUS", []), "SCOTUS_PUBLIC_INDEX_EXPORT")

    zips=[]
    zips.append(zip_lane(paths, "SCAO_FORMS", "MI__", "CORPUS_SCAO_FORMS__v0001.zip"))
    zips.append(zip_lane(paths, "MUSKEGON_LOCAL", "MI__", "CORPUS_MUSKEGON_LOCAL__v0001.zip"))
    zips.append(zip_lane(paths, "WDMI_PRO_SE", "FED__", "CORPUS_WDMI_PRO_SE__v0001.zip"))
    zips.append(zip_lane(paths, "SCOTUS", "US__", "CORPUS_SCOTUS_PUBLIC__v0001.zip"))

    rollup = paths.OUT_RELEASES / "CORPORA_FORMS__ALL_LANES__v0001.zip"
    if rollup.exists(): rollup.unlink()
    with zipfile.ZipFile(rollup, "w", compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z:
        for zp in zips:
            if Path(zp).exists():
                z.write(zp, arcname=str(Path(zp).name))
        write_json(paths.OUT_REPORTS / "PINPOINT_MISSING__PORTAL_EXPORTS.json", {
            "report_type":"PINPOINT_MISSING","schema_version":"v0001","created_at":utc_now_iso(),"missing":missing
        })
        z.write(paths.OUT_REPORTS / "PINPOINT_MISSING__PORTAL_EXPORTS.json", arcname="PINPOINT_MISSING__PORTAL_EXPORTS.json")

    status = "PASS" if not errors else "FAIL"
    write_json(paths.OUT_REPORTS / "RUN_REPORT.json", {
        "run_type":"FORMS_CORPORA_HARVEST","mode":"online","created_at":utc_now_iso(),
        "status": status, "errors": errors, "missing": missing, "release_zips":[str(p) for p in zips] + [str(rollup)]
    })
    if errors:
        return 2
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        raise SystemExit(main())
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"FATAL: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
        raise

tools/scao_playwright_index_export.py

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
SCAO Forms Search Page — Playwright Index Export (Best-Effort)

Goal:
- Visit the official SCAO "Search for a form" page.
- Capture any PDF URLs observed via:
  1) DOM anchor hrefs ending in .pdf
  2) Network responses whose URL ends in .pdf
- Write:
  OUT/REPORTS/SCAO_FORMS_INDEX_EXPORT__PLAYWRIGHT.jsonl
  OUT/REPORTS/SCAO_FORMS_INDEX_EXPORT__PLAYWRIGHT.csv
"""
from __future__ import annotations
import argparse, csv, json, sys, re
from pathlib import Path
from urllib.parse import urlparse
from datetime import datetime

def utc_now_iso() -> str:
    return datetime.utcnow().replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() + "Z"

PDF_RE = re.compile(r'\.pdf(\?|#|$)', re.IGNORECASE)

def read_json(p: Path) -> dict:
    return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

def ensure_dir(p: Path):
    p.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

def main() -> int:
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--root", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--url", default="https://courts.michigan.gov/administration/scao/forms/pages/search-for-a-form.aspx")
    ap.add_argument("--timeout-ms", type=int, default=60000)
    ap.add_argument("--wait-ms", type=int, default=8000)
    args = ap.parse_args()

    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    out_reports = root / "OUT" / "REPORTS"
    ensure_dir(out_reports)

    try:
        from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
    except Exception:
        print("Playwright not installed. Install: pip install playwright && python -m playwright install chromium", file=sys.stderr)
        raise

    observed = []
    seen=set()

    def add_url(u: str, method: str):
        if not u:
            return
        if not u.lower().startswith("http"):
            return
        if not PDF_RE.search(u):
            return
        if u not in seen:
            seen.add(u)
            observed.append({
                "url": u,
                "observed_method": method,
                "observed_at": utc_now_iso()
            })

    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        ctx = browser.new_context()
        page = ctx.new_page()

        def on_response(resp):
            try:
                u = resp.url
                if PDF_RE.search(u):
                    add_url(u, "network_response")
            except Exception:
                pass

        page.on("response", on_response)

        page.goto(args.url, timeout=args.timeout_ms, wait_until="domcontentloaded")
        page.wait_for_timeout(args.wait_ms)

        try:
            hrefs = page.eval_on_selector_all("a[href]", "els => els.map(e => e.href)")
            for h in hrefs:
                add_url(h, "dom_anchor")
        except Exception:
            pass

        try:
            for _ in range(6):
                page.mouse.wheel(0, 2500)
                page.wait_for_timeout(800)
                hrefs = page.eval_on_selector_all("a[href]", "els => els.map(e => e.href)")
                for h in hrefs:
                    add_url(h, "dom_anchor_scroll")
        except Exception:
            pass

        ctx.close()
        browser.close()

    jsonl_path = out_reports / "SCAO_FORMS_INDEX_EXPORT__PLAYWRIGHT.jsonl"
    with jsonl_path.open("w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        for r in observed:
            f.write(json.dumps(r, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")

    csv_path = out_reports / "SCAO_FORMS_INDEX_EXPORT__PLAYWRIGHT.csv"
    with csv_path.open("w", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as f:
        w = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=["url","observed_method","observed_at"])
        w.writeheader()
        for r in observed:
            w.writerow(r)

    print(f"Wrote {len(observed)} PDF URLs to {jsonl_path}")
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

Next outputs you should expect after the one-click run

When the run completes successfully, the primary deliverables are:

    OUT\RELEASES\CORPUS_SCAO_FORMS__v0001.zip

    OUT\RELEASES\CORPUS_MUSKEGON_LOCAL__v0001.zip

    OUT\RELEASES\CORPUS_WDMI_PRO_SE__v0001.zip

    OUT\RELEASES\CORPUS_SCOTUS_PUBLIC__v0001.zip

    OUT\RELEASES\CORPORA_FORMS__ALL_LANES__v0001.zip

Each artifact is backed by:

    CAS\objects\sha256\... (immutable content-addressed store)

    CAS\index\cas_index.jsonl (append-only object log)

    OUT\ENVELOPES\*.json (mandatory transform envelopes)

    OUT\REPORTS\*_INDEX_EXPORT.(jsonl|csv) (catalogs)

ELAVATE THIS TO CANONICAL DIAMOND MASTER GOD MODE 9999+++OMEGAFREDCEPSSUPREME # agents.md - LitigationOS Build Charter (Windows x64)

## 1) Mission
Build a Windows x64 Litigation Operating System with a polished GUI, a Bloom-style interactive Neo4j graph (open-source implementation), and an offline-first LLM/AI toolchain that produces judicial-grade, Michigan-locked outputs under Proof-Carrying Workflow gates.

## 2) Non-negotiables (hard gates)
### Legal/truth gates
- Michigan-first authority lock: MCR/MCL/MRE, MJI benchbooks, SCAO MC/FOC forms and instructions, controlling orders.
- Truth-Lock: no invented facts or authority. Any proposition without a pinned pointer is DISPUTED; missing items become PINPOINT_MISSING with an acquisition plan.
- Forms-first VehicleMap: choose the mandated form/vehicle before drafting; map relief->vehicle/form->rule/standard->proof obligations (prereqs, deadlines, service, fees/bonds, controlling orders)->exhibits->risks->fallback.
- Proof-Carrying Workflow (PCW): every filing-capable output is blocked until all mandatory Proof Obligations are SATISFIED; final irreversible actions pass PCG FAIL-CLOSED.

### Engineering gates
- No skeletons/stubs/MVP. Deliver runnable, fully populated implementations only.
- Offline-first and open-source: no third-party APIs unless self-hosted by us. Prefer local services and reproducible builds.
- Deterministic paths; exclude C drive by default (auto-detect eligible drives).
- Never ask the operator to patch/merge; deliver complete files.

### Packaging gates
- Bundle root is fixed: LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0.
- VERSION is monotonic (v0001+). CURRENT is runnable. VERSIONS are immutable.
- Provide a FULL release zip when >2 files change or any multi-module feature ships.
- Size cap: FULL zip for the conversation <=700MB. Exclude weights/media/binaries by default; use PATCHES when projected >650MB; emit size budget when growth >50MB.

## 3) System architecture (reference implementation)
### Desktop app
- GUI: Electron + React + TypeScript.
- IPC: desktop app launches and supervises local services; no remote dependencies.
- Settings: theme packs, color palettes, layout presets, keyboard-driven workflows, per-case profiles, safety toggles (Truth-Lock strictness, PCW thresholds), and audit visibility.

### Local services
- Core service: Python 3.11+ (FastAPI or stdio-based IPC) hosting the workflow engines (Harvest, Graph, Proof, Packaging).
- Neo4j: local Neo4j Community managed by the app (Docker optional). Provide migrations, constraints, and seed data.
- Extraction: Apache Tika (local server or embedded) for PDFs/DOCX/HTML/text.
- Storage/mirroring: rclone for Google Drive and local drive synchronization (operator-controlled).
- LLM: Ollama for local inference (GGUF); optional Hugging Face local models (no hosted calls). Weights are external assets and must not be bundled inside FULL zips.

### UI surface areas (must exist)
1) Intake/Harvest dashboard: queue, progress, errors, deterministic output roots.
2) Graph Explorer (Bloom-style): search, filters, perspectives, styling, hover cards, click-through to authority text/exhibit pointers.
3) Proof Console: Proof Obligations by vehicle, status (OPEN/PARTIAL/SATISFIED), and evidence/authority links.
4) Form/Vehicle Library: SCAO forms mapped to governing rules and prerequisites.
5) Output Studio: judicial-grade exports (forms filled, filings assembled) only when gates PASS.
6) Audit/Preservation: logs, manifests, version history, contradiction map, deadlines.

## 4) Graph model (minimum viable canon)
### Nuclei (3-5 perspectives)
- Nucleus A: Courts and jurisdictions (Muskegon small claims -> 14th Circuit -> COA -> MSC -> JTC; federal overlay nodes allowed but gated).
- Nucleus B: Authority and forms (SCAO/FOC/MC forms <-> MCR/MCL/MRE propositions; benchbook references).
- Nucleus C: Case/evidence (sources of record, exhibits, timeline events, service/notice, orders).
- Optional D: Vehicles/Remedies (VehicleMap, standards, burdens, deadlines).
- Optional E: Operations (runs, bundles, manifests, QA outcomes).

### Required node types (labels)
Court, Jurisdiction, Judge, Form, Vehicle, Authority, AuthorityChunk, Proposition, ProofObligation, Deadline, Case, Order, Filing, Event, Source, Exhibit, QuotePin, Contradiction, Run, Bundle.

### Required edge types
GOVERNS(Form/Vehicle->Authority/Proposition), REQUIRES(Vehicle->ProofObligation), SATISFIED_BY(ProofObligation->QuotePin/Exhibit/AuthorityChunk), ISSUED_BY(Order->Court/Judge), FILED_IN(Filing->Court), SUPPORTS(Exhibit/QuotePin->Proposition), CONFLICTS_WITH(QuotePin<->QuotePin), TRIGGERS(Event->Vehicle/Deadline), DERIVES_FROM(Artifact->Source).

### Pinpoint object (must be standardized)
EvidencePinpoint = {source_path, page_or_timecode, bates_or_hash_optional, captured_at, note}.
LawPinpoint = {authority_id, section/subsection, effective_date, chunk_pointer}.

## 5) Agent responsibilities and rules of engagement
### Roles
- Architect: enforces gates, repo layout, contracts, and end-to-end cohesion.
- UI Agent: implements GUI, theming, settings, graph explorer, and operator workflows.
- Graph Agent: Neo4j schema, migrations, constraints, seed packs, traversal APIs.
- Harvest Agent: rclone integration, Tika extraction, deterministic intake, dedupe, manifests.
- LLM Agent: Ollama/HF local adapters, prompt templates, retrieval hooks, hallucination containment.
- Proof/Forms Agent: VehicleMap library, ProofObligation templates, SCAO form overlays, gating logic.
- QA/Release Agent: tests, reproducibility, size policy, installer/zip releases.

### What agents MUST output per change
- Working code, runnable locally.
- Updated manifest + changelog entries.
- Smoke test proof (log excerpt or test output).
- If feature spans multiple modules: FULL zip release via TOOLS/bundle_builder.py.

## 6) Build, test, release (minimum)
- audit: lint + static checks + unit tests + integration smoke test (start services, connect Neo4j, run one harvest, render graph, verify PCW blocks unsafe exports).
- continue--package: produce Windows x64 installer or portable zip; include versioned release notes; do not bundle model weights.

## 7) Licensing and supply-chain hygiene
- Only use reputable open-source dependencies. Record licenses in a dependency ledger.
- No blog-scraped code without provenance. Prefer GitHub upstream repos and Hugging Face model cards.
- No telemetry by default. All network features are opt-in and operator-controlled.

## 8) Definition of done for each milestone
Milestone PASS requires:
- GUI boots, services start, Neo4j connects, harvest runs, graph renders, proofs display, export is blocked until obligations are satisfied, and release zip builds under size policy.

# agents.md — LitigationOS Build Charter (Windows x64)
**Bundle Root:** `LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0`  
**Charter Version:** `v0001` (monotonic; never decrement)  
**Operating Mode:** Offline-first | Open-source-first | Proof-Carrying | Michigan-locked | Fail-closed on filing-capable outputs

---

## 0) Prime Directive (Diamond Canon)
Build a **Windows x64 Litigation Operating System** with:
- A **polished desktop GUI** (Electron + React + TypeScript),
- A **Bloom-style interactive graph explorer** implemented with **open-source visualization libraries** (no Neo4j Bloom dependency),
- A **local Neo4j Community** graph database,
- An **offline-first local AI toolchain** (Ollama + local retrieval),
- A **judicial-grade output pipeline** that is **Michigan-first** and blocked by **Proof-Carrying Workflow gates**.

This system produces **audit-visible, reproducible, Michigan-locked work products** while preventing unpinned facts/authority from entering filing-capable outputs.

---

## 1) Hard Gates (Non-negotiables)

### 1.1 Legal and Truth Gates (Fail-closed)
1. **Michigan Authority Lock (AUTHLOCK)**
   - Primary authority sources are **Michigan Court Rules (MCR)**, **Michigan Compiled Laws (MCL)**, **Michigan Rules of Evidence (MRE)**, **Michigan Judicial Institute benchbooks**, **SCAO forms** and instructions, and **controlling orders**. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}
   - Judicial discipline workflow must anchor to Michigan rules and JTC reference material where applicable. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

2. **Truth-Lock**
   - No invented facts or authority.
   - Any proposition without a pinned pointer is labeled: `DISPUTED`.
   - Missing items must emit: `PINPOINT_MISSING` + an acquisition plan, not a guess.

3. **Forms-first VehicleMap**
   - Relief selection order is mandatory:
     1) Relief → 2) Vehicle/Form → 3) Governing rule/standard → 4) Elements/prereqs → 5) Deadlines/service/fees/bonds → 6) Exhibits/evidence pins → 7) Risks/fallbacks.
   - SCAO forms are treated as first-class, versioned authority artifacts. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

4. **Proof-Carrying Workflow (PCW) + Proof-Carrying Gate (PCG)**
   - Filing-capable exports are blocked until all mandatory Proof Obligations are `SATISFIED`.
   - PCG is **fail-closed** for irreversible actions (service-ready packets, filing-ready packets, affidavit finalization, appellate packets).

### 1.2 Engineering Gates (Ship only runnable)
- **No skeletons, stubs, or MVP-only** shipments.
- **Offline-first + open-source-first**: no third-party hosted APIs unless self-hosted by the operator.
- **Deterministic paths**; **exclude `C:\` by default**; auto-detect eligible drives.
- **Never require operator patch/merge**: deliver complete files and complete releases.

### 1.3 Packaging Gates (Release discipline)
- Root: `LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0`
- Versions: `v0001`, `v0002`, etc. Immutable once released.
- `CURRENT` is always runnable.
- If more than 2 files change or any multi-module feature ships: emit a **FULL** release zip.
- Conversation zip budget: **<= 700MB**.
  - Do not bundle model weights or large binaries.
  - Use PATCH releases if projected > 650MB and emit a size budget if growth > 50MB.

---

## 2) Canonical Source-of-Truth Inputs (Michigan Authority Corpus)
Authority artifacts must be downloaded/snapshotted from official sources and stored with hash + effective date:
- **MCR**: Michigan Courts official rules portal (and the official PDF snapshot when used). :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}
- **MRE**: Michigan Courts official PDF. :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}
- **MCL**: Michigan Legislature official portal. :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}
- **MJI Benchbooks**: Michigan Courts publications portal (HTML/PDF). :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6}
- **SCAO Forms**: Michigan Courts SCAO forms indices and PDFs. :contentReference[oaicite:7]{index=7}
- **JTC**: Complaint process and reference materials (used only in its lane). :contentReference[oaicite:8]{index=8}

**Authority Snapshot Rule:** any authority referenced in a filing-capable output must resolve to:
- `Authority` node + `AuthorityChunk` node + `LawPinpoint`.

---

## 3) Reference Architecture (Windows x64)

### 3.1 Desktop App (Electron Shell)
- **Electron + React + TypeScript** for UI.
- IPC supervision: app launches and supervises local services; no remote dependencies.
- Packaging: **electron-builder** with Windows NSIS target (plus optional portable). :contentReference[oaicite:9]{index=9}

### 3.2 Local Services (Offline-first)
1. **Core Orchestrator Service (Python 3.11+)**
   - Hosts workflow engines: Harvest, Graph, Proof, Packaging, Export.
2. **Neo4j Community**
   - Local graph store; schema migrations, constraints, seed data.
   - Neo4j Community licensing must be tracked in the dependency ledger. :contentReference[oaicite:10]{index=10}
3. **Extraction Service**
   - Apache Tika server (local REST) for parsing PDF/DOCX/HTML/text. :contentReference[oaicite:11]{index=11}
4. **Mirroring**
   - rclone (operator-controlled) including `bisync` for bidirectional workflows where safe. :contentReference[oaicite:12]{index=12}
5. **Local LLM**
   - Ollama as the default local inference endpoint (GGUF weights external, never bundled). :contentReference[oaicite:13]{index=13}

---

## 4) Required UI Surface Areas (Must exist)
1. **Intake and Harvest Dashboard**
   - Intake queue, progress, deterministic output roots, errors, retry lanes, dedupe status.
2. **Graph Explorer (Bloom-style, open-source)**
   - Search, filters, perspectives, styling, hover cards, click-through to authority/exhibit pins.
   - Visualization libraries must be open-source:
     - **Sigma.js (WebGL) for very large graphs**. :contentReference[oaicite:14]{index=14}
     - **Cytoscape.js for rich interaction and analysis**. :contentReference[oaicite:15]{index=15}
3. **Proof Console**
   - Proof Obligations grouped by vehicle; status OPEN/PARTIAL/SATISFIED; linked pins.
4. **Form and Vehicle Library**
   - SCAO forms mapped to governing rules and prerequisites. :contentReference[oaicite:16]{index=16}
5. **Output Studio**
   - Exports are blocked until gates PASS.
6. **Audit and Preservation**
   - Logs, manifests, version history, contradiction map, deadlines, provenance chain.

---

## 5) Canonical Graph Model (Minimum Viable Canon)

### 5.1 Perspectives (Nuclei)
- **Nucleus A: Courts and Jurisdictions**
  - Muskegon trial level to COA to MSC to JTC; federal overlay nodes allowed but gated.
- **Nucleus B: Authority and Forms**
  - SCAO/FOC/MC forms ↔ MCR/MCL/MRE propositions ↔ benchbook references. :contentReference[oaicite:17]{index=17}
- **Nucleus C: Case and Evidence**
  - Source-of-record, exhibits, timeline events, service/notice, orders.
- **Optional D: Vehicles and Remedies**
  - VehicleMap, standards, burdens, deadlines.
- **Optional E: Operations**
  - Runs, bundles, manifests, QA outcomes.

### 5.2 Required Node Labels
`Court, Jurisdiction, Judge, Form, Vehicle, Authority, AuthorityChunk, Proposition, ProofObligation, Deadline, Case, Order, Filing, Event, Source, Exhibit, QuotePin, Contradiction, Run, Bundle`

### 5.3 Required Edge Types
`GOVERNS(Form|Vehicle -> Authority|Proposition)`  
`REQUIRES(Vehicle -> ProofObligation)`  
`SATISFIED_BY(ProofObligation -> QuotePin|Exhibit|AuthorityChunk)`  
`ISSUED_BY(Order -> Court|Judge)`  
`FILED_IN(Filing -> Court)`  
`SUPPORTS(Exhibit|QuotePin -> Proposition)`  
`CONFLICTS_WITH(QuotePin <-> QuotePin)`  
`TRIGGERS(Event -> Vehicle|Deadline)`  
`DERIVES_FROM(Artifact -> Source)`

### 5.4 Pinpoint Objects (Standardized)
**EvidencePinpoint**
```json
{
  "source_path": "string",
  "page_or_timecode": "string",
  "bates_or_hash_optional": "string|null",
  "captured_at": "ISO-8601",
  "note": "string"
}

LawPinpoint

{
  "authority_id": "string",
  "section": "string",
  "effective_date": "ISO-8601|unknown",
  "chunk_pointer": "string"
}

6) Deterministic Storage, Paths, and Drive Policy
6.1 Drive Policy

    Default scan excludes C:\.

    Eligible drives are auto-detected (fixed/removable) and must be explicitly enabled in Settings.

    Output roots are deterministic and case-scoped.

6.2 Canonical Output Roots

    F:\LitigationOS\ is the preferred root when present.

    Each run emits:

        RUN_MANIFEST.json

        RUN_LOG.jsonl

        ARTIFACT_MANIFEST.json

        HASHES.sha256

        ERROR_REPORT.json (if any)

        PCW_REPORT.json

        GRAPH_EXPORT.cypher or GRAPH_EXPORT.jsonl

7) Agent Roles, Contracts, and Rules of Engagement
7.1 Roles (Hard boundaries)

    Architect Agent

        Enforces gates, repo layout, contracts, and cohesion.

    UI Agent

        Electron app, settings, theming, Graph Explorer integration (Sigma.js and or Cytoscape.js).

    Graph Agent

        Neo4j schema, migrations, constraints, indexes, traversal APIs.

    Harvest Agent

        rclone integration, Tika extraction, deterministic intake, dedupe, manifests.

    LLM Agent

        Ollama adapters, prompt templates, retrieval hooks, hallucination containment.

    Proof and Forms Agent

        VehicleMap library, ProofObligation templates, SCAO form overlays, gating logic.

    QA and Release Agent

        Tests, reproducibility, size policy, installer/zip builds (electron-builder NSIS).

7.2 Mandatory Outputs Per Change (No exceptions)

    Working code runnable locally.

    Updated manifests and changelog entries.

    Smoke-test proof (log excerpt or structured test output).

    If feature spans multiple modules: FULL release zip via bundle builder.

8) Build, Test, Release (Minimum Bar)
8.1 Commands (Conceptual contracts)

    audit

        lint + static checks + unit tests + integration smoke test:

            start services

            connect Neo4j

            run one harvest

            render graph

            verify PCW blocks unsafe exports

    continue--package

        produce Windows x64 installer (NSIS) and or portable zip

        versioned release notes

        do not bundle model weights

8.2 Reproducibility and Supply Chain Hygiene

    Emit SBOMs in a standard format (CycloneDX recommended).

    Emit provenance and attestation (in-toto framework) for releases.

    Track supply chain posture against SLSA levels and record it per release.

    Maintain:

        DEPENDENCY_LEDGER.json

        LICENSES/ third-party texts

        THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md

9) Licensing and Privacy Defaults

    Only reputable open-source dependencies; record licenses.

    No telemetry by default.

    All network features are opt-in and operator-controlled.

    rclone is operator-controlled and explicit; bidirectional sync requires explicit enablement per profile.

10) Definition of Done (Milestone PASS)

A milestone PASS requires:

    GUI boots,

    services start,

    Neo4j connects,

    harvest runs,

    graph renders and is usable at target scale,

    proofs display with correct statuses,

    exports remain blocked until obligations are satisfied,

    release zip builds under size policy with manifests and audit artifacts.

11) Canonical “Nothing Leaves Without Pins” Rule (Global)

Any filing-capable output must be accompanied by:

    PCW_REPORT.json showing all mandatory Proof Obligations SATISFIED,

    evidence pins (source, page/timecode, hash or bates when available),

    law pins (authority id, section, effective date, chunk pointer),

    and a complete manifest of transformations.

If any required pin is missing: emit PINPOINT_MISSING and block the export.


If you want the next step elevated again into “Diamond Master” form, the highest-leverage upgrade is to append **machine-checkable schemas** for every manifest and report (`RUN_MANIFEST`, `PCW_REPORT`, `AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX`, `VEHICLEMAP_INDEX`, `FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT`) and to add a **strict interface contract** for each local service boundary (UI IPC ↔ Orchestrator ↔ Neo4j ↔ Tika ↔ Ollama ↔ rclone).
::contentReference[oaicite:26]{index=26}

You said:

If you want the next step elevated again into “Diamond Master” form, the highest-leverage upgrade is to append **machine-checkable schemas** for every manifest and report (RUN_MANIFEST, PCW_REPORT, AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX, VEHICLEMAP_INDEX, FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT) and to add a **strict interface contract** for each local service boundary (UI IPC ↔ Orchestrator ↔ Neo4j ↔ Tika ↔ Ollama ↔ rclone).
::contentReference[oaicite:26]{index=26}
ChatGPT said:
Δ Diamond Master Upgrade: Machine-Checkable Schemas + Strict Service-Boundary Contracts

This is an append-only addendum to agents.md that upgrades the charter with:

    JSON Schemas (Draft 2020-12) for every run/report/index/audit artifact (machine-checkable).

    Strict interface contracts for each local boundary (UI IPC ↔ Orchestrator ↔ Neo4j ↔ Tika ↔ Ollama ↔ rclone), including versioning, ports, envelopes, timeouts, and failure semantics.

9) Machine-Checkable Schemas Pack
9.1 Canonical files (add to repo)

    schemas/common.schema.json (shared $defs: envelopes, pinpoints, artifact refs, IDs)

    schemas/run_manifest.schema.json (RUN_MANIFEST)

    schemas/pcw_report.schema.json (PCW_REPORT)

    schemas/auth_snapshot_index.schema.json (AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX)

    schemas/vehiclemap_index.schema.json (VEHICLEMAP_INDEX)

    schemas/form_overlay_audit.schema.json (FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT)

Schema standard: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 (the $schema value below is intentional).
9.2 schemas/common.schema.json

{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1",
  "title": "LitigationOS Common Definitions (v1)",
  "type": "object",
  "$defs": {
    "SemVer": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^(0|[1-9]\\d*)\\.(0|[1-9]\\d*)\\.(0|[1-9]\\d*)(?:-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?(?:\\+[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$"
    },
    "ISO8601": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time"
    },
    "Sha256": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[A-Fa-f0-9]{64}$"
    },
    "UUID": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uuid"
    },
    "RunId": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^(RUN_[0-9]{8}_[0-9]{6}_[A-Za-z0-9_-]{2,64}|[0-9a-fA-F]{8}-[0-9a-fA-F]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-fA-F]{3}-[89abAB][0-9a-fA-F]{3}-[0-9a-fA-F]{12})$"
    },
    "RelPath": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "pattern": "^[^\\r\\n]+$"
    },
    "NonEmptyString": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "ErrorCode": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[A-Z0-9_]{3,64}$"
    },
    "ErrorEnvelope": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "ok",
        "error",
        "trace_id",
        "ts"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ok": {
          "const": false
        },
        "ts": {
          "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
        },
        "trace_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 8,
          "maxLength": 128
        },
        "error": {
          "type": "object",
          "additionalProperties": false,
          "required": [
            "code",
            "message"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "code": {
              "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ErrorCode"
            },
            "message": {
              "type": "string",
              "minLength": 1,
              "maxLength": 4000
            },
            "details": {
              "type": [
                "object",
                "array",
                "string",
                "null"
              ]
            },
            "hint": {
              "type": [
                "string",
                "null"
              ],
              "maxLength": 2000
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "OkEnvelope": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "ok",
        "data",
        "trace_id",
        "ts"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ok": {
          "const": true
        },
        "ts": {
          "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
        },
        "trace_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 8,
          "maxLength": 128
        },
        "data": {
          "type": [
            "object",
            "array",
            "string",
            "number",
            "boolean",
            "null"
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    "EvidencePinpoint": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "source_path",
        "captured_at"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "source_path": {
          "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/RelPath"
        },
        "page_or_timecode": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "maxLength": 64
        },
        "bates_or_hash_optional": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "maxLength": 256
        },
        "captured_at": {
          "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
        },
        "note": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "maxLength": 2000
        }
      }
    },
    "LawPinpoint": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "authority_id",
        "section",
        "effective_date",
        "chunk_pointer"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "authority_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 3,
          "maxLength": 128
        },
        "section": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "maxLength": 256
        },
        "effective_date": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date"
        },
        "chunk_pointer": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "maxLength": 256
        }
      }
    },
    "ArtifactRef": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "artifact_type",
        "relpath",
        "sha256",
        "bytes"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "artifact_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 2,
          "maxLength": 64
        },
        "relpath": {
          "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/RelPath"
        },
        "sha256": {
          "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/Sha256"
        },
        "bytes": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "mime": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "maxLength": 128
        },
        "created_at": {
          "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
        },
        "notes": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "maxLength": 2000
        }
      }
    },
    "NodeRef": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "neo4j_id",
        "labels"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "neo4j_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "maxLength": 128
        },
        "labels": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 1,
          "items": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "maxLength": 64
          }
        },
        "props_hint": {
          "type": [
            "object",
            "null"
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": true
}

9.3 schemas/run_manifest.schema.json — RUN_MANIFEST

{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "urn:litigationos:schema:run_manifest@v1",
  "title": "RUN_MANIFEST (v1)",
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "schema_version",
    "run_id",
    "mode",
    "status",
    "started_at",
    "output_root",
    "artifacts",
    "counters",
    "environment"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {
      "const": "RUN_MANIFEST"
    },
    "schema_version": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/SemVer"
    },
    "run_id": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/RunId"
    },
    "mode": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "discovery",
        "analyze",
        "compile",
        "file_ready",
        "pcg_gate"
      ]
    },
    "status": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": [
        "SUCCESS",
        "FAIL",
        "PARTIAL",
        "ABORTED"
      ]
    },
    "started_at": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
    },
    "finished_at": {
      "anyOf": [
        {
          "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
        },
        {
          "type": "null"
        }
      ]
    },
    "output_root": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/RelPath"
    },
    "input_roots": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "items": {
        "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/RelPath"
      }
    },
    "case_profile": {
      "type": [
        "object",
        "null"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "case_id",
        "track"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "case_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "maxLength": 128
        },
        "track": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "MEEK1",
            "MEEK2",
            "MEEK3",
            "MEEK4",
            "MULTI"
          ]
        },
        "court": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "maxLength": 128
        }
      }
    },
    "artifacts": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ArtifactRef"
      }
    },
    "counters": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "files_seen",
        "files_extracted",
        "docs_textified",
        "nodes_written",
        "edges_written",
        "errors"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "files_seen": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "files_extracted": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "docs_textified": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "nodes_written": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "edges_written": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "errors": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        }
      }
    },
    "environment": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "host",
        "os",
        "python",
        "app",
        "time_zone"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "host": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "maxLength": 256
        },
        "os": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "maxLength": 256
        },
        "python": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "maxLength": 64
        },
        "app": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "maxLength": 128
        },
        "time_zone": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "maxLength": 64
        },
        "git_commit": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "maxLength": 64
        }
      }
    },
    "warnings": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "string",
        "maxLength": 2000
      }
    },
    "errors": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "required": [
          "code",
          "message",
          "ts"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "code": {
            "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ErrorCode"
          },
          "message": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "maxLength": 4000
          },
          "ts": {
            "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
          },
          "trace_id": {
            "type": [
              "string",
              "null"
            ],
            "maxLength": 128
          },
          "artifact_hint": {
            "type": [
              "string",
              "null"
            ],
            "maxLength": 256
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

9.4 schemas/pcw_report.schema.json — PCW_REPORT

{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "urn:litigationos:schema:pcw_report@v1",
  "title": "PCW_REPORT (v1)",
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "schema_version",
    "run_id",
    "case_id",
    "generated_at",
    "pcg_decision",
    "vehicles"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {
      "const": "PCW_REPORT"
    },
    "schema_version": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/SemVer"
    },
    "run_id": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/RunId"
    },
    "case_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "maxLength": 128
    },
    "generated_at": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
    },
    "pcg_decision": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "required": [
        "result",
        "reason_codes",
        "fail_closed"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "result": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "PASS",
            "FAIL"
          ]
        },
        "fail_closed": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "reason_codes": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 1,
          "items": {
            "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ErrorCode"
          }
        },
        "notes": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "maxLength": 4000
        }
      }
    },
    "vehicles": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "required": [
          "vehicle_id",
          "vehicle_title",
          "status",
          "proof_obligations"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "vehicle_id": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "maxLength": 128
          },
          "vehicle_title": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "maxLength": 256
          },
          "status": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "OPEN",
              "PARTIAL",
              "SATISFIED"
            ]
          },
          "forms": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "type": "string",
              "minLength": 1,
              "maxLength": 128
            }
          },
          "governing_authority": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/LawPinpoint"
            }
          },
          "proof_obligations": {
            "type": "array",
            "minItems": 1,
            "items": {
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "required": [
                "po_id",
                "title",
                "mandatory",
                "status",
                "requirements",
                "satisfaction"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "po_id": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "minLength": 1,
                  "maxLength": 128
                },
                "title": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "minLength": 1,
                  "maxLength": 256
                },
                "category": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "jurisdiction",
                    "standing",
                    "deadline",
                    "service",
                    "fee_bond",
                    "record",
                    "evidence",
                    "authority",
                    "local_rule",
                    "other"
                  ]
                },
                "mandatory": {
                  "type": "boolean"
                },
                "status": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "OPEN",
                    "PARTIAL",
                    "SATISFIED"
                  ]
                },
                "requirements": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "additionalProperties": false,
                  "required": [
                    "law_pinpoints",
                    "evidence_minimum"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "law_pinpoints": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/LawPinpoint"
                      }
                    },
                    "evidence_minimum": {
                      "type": "integer",
                      "minimum": 0
                    },
                    "notes": {
                      "type": [
                        "string",
                        "null"
                      ],
                      "maxLength": 4000
                    }
                  }
                },
                "satisfaction": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "additionalProperties": false,
                  "required": [
                    "evidence_pins",
                    "authority_chunks",
                    "validators",
                    "assurance_score"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "evidence_pins": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/EvidencePinpoint"
                      }
                    },
                    "authority_chunks": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/LawPinpoint"
                      }
                    },
                    "validators": {
                      "type": "array",
                      "items": {
                        "type": "object",
                        "additionalProperties": false,
                        "required": [
                          "name",
                          "version",
                          "result",
                          "ts"
                        ],
                        "properties": {
                          "name": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "minLength": 1,
                            "maxLength": 128
                          },
                          "version": {
                            "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/SemVer"
                          },
                          "result": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                              "PASS",
                              "FAIL",
                              "WARN",
                              "SKIP"
                            ]
                          },
                          "ts": {
                            "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
                          },
                          "details": {
                            "type": [
                              "object",
                              "string",
                              "null"
                            ]
                          }
                        }
                      }
                    },
                    "assurance_score": {
                      "type": "number",
                      "minimum": 0,
                      "maximum": 100
                    },
                    "status_explainer": {
                      "type": [
                        "string",
                        "null"
                      ],
                      "maxLength": 4000
                    }
                  }
                },
                "pinpoint_missing": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "items": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "additionalProperties": false,
                    "required": [
                      "missing_type",
                      "description",
                      "acquisition_plan"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "missing_type": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "enum": [
                          "EVIDENCE",
                          "AUTHORITY",
                          "ORDER",
                          "SERVICE_PROOF",
                          "DEADLINE_SOURCE",
                          "FORM_INSTRUCTIONS",
                          "OTHER"
                        ]
                      },
                      "description": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "minLength": 1,
                        "maxLength": 2000
                      },
                      "acquisition_plan": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "minLength": 1,
                        "maxLength": 4000
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "summary": {
      "type": [
        "object",
        "null"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "mandatory_open": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "mandatory_partial": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "mandatory_satisfied": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

9.5 schemas/auth_snapshot_index.schema.json — AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX

{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "urn:litigationos:schema:auth_snapshot_index@v1",
  "title": "AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX (v1)",
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "schema_version",
    "generated_at",
    "authority_sets"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {
      "const": "AUTH_SNAPSHOT_INDEX"
    },
    "schema_version": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/SemVer"
    },
    "generated_at": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
    },
    "authority_sets": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "required": [
          "authority_set_id",
          "scope",
          "snapshots"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "authority_set_id": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "maxLength": 128
          },
          "scope": {
            "type": "string",
            "enum": [
              "MICHIGAN_PRIMARY",
              "MICHIGAN_LOCAL",
              "FEDERAL_OVERLAY",
              "MIXED"
            ]
          },
          "notes": {
            "type": [
              "string",
              "null"
            ],
            "maxLength": 2000
          },
          "snapshots": {
            "type": "array",
            "minItems": 1,
            "items": {
              "type": "object",
              "additionalProperties": false,
              "required": [
                "authority_id",
                "authority_type",
                "retrieved_at",
                "effective_date",
                "source",
                "artifact",
                "chunks"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "authority_id": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "minLength": 3,
                  "maxLength": 128
                },
                "authority_type": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "enum": [
                    "MCR",
                    "MCL",
                    "MRE",
                    "MJI_BENCHBOOK",
                    "SCAO_FORM_INSTR",
                    "SCAO_AO",
                    "JTC_MATERIAL",
                    "LOCAL_ADMIN_ORDER",
                    "LOCAL_POLICY",
                    "CASELAW_PUBLISHED",
                    "CASELAW_UNPUBLISHED",
                    "OTHER"
                  ]
                },
                "title": {
                  "type": [
                    "string",
                    "null"
                  ],
                  "maxLength": 256
                },
                "retrieved_at": {
                  "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
                },
                "effective_date": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date"
                },
                "superseded_by": {
                  "type": [
                    "string",
                    "null"
                  ],
                  "maxLength": 128
                },
                "source": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "additionalProperties": false,
                  "required": [
                    "kind"
                  ],
                  "properties": {
                    "kind": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "enum": [
                        "web",
                        "local_file",
                        "manual_entry"
                      ]
                    },
                    "source_url": {
                      "type": [
                        "string",
                        "null"
                      ],
                      "format": "uri"
                    },
                    "local_path": {
                      "type": [
                        "string",
                        "null"
                      ],
                      "maxLength": 1024
                    }
                  }
                },
                "artifact": {
                  "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ArtifactRef"
                },
                "chunks": {
                  "type": "array",
                  "minItems": 1,
                  "items": {
                    "type": "object",
                    "additionalProperties": false,
                    "required": [
                      "chunk_id",
                      "section",
                      "artifact_relpath",
                      "sha256",
                      "start_offset",
                      "end_offset"
                    ],
                    "properties": {
                      "chunk_id": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "minLength": 1,
                        "maxLength": 128
                      },
                      "section": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "minLength": 1,
                        "maxLength": 256
                      },
                      "artifact_relpath": {
                        "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/RelPath"
                      },
                      "sha256": {
                        "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/Sha256"
                      },
                      "start_offset": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "minimum": 0
                      },
                      "end_offset": {
                        "type": "integer",
                        "minimum": 0
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

9.6 schemas/vehiclemap_index.schema.json — VEHICLEMAP_INDEX

{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "urn:litigationos:schema:vehiclemap_index@v1",
  "title": "VEHICLEMAP_INDEX (v1)",
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "required": [
    "schema_id",
    "schema_version",
    "generated_at",
    "vehicles"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schema_id": {
      "const": "VEHICLEMAP_INDEX"
    },
    "schema_version": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/SemVer"
    },
    "generated_at": {
      "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/ISO8601"
    },
    "vehicles": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 1,
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "required": [
          "vehicle_id",
          "title",
          "relief_tags",
          "forms",
          "standards",
          "proof_obligations",
          "deadlines",
          "service_chain"

        "properties": {
          "vehicle_id": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "maxLength": 128
          },
          "title": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "maxLength": 256
          },
          "relief_tags": {
            "type": "array",
            "minItems": 1,
            "items": {
              "type": "string",
              "minLength": 1,
              "maxLength": 64

          "forms": {

            "minItems": 1,
            "items": {
              "type": "string",
              "minLength": 1,
              "maxLength": 128
            }
          },
          "governing_authority": {
            "type": "array",
            "items": {
              "$ref": "urn:litigationos:schema:common@v1#/$defs/LawPinpoint"
            }
          },
          "standards": {
            "type": "array",
            "minItems": 1,
            "items": {

              "required": [
