from pathlib import Path
import json, zipfile, hashlib, datetime, re

out_root = Path("/mnt/data/spec_addendum_v0005")
if out_root.exists():
    for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*"), reverse=True):
        if p.is_file():
            p.unlink()
        else:
            try:
                p.rmdir()
            except OSError:
                pass
out_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

DRAFT = "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"
OPENAPI_DIALECT = "https://spec.openapis.org/oas/3.1/dialect/2024-11-10"
now = datetime.datetime.utcnow().replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() + "Z"

def write_text(rel, s):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(s, encoding="utf-8")

def write_json(rel, obj):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

def sha256_bytes(b: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(b).hexdigest()

def sha256_file(p: Path) -> str:
    return sha256_bytes(p.read_bytes())

# Shared defs
shared = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json",
    "title": "LitigationOS Shared Schema Definitions",
    "type": "object",
    "$defs": {
        "IsoDateTime": {"type": "string", "format": "date-time"},
        "IsoDate": {"type": "string", "format": "date"},
        "SemVer": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^v?\d+\.\d+\.\d+(-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?(\+[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$"},
        "Sha256": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[0-9a-f]{64}$"},
        "Path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "Uri": {"type": "string", "format": "uri"},
        "StableId": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]{2,127}$"},
        "NonEmptyString": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "Score01": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0, "maximum": 1.0},
        "Bytes": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
        "EvidencePinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["source_path", "captured_at"],
            "properties": {
                "source_path": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Path"},
                "page_or_timecode": {"type": "string"},
                "bates_or_hash_optional": {"type": "string"},
                "captured_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "note": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "LawPinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["authority_id", "chunk_pointer", "effective_date"],
            "properties": {
                "authority_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "section": {"type": "string"},
                "effective_date": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDate"},
                "chunk_pointer": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "RunRef": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["run_id", "started_at"],
            "properties": {
                "run_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "started_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "ended_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["RUNNING", "SUCCESS", "FAIL", "PARTIAL", "BLOCKED", "DEGRADED"]},
                "host": {"type": "string"},
                "app_version": {"$ref": "#/$defs/SemVer"}
            }
        },
        "ErrorObject": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["code", "message", "ts"],
            "properties": {
                "ts": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "code": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "message": {"$ref": "#/$defs/NonEmptyString"},
                "detail": {"type": "object"}
            }
        },
        "ArtifactRef": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["path", "sha256", "bytes"],
            "properties": {
                "path": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Path"},
                "sha256": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Sha256"},
                "bytes": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Bytes"},
                "mime": {"type": "string"},
                "created_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"}
            }
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/shared.defs.schema.json", shared)

def ref(def_name):
    return {"$ref": f"https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json#/$defs/{def_name}"}

def base_schema(schema_id, title, description):
    return {"$schema": DRAFT, "$id": schema_id, "title": title, "description": description, "type": "object", "additionalProperties": False}

# Required missing schemas from v0004 references
nlp_report = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/nlp_report.schema.json",
    "NLP_REPORT",
    "Offline NLP extraction output (entities/events/relations) as candidates. Nothing is committed as authority or fact without pins."
)
nlp_report["required"] = ["run", "input", "entities", "events", "relations", "errors"]
nlp_report["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "input": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "entities": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["entity_id","type","name","confidence","pins"],"properties":{
        "entity_id": ref("StableId"),
        "type": {"type":"string"},
        "name": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "aliases": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}}
    }}},
    "events": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["event_id","summary","confidence","pins"],"properties":{
        "event_id": ref("StableId"),
        "summary": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "event_time": {"type":"string"},
        "confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("EvidencePinpoint")}
    }}},
    "relations": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["src","dst","type","confidence","pins"],"properties":{
        "src": ref("StableId"),
        "dst": ref("StableId"),
        "type": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("EvidencePinpoint")}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/nlp_report.schema.json", nlp_report)

form_overlay_audit = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_overlay_audit.schema.json",
    "FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT",
    "Field-level audit for applying a form overlay: every populated field must trace to pins or be explicitly operator-entered."
)
form_overlay_audit["required"] = ["run", "form_id", "input_artifacts", "field_audit", "output", "errors"]
form_overlay_audit["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "form_id": ref("StableId"),
    "input_artifacts": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
    "field_audit": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["field","value","source"],"properties":{
        "field": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "value": {"type":["string","number","boolean","null"]},
        "source": {"type":"string","enum":["PINNED","OPERATOR","DERIVED","DEFAULT"]},
        "pins": {"type":"array","items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}}
    }}},
    "output": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/form_overlay_audit.schema.json", form_overlay_audit)

bundle_manifest = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/bundle_manifest.schema.json",
    "BUNDLE_MANIFEST",
    "Immutable manifest for a built bundle (FULL or PATCH). Enforces size policy, exclusions, and integrity catalogs."
)
bundle_manifest["required"] = ["bundle_id", "built_at", "kind", "run", "files", "policies", "errors"]
bundle_manifest["properties"] = {
    "bundle_id": ref("StableId"),
    "built_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "kind": {"type":"string","enum":["FULL","PATCH"]},
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "files": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["path","sha256","bytes"],"properties":{
        "path": ref("Path"),
        "sha256": ref("Sha256"),
        "bytes": ref("Bytes"),
        "role": {"type":"string","enum":["SOURCE","BINARY","DOC","SCHEMA","OPENAPI","REPORT","OTHER"]},
        "excluded_reason": {"type":"string"}
    }}},
    "policies": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"properties":{
        "size_cap_mb": {"type":"integer","minimum":1},
        "weights_excluded": {"type":"boolean"},
        "network_opt_in": {"type":"boolean"}
    }},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/bundle_manifest.schema.json", bundle_manifest)

# New: OCR request + OCR report
ocr_request = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/ocr_request.schema.json",
    "OCR_REQUEST",
    "Request to OCR a document/image asset. Input/output are paths under deterministic roots; originals remain immutable."
)
ocr_request["required"] = ["run_id", "input", "profile"]
ocr_request["properties"] = {
    "run_id": ref("StableId"),
    "input": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "profile": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["lang","rotate_pages","deskew"],"properties":{
        "lang": {"type":"string","default":"eng"},
        "rotate_pages": {"type":"boolean","default":True},
        "deskew": {"type":"boolean","default":True},
        "force_ocr": {"type":"boolean","default":False},
        "skip_text": {"type":"boolean","default":True},
        "dpi": {"type":"integer","minimum":72,"maximum":600,"default":300},
        "timeout_sec": {"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":1800}
    }},
    "output_dir": ref("Path")
}
write_json("schemas/ocr_request.schema.json", ocr_request)

ocr_report = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/ocr_report.schema.json",
    "OCR_REPORT",
    "Forensic OCR transform report: per-page actions, coverage metrics, tool versions, and output hashes."
)
ocr_report["required"] = ["run", "input", "output", "engine", "pages", "summary", "errors"]
ocr_report["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "input": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "output": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "engine": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["name","version","mode"],"properties":{
        "name": {"type":"string","enum":["OCRmyPDF","Tesseract","VisionOCR","Other"]},
        "version": {"type":"string"},
        "mode": {"type":"string","enum":["DEFAULT","FORCE_OCR","SKIP_TEXT","IMAGE_ONLY"]},
        "lang": {"type":"string"},
        "notes": {"type":"string"}
    }},
    "pages": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["page","action","text_coverage"],"properties":{
        "page": {"type":"integer","minimum":1},
        "action": {"type":"string","enum":["OCR_APPLIED","SKIPPED_HAS_TEXT","SKIPPED_ERROR","ROTATED","DESKEWED","REPAIRED","FAILED"]},
        "rotation_deg": {"type":"integer","enum":[0,90,180,270]},
        "text_coverage": ref("Score01"),
        "confidence_proxy": ref("Score01"),
        "warnings": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "pin": ref("EvidencePinpoint")
    }}},
    "summary": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["pages_total","pages_ocr","coverage_mean"],"properties":{
        "pages_total": {"type":"integer","minimum":1},
        "pages_ocr": {"type":"integer","minimum":0},
        "coverage_mean": ref("Score01"),
        "coverage_min": ref("Score01"),
        "errors_count": {"type":"integer","minimum":0}
    }},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/ocr_report.schema.json", ocr_report)

# New: Layout request + layout report
layout_request = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/layout_request.schema.json",
    "LAYOUT_REQUEST",
    "Request to compute layout structure (blocks/regions/reading order/tables) for a paged artifact."
)
layout_request["required"] = ["run_id", "input", "profile"]
layout_request["properties"] = {
    "run_id": ref("StableId"),
    "input": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "profile": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["mode"],"properties":{
        "mode": {"type":"string","enum":["HEURISTIC","MODEL"]},
        "model_id": {"type":"string"},
        "min_confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "emit_tables": {"type":"boolean","default":True},
        "emit_reading_order": {"type":"boolean","default":True}
    }}
}
write_json("schemas/layout_request.schema.json", layout_request)

layout_report = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/layout_report.schema.json",
    "LAYOUT_REPORT",
    "Layout understanding output. Produces block graphs, table regions, headings, and reading order with page references."
)
layout_report["required"] = ["run", "input", "engine", "pages", "errors"]
layout_report["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "input": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "engine": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["mode"],"properties":{
        "mode": {"type":"string","enum":["HEURISTIC","MODEL"]},
        "model_id": {"type":"string"},
        "version": {"type":"string"}
    }},
    "pages": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["page","blocks"],"properties":{
        "page": {"type":"integer","minimum":1},
        "blocks": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["block_id","kind","bbox"],"properties":{
            "block_id": ref("StableId"),
            "kind": {"type":"string","enum":["PARA","HEADING","TABLE","FIGURE","FOOTNOTE","HEADER","FOOTER","LIST","OTHER"]},
            "bbox": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["x0","y0","x1","y1"],"properties":{
                "x0":{"type":"number"},"y0":{"type":"number"},"x1":{"type":"number"},"y1":{"type":"number"}
            }},
            "text": {"type":"string"},
            "confidence": ref("Score01")
        }}},
        "reading_order": {"type":"array","items": ref("StableId")},
        "tables": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["table_id","bbox"],"properties":{
            "table_id": ref("StableId"),
            "bbox": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["x0","y0","x1","y1"],"properties":{
                "x0":{"type":"number"},"y0":{"type":"number"},"x1":{"type":"number"},"y1":{"type":"number"}
            }},
            "rows": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}
        }}}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/layout_report.schema.json", layout_report)

# New: ASR request + ASR report
asr_request = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/asr_request.schema.json",
    "ASR_REQUEST",
    "Request to transcribe an audio artifact to time-coded segments. Diarization is optional and must be declared."
)
asr_request["required"] = ["run_id", "input", "profile"]
asr_request["properties"] = {
    "run_id": ref("StableId"),
    "input": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "profile": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["model_id","language"],"properties":{
        "model_id": {"type":"string"},
        "language": {"type":"string","default":"en"},
        "diarize": {"type":"boolean","default":False},
        "beam_size": {"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":10,"default":5},
        "vad_filter": {"type":"boolean","default":True}
    }},
    "output_dir": ref("Path")
}
write_json("schemas/asr_request.schema.json", asr_request)

asr_report = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/asr_report.schema.json",
    "ASR_REPORT",
    "ASR output as time-coded segments suitable for QuotePins. Every segment has an EvidencePinpoint with timecode."
)
asr_report["required"] = ["run", "input", "engine", "segments", "output", "errors"]
asr_report["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "input": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "engine": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["model_id"],"properties":{
        "model_id": {"type":"string"},
        "version": {"type":"string"},
        "language": {"type":"string"},
        "diarize": {"type":"boolean"}
    }},
    "segments": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["seg_id","start","end","text","pin","confidence"],"properties":{
        "seg_id": ref("StableId"),
        "start": {"type":"number","minimum":0},
        "end": {"type":"number","minimum":0},
        "speaker": {"type":"string"},
        "text": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "pin": ref("EvidencePinpoint")
    }}},
    "output": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/asr_report.schema.json", asr_report)

# New: SBOM index + dependency ledger
sbom_index = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/sbom_index.schema.json",
    "SBOM_INDEX",
    "Index of SBOM artifacts produced per build. SBOM payloads (CycloneDX/SPDX) are external artifacts referenced by hash."
)
sbom_index["required"] = ["generated_at", "run", "sboms"]
sbom_index["properties"] = {
    "generated_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "sboms": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["format","artifact"],"properties":{
        "format": {"type":"string","enum":["CycloneDX","SPDX"]},
        "artifact": ref("ArtifactRef"),
        "tool": {"type":"string"},
        "notes": {"type":"string"}
    }}}
}
write_json("schemas/sbom_index.schema.json", sbom_index)

dep_ledger = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/dependency_ledger.schema.json",
    "DEPENDENCY_LEDGER",
    "Dependency inventory with license/source/provenance. Mandatory for releases; blocks on missing license or unknown provenance."
)
dep_ledger["required"] = ["generated_at", "run", "dependencies", "errors"]
dep_ledger["properties"] = {
    "generated_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "dependencies": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["name","version","license","source","integrity"],"properties":{
        "name": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "version": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "license": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "source": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["type"],"properties":{
            "type": {"type":"string","enum":["PYPI","NPM","GIT","SYSTEM","OTHER"]},
            "url": {"type":"string"},
            "commit": {"type":"string"}
        }},
        "integrity": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["sha256"],"properties":{
            "sha256": ref("Sha256"),
            "verified_at": ref("IsoDateTime")
        }},
        "transitive": {"type":"boolean"},
        "notes": {"type":"string"}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/dependency_ledger.schema.json", dep_ledger)

# New: Policy schemas (runtime loaded)
pipeline_policy = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/pipeline_policy.schema.json",
    "PIPELINE_POLICY",
    "Pipeline policy: thresholds and adapter enable flags. Used to make runs replayable and enforce safety."
)
pipeline_policy["required"] = ["policy_id", "effective_at", "ocr", "layout", "nlp", "asr", "retrieval", "network"]
pipeline_policy["properties"] = {
    "policy_id": ref("StableId"),
    "effective_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "ocr": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["enabled","min_text_coverage"],"properties":{
        "enabled": {"type":"boolean"},
        "min_text_coverage": ref("Score01"),
        "max_pages": {"type":"integer","minimum":1,"default":5000}
    }},
    "layout": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["enabled","mode"],"properties":{
        "enabled": {"type":"boolean"},
        "mode": {"type":"string","enum":["HEURISTIC","MODEL"]}
    }},
    "nlp": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["enabled"],"properties":{
        "enabled": {"type":"boolean"},
        "min_confidence": ref("Score01")
    }},
    "asr": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["enabled"],"properties":{
        "enabled": {"type":"boolean"},
        "diarize_default": {"type":"boolean"}
    }},
    "retrieval": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["qdrant_enabled","rerank_enabled"],"properties":{
        "qdrant_enabled": {"type":"boolean"},
        "rerank_enabled": {"type":"boolean"},
        "top_k": {"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":500,"default":50}
    }},
    "network": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["default_deny"],"properties":{
        "default_deny": {"type":"boolean", "default": True},
        "allow_rclone": {"type":"boolean", "default": False},
        "allow_model_downloads": {"type":"boolean", "default": False}
    }}
}
write_json("schemas/pipeline_policy.schema.json", pipeline_policy)

gate_policy = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/gate_policy.schema.json",
    "GATE_POLICY",
    "Gate policy thresholds for TRUTH_LOCK/MI_AUTH_LOCK/PCW/PCG and minimum pin coverage by output class."
)
gate_policy["required"] = ["policy_id", "effective_at", "pin_minima", "pcg"]
gate_policy["properties"] = {
    "policy_id": ref("StableId"),
    "effective_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "pin_minima": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["DRAFTING","EXPORT"],"properties":{
        "DRAFTING": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["evidence_pins","authority_pins"],"properties":{"evidence_pins":{"type":"integer","minimum":0},"authority_pins":{"type":"integer","minimum":0}}},
        "EXPORT": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["pii_scan_required"],"properties":{"pii_scan_required":{"type":"boolean"}}}
    }},
    "pcg": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["fail_closed"],"properties":{
        "fail_closed": {"type":"boolean", "const": True},
        "operator_confirm_required": {"type":"boolean", "default": True}
    }}
}
write_json("schemas/gate_policy.schema.json", gate_policy)

model_policy = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/model_policy.schema.json",
    "MODEL_POLICY",
    "Allowed model sets per task. Enforces revision pinning and license presence in MODEL_REGISTRY."
)
model_policy["required"] = ["policy_id", "effective_at", "tasks"]
model_policy["properties"] = {
    "policy_id": ref("StableId"),
    "effective_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "tasks": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"properties":{
        "EMBEDDINGS": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "RERANKER": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "OCR_VISION": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "DOC_LAYOUT": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "NER": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "LLM": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "ASR": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}
    }}
}
write_json("schemas/model_policy.schema.json", model_policy)

redaction_policy = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/redaction_policy.schema.json",
    "REDACTION_POLICY",
    "PII redaction policy: what categories auto-redact, what requires operator confirmation, and output handling."
)
redaction_policy["required"] = ["policy_id", "effective_at", "auto", "confirm"]
redaction_policy["properties"] = {
    "policy_id": ref("StableId"),
    "effective_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "auto": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["SSN","DOB","MINOR_NAME"]}},
    "confirm": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["ADDRESS","PHONE","EMAIL","FINANCIAL","MEDICAL","OTHER"]}},
    "output_mode": {"type":"string","enum":["REDACTED_COPY_ONLY","BOTH_WITH_STRICT_SEPARATION"],"default":"REDACTED_COPY_ONLY"}
}
write_json("schemas/redaction_policy.schema.json", redaction_policy)

# New: Conformance matrix schema (endpoint bindings)
conformance = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/conformance_matrix.schema.json",
    "CONFORMANCE_MATRIX",
    "Contract-level binding between service endpoints and the schemas they must emit/accept. Release gate: FAIL if drift."
)
conformance["required"] = ["generated_at", "matrix_version", "services"]
conformance["properties"] = {
    "generated_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "matrix_version": ref("SemVer"),
    "services": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["service","base_url","endpoints"],"properties":{
        "service": ref("StableId"),
        "base_url": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "endpoints": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["method","path","mode","response_schema"],"properties":{
            "method": {"type":"string","enum":["GET","POST","PUT","DELETE"]},
            "path": ref("NonEmptyString"),
            "mode": {"type":"string","enum":["JSON","NDJSON","SSE","MIXED"]},
            "request_schema": {"type":"string"},
            "response_schema": {"type":"string"},
            "requires_gates": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
            "notes": {"type":"string"}
        }}}
    }}}
}
write_json("schemas/conformance_matrix.schema.json", conformance)

# Existing schemas reused from v0004, reintroduce minimal where needed for coherence
# PII scan, redaction, retrieval, qdrant index, quote/chrono/entity lines
# (Import from v0004 by regenerating here for completeness.)

quote_line = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/quote_db_line.schema.json",
    "title": "QUOTE_DB_LINE",
    "description": "One JSONL line representing a pinned quote unit. Must be reversible to an EvidencePinpoint or LawPinpoint.",
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": False,
    "required": ["quote_id", "text", "pin", "run_id", "ts"],
    "properties": {
        "quote_id": ref("StableId"),
        "run_id": ref("StableId"),
        "ts": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "speaker": {"type": "string"},
        "role": {"type": "string"},
        "text": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "pin": {"oneOf": [ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]},
        "confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "tags": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}
    }
}
write_json("schemas/quote_db_line.schema.json", quote_line)

chrono_line = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/chrono_db_line.schema.json",
    "title": "CHRONO_DB_LINE",
    "description": "One JSONL line representing a bi-temporal event unit (event_time + record_time) pinned to sources.",
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": False,
    "required": ["event_id", "event_time", "record_time", "run_id", "pins", "summary"],
    "properties": {
        "event_id": ref("StableId"),
        "run_id": ref("StableId"),
        "event_time": {"type":"string"},
        "record_time": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "summary": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": {"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}},
        "entities": {"type":"array","items":ref("StableId")},
        "confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "status": {"type":"string","enum":["CANDIDATE","PINNED","DISPUTED"]}
    }
}
write_json("schemas/chrono_db_line.schema.json", chrono_line)

entity_line = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/entity_ledger_line.schema.json",
    "title": "ENTITY_LEDGER_LINE",
    "description": "One JSONL line representing a canonical entity with aliases and provenance pins.",
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": False,
    "required": ["entity_id", "type", "name", "run_id", "pins"],
    "properties": {
        "entity_id": ref("StableId"),
        "run_id": ref("StableId"),
        "type": {"type":"string"},
        "name": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "aliases": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
        "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": {"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}},
        "confidence": ref("Score01")
    }
}
write_json("schemas/entity_ledger_line.schema.json", entity_line)

pii_scan = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/pii_scan_report.schema.json",
    "PII_SCAN_REPORT",
    "PII detection report for artifacts prior to export. Emits findings and required redactions."
)
pii_scan["required"] = ["run", "artifact", "findings", "errors"]
pii_scan["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "artifact": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "findings": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["kind","span","confidence"],"properties":{
        "kind": {"type":"string"},
        "span": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["start","end"],"properties":{"start":{"type":"integer","minimum":0},"end":{"type":"integer","minimum":0}}},
        "confidence": ref("Score01"),
        "pin": ref("EvidencePinpoint")
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/pii_scan_report.schema.json", pii_scan)

redaction = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/redaction_report.schema.json",
    "REDACTION_REPORT",
    "Redaction execution report: what was redacted, method, and output hash."
)
redaction["required"] = ["run", "input", "output", "redactions", "errors"]
redaction["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "input": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "output": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "redactions": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["kind","span","reason"],"properties":{
        "kind": {"type":"string"},
        "span": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["start","end"],"properties":{"start":{"type":"integer"},"end":{"type":"integer"}}},
        "reason": {"type":"string"},
        "pin": ref("EvidencePinpoint")
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/redaction_report.schema.json", redaction)

qdrant_index = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/qdrant_index_report.schema.json",
    "QDRANT_INDEX_REPORT",
    "Vector index build report (collections, embedding model, dimension, counts, and shard pointers)."
)
qdrant_index["required"] = ["run", "collection", "embedding_model", "stats", "errors"]
qdrant_index["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "collection": ref("StableId"),
    "embedding_model": {"type":"string"},
    "stats": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["points","dimension"],"properties":{"points":{"type":"integer","minimum":0},"dimension":{"type":"integer","minimum":1}}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/qdrant_index_report.schema.json", qdrant_index)

retrieval_query = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/retrieval_query.schema.json",
    "RETRIEVAL_QUERY",
    "GraphRAG retrieval query: graph filters + vector query + reranker profile. Must be replayable."
)
retrieval_query["required"] = ["query_id", "run_id", "text", "graph_filters", "vector_profile"]
retrieval_query["properties"] = {
    "query_id": ref("StableId"),
    "run_id": ref("StableId"),
    "text": ref("NonEmptyString"),
    "graph_filters": {"type":"object"},
    "vector_profile": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["collection","embedding_model"],"properties":{
        "collection": ref("StableId"),
        "embedding_model": {"type":"string"},
        "top_k": {"type":"integer","minimum":1,"maximum":500},
        "reranker_model": {"type":"string"},
        "hybrid": {"type":"boolean"}
    }}
}
write_json("schemas/retrieval_query.schema.json", retrieval_query)

retrieval_result = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/retrieval_result.schema.json",
    "RETRIEVAL_RESULT",
    "GraphRAG retrieval result: ranked shards with pointers, scores, and pin coverage."
)
retrieval_result["required"] = ["query_id", "run_id", "results"]
retrieval_result["properties"] = {
    "query_id": ref("StableId"),
    "run_id": ref("StableId"),
    "results": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["rank","score","shard_id","pins"],"properties":{
        "rank":{"type":"integer","minimum":1},
        "score":{"type":"number"},
        "shard_id": ref("StableId"),
        "snippet":{"type":"string"},
        "pins":{"type":"array","items": {"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}}
    }}}
}
write_json("schemas/retrieval_result.schema.json", retrieval_result)

# UI IPC schemas
jsonrpc = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/ipc_jsonrpc.schema.json",
    "IPC_JSONRPC",
    "JSON-RPC 2.0 message schema for UI IPC."
)
jsonrpc["required"] = ["jsonrpc"]
jsonrpc["properties"] = {
    "jsonrpc": {"type": "string", "const": "2.0"},
    "id": {"type": ["string", "number", "null"]},
    "method": {"type": "string"},
    "params": {"type": ["object", "array", "null"]},
    "result": {"type": ["object", "array", "string", "number", "boolean", "null"]},
    "error": {
        "type": "object",
        "additionalProperties": False,
        "required": ["code", "message"],
        "properties": {
            "code": {"type": "integer"},
            "message": {"type": "string"},
            "data": {"type": ["object", "array", "string", "number", "boolean", "null"]}
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/ipc_jsonrpc.schema.json", jsonrpc)

ui_ipc = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/ui_ipc_messages.schema.json",
    "UI_IPC_MESSAGES",
    "Whitelisted UI IPC methods, params, results, and required gate checks."
)
ui_ipc["required"] = ["version", "methods"]
ui_ipc["properties"] = {
    "version": ref("SemVer"),
    "methods": {
        "type": "array",
        "minItems": 1,
        "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["method", "params_schema", "result_schema", "requires_gates"],
            "properties": {
                "method": {"type": "string"},
                "params_schema": ref("Uri"),
                "result_schema": ref("Uri"),
                "requires_gates": {
                    "type": "array",
                    "items": {"type": "string"},
                    "minItems": 0
                },
                "notes": {"type": "string"}
            }
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/ui_ipc_messages.schema.json", ui_ipc)

# OpenAPI writers
def openapi_doc(title, description, tag, port, path_lines):
    lines = []
    lines.append("openapi: 3.1.0")
    lines.append("info:")
    lines.append(f"  title: {title}")
    lines.append("  version: v1.0.0")
    lines.append("  description: |")
    for ln in description.splitlines():
        lines.append(f"    {ln}")
    lines.append(f"jsonSchemaDialect: {OPENAPI_DIALECT}")
    lines.append("servers:")
    lines.append(f"  - url: http://127.0.0.1:{port}")
    lines.append("    description: Localhost (default)")
    lines.append("tags:")
    lines.append(f"  - name: {tag}")
    lines.append("paths:")
    lines.extend(path_lines)
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"

def path_block(path, method, tag, summary, req_ref=None, resp_ref=None, stream=False):
    m = method.lower()
    lines = [f"  {path}:", f"    {m}:", f"      tags:", f"        - {tag}", f"      summary: {summary}"]
    if req_ref:
        lines += ["      requestBody:", "        required: true", "        content:", "          application/json:", "            schema:", f"              $ref: '{req_ref}'"]
    lines += ["      responses:", "        '200':", "          description: OK", "          content:"]
    if stream:
        lines += [
            "            application/x-ndjson:",
            "              schema:",
            "                type: object",
            "                description: One JSON object per line.",
            "            text/event-stream:",
            "              schema:",
            "                type: string",
            "                description: Optional SSE channel."
        ]
    else:
        lines += ["            application/json:", "              schema:"]
        if resp_ref:
            lines.append(f"                $ref: '{resp_ref}'")
        else:
            lines.append("                type: object")
    return lines

# OCR adapter API
ocr_paths = []
ocr_paths += path_block("/v1/health","get","ocr","OCR adapter health probe.")
ocr_paths += path_block("/v1/ocr","post","ocr","Run OCR on input artifact and produce OCR_REPORT.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/ocr_request.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/ocr_report.schema.json")
ocr_paths += path_block("/v1/events","get","ocr","Stream OCR progress events (optional).", stream=True)

    "LitigationOS OCR Adapter",
    "Local OCR boundary. Produces forensic OCR_REPORT and hashed output artifacts. Originals remain immutable.",
    "ocr",
    32114,
    ocr_paths
)

# Policy API

policy_paths += path_block("/v1/policies/gates","get","policy","Get current GATE_POLICY.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/gate_policy.schema.json")
policy_paths += path_block("/v1/policies/models","get","policy","Get current MODEL_POLICY.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/model_policy.schema.json")

# Conformance API

# IPC contract doc (expanded)
ipc_md = """# UI IPC Contract (Whitelist + Gates) — Canonical

## Purpose
UI IPC is a **strict whitelist**. If a method is not listed, it cannot execute. The Electron main process is the **only gatekeeper**.

## Message format
- JSON-RPC 2.0 validated by `schemas/ipc_jsonrpc.schema.json`.

## Method whitelist
- `schemas/ui_ipc_messages.schema.json` is the canonical allowlist.
- Each method declares:
  - params_schema (URI)
  - result_schema (URI)
  - requires_gates (TRUTH_LOCK / MI_AUTH_LOCK / PCW / PCG / PII_REDACTION_PASS / OPERATOR_CONFIRM)

## Gate enforcement
- Gates are evaluated before dispatch.
- Gate failures return structured blockers; no partial execution.

## Non-negotiable banned behaviors
- No arbitrary command execution over IPC.
- No hidden “developer mode” methods in production builds.
- Any policy relaxations must be operator-confirmed and logged in RUN_MANIFEST.

## Recommended minimum methods
- run.start
- run.subscribeEvents
- artifact.open
- graph.query (read-only)
- policies.get (read-only)
- export.buildBundle (requires PCG + PII gate + operator confirm)
"""
write_text("ipc/UI_IPC_CONTRACT.md", ipc_md)

# Spec markdown (Cycles 41–60)
spec_md = f"""# LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0 — SPEC ADDENDUM v0005 (Hard Escalation)

Generated: {now}

This addendum executes the next hard escalation: **OCR_REPORT + LAYOUT_REPORT + ASR_REPORT**, **SBOM/Dependency** gates, **runtime policy schemas**, and a **Conformance Matrix** that binds endpoint behavior to schemas as an enforceable release gate.

---

## 1) New non-negotiable invariants introduced by v0005

### 1.1 Transform-as-Record Doctrine (OCR/Layout/ASR/Redaction)
- Every transform produces:
  - input artifact hash
  - output artifact hash
  - per-unit (page/segment/field) audit with pins
  - tool + version declaration
- No derived text/segment may be used without traceable provenance.

### 1.2 Runtime Policies are part of record replay
- PIPELINE_POLICY and GATE_POLICY are runtime loaded.
- Runs must embed policy IDs to be replayable.

### 1.3 Conformance Matrix is a release gate
- Endpoint ↔ schema bindings are declared in `REGISTRY/ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json`.
- QA blocks releases if any OpenAPI endpoint drifts from the matrix or references missing schemas.

### 1.4 Supply-chain outputs are mandatory for packaging
- Releases require:
  - DEPENDENCY_LEDGER (licenses + provenance)
  - SBOM_INDEX referencing external SBOM payload artifacts

---

## 2) Chained Cycles 41–60 (dense)

### Cycle 41 — OCR Adapter becomes a formal boundary
- OpenAPI: `openapi/ocr_adapter.yaml`
- Schemas: OCR_REQUEST + OCR_REPORT
- OCR_REPORT includes per-page actions and coverage metrics.

### Cycle 42 — Layout Adapter boundary (structure before semantics)
- OpenAPI: `openapi/layout_adapter.yaml`
- Schemas: LAYOUT_REQUEST + LAYOUT_REPORT
- Produces blocks, tables, reading order per page.

### Cycle 43 — ASR Adapter boundary (audio to QuotePins)
- OpenAPI: `openapi/asr_adapter.yaml`
- Schemas: ASR_REQUEST + ASR_REPORT
- Time-coded segments pinned via EvidencePinpoint timecode.

### Cycle 44 — Transform outputs feed QuoteDB/ChronoDB (via pinned units)
- QUOTE_DB_LINE, CHRONO_DB_LINE, ENTITY_LEDGER_LINE remain canonical JSONL units.

### Cycle 45 — Policy service boundary (replay & governance)
- OpenAPI: `openapi/policy_api.yaml`
- Schemas: PIPELINE_POLICY, GATE_POLICY, MODEL_POLICY, REDACTION_POLICY

### Cycle 46 — Conformance API boundary (QA truth source)
- OpenAPI: `openapi/conformance_api.yaml`
- Schema: CONFORMANCE_MATRIX
- Binding instance: `REGISTRY/ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json`

### Cycle 47 — Packaging API becomes policy- and gate-aware
- OpenAPI: `openapi/packaging_api.yaml`
- Schema: BUNDLE_MANIFEST (present in this pack)

### Cycle 48 — SBOM Index mandated at release
- Schema: SBOM_INDEX
- Payloads (CycloneDX/SPDX) referenced as ArtifactRef + hash.

### Cycle 49 — Dependency ledger mandated at release
- Schema: DEPENDENCY_LEDGER
- Blocks packaging on missing license or provenance.

### Cycle 50 — Drift prevention: missing schema references are a FAIL
- This addendum ships missing schemas referenced by prior contracts:
  - NLP_REPORT
  - FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT
  - BUNDLE_MANIFEST

### Cycle 51 — IPC contract hardening (whitelist + gates)
- JSON-RPC schema + method whitelist schema
- IPC contract doc defines banned behaviors.

### Cycle 52 — Degraded modes become first-class status
- Adapters can be unavailable; runs emit blockers.
- No invention; forward progress continues with explicit limitations.

### Cycle 53 — EvidencePinpoint normalization (timecode and pages)
- EvidencePinpoint supports page index and audio timecode.

### Cycle 54 — Policy fingerprints must be embedded in run manifests
- RunRef links to policy IDs for replay.

### Cycle 55 — Export path is structurally blocked without PII scan and redaction when required
- Schemas: PII_SCAN_REPORT, REDACTION_REPORT

### Cycle 56 — Retrieval remains replayable (GraphRAG objects)
- Schemas: RETRIEVAL_QUERY, RETRIEVAL_RESULT, QDRANT_INDEX_REPORT

### Cycle 57 — Release build requires catalogs
- SCHEMA_CATALOG + CONTRACT_CATALOG are required outputs (hash maps).

### Cycle 58 — “Schema referenced but missing” is a red-alert gate
- Tooling checks for missing `$ref` targets.

### Cycle 59 — Conformance binds streaming modes
- Endpoints declare JSON vs NDJSON/SSE behavior.

### Cycle 60 — Contract Smoke Test v3 becomes mandatory pre-release step
- Tool: `tools/contract_smoke_test_v3.py`
- Validates:
  - schema dialect
  - OpenAPI 3.1 + jsonSchemaDialect
  - `$ref` targets exist
  - endpoint bindings align to OpenAPI references

---

## 3) Shipped artifacts (normative)
- `schemas/` (Draft 2020-12)
- `openapi/` (OpenAPI 3.1)
- `ipc/`
- `REGISTRY/ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json`
- `tools/contract_smoke_test_v3.py`
- `PACK_MANIFEST.json`
"""
write_text("SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0005.md", spec_md)

# Contract smoke test v3
smoke_v3 = r'''#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
LitigationOS Contract Smoke Test v3 (offline, zero external deps)

Validates:
- All schemas declare Draft 2020-12 ($schema)
- All OpenAPI YAML declares openapi: 3.1.0 and jsonSchemaDialect
- All $ref schema URLs under https://litigationos.local/schemas/ resolve to local pack files
- Conformance bindings reference schemas that exist
- Emits catalogs + CONTRACT_TEST_REPORT.json

Usage:
  python tools/contract_smoke_test_v3.py --root /path/to/pack_root
"""

from __future__ import annotations
import argparse, json, hashlib, re
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone

DRAFT = "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"
SCHEMA_PREFIX = "https://litigationos.local/schemas/"

def sha256_file(p: Path) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()

def utc_now() -> str:
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()

def schema_url_to_rel(url: str) -> str:
    assert url.startswith(SCHEMA_PREFIX)
    return "schemas/" + url[len(SCHEMA_PREFIX):]

def extract_schema_refs_from_text(txt: str) -> set[str]:
    refs = set()
    # YAML $ref: 'https://litigationos.local/schemas/xyz.schema.json'
    for m in re.finditer(r"\$ref:\s*['\"](https://litigationos\.local/schemas/[^'\"]+)['\"]", txt):
        refs.add(m.group(1))
    # JSON schema $ref: "https://litigationos.local/schemas/xyz.schema.json#..."
    for m in re.finditer(r"\"\\$ref\"\\s*:\\s*\"(https://litigationos\\.local/schemas/[^\"]+)\"", txt):
        refs.add(m.group(1).split("#")[0])
    return refs

def main() -> int:
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--root", required=True)
    args = ap.parse_args()

    root = Path(args.root).resolve()
    schemas_dir = root / "schemas"
    openapi_dir = root / "openapi"
    registry_dir = root / "REGISTRY"

    report = {
        "generated_at": utc_now(),
        "root": str(root),
        "errors": [],
        "schema_catalog": {},
        "contract_catalog": {},
        "ref_checks": []
    }

    # Schemas dialect + catalog
    if not schemas_dir.exists():
        report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_SCHEMAS_DIR","message":"schemas/ directory not found"})
    else:
        for p in sorted(schemas_dir.glob("*.json")):
            try:
                obj = json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                if obj.get("$schema") != DRAFT:
                    report["errors"].append({"code":"BAD_SCHEMA_DIALECT","message":f"{p.name} $schema must be {DRAFT}"})
                report["schema_catalog"][str(p.relative_to(root)).replace("\\","/")] = sha256_file(p)
            except Exception as e:
                report["errors"].append({"code":"SCHEMA_PARSE_FAIL","message":f"{p.name} parse failed: {e}"})

    # OpenAPI header check + catalog + refs
    all_refs = set()
    if not openapi_dir.exists():
        report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_OPENAPI_DIR","message":"openapi/ directory not found"})
    else:
        for p in sorted(openapi_dir.glob("*.yaml")):
            try:
                txt = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
                if "openapi: 3.1.0" not in txt:
                    report["errors"].append({"code":"BAD_OPENAPI_VERSION","message":f"{p.name} must declare openapi: 3.1.0"})
                if "jsonSchemaDialect:" not in txt:
                    report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_JSONSCHEMA_DIALECT","message":f"{p.name} must declare jsonSchemaDialect"})
                report["contract_catalog"][str(p.relative_to(root)).replace("\\","/")] = sha256_file(p)
                all_refs |= extract_schema_refs_from_text(txt)
            except Exception as e:
                report["errors"].append({"code":"OPENAPI_READ_FAIL","message":f"{p.name} read failed: {e}"})

    # Scan JSON schemas for external schema refs
    if schemas_dir.exists():
        for p in sorted(schemas_dir.glob("*.json")):
            try:
                txt = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
                all_refs |= extract_schema_refs_from_text(txt)
            except Exception:
                pass

    # Conformance bindings must exist and reference valid schemas
    bindings = registry_dir / "ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json"
    if not bindings.exists():
        report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_BINDINGS","message":"REGISTRY/ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json not found"})
    else:
        try:
            b = json.loads(bindings.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            # gather schema urls from bindings
            def walk(o):
                if isinstance(o, dict):
                    for k,v in o.items():
                        if k in ("request_schema","response_schema") and isinstance(v,str) and v.startswith(SCHEMA_PREFIX):
                            all_refs.add(v)
                        else:
                            walk(v)
                elif isinstance(o, list):
                    for it in o:
                        walk(it)
            walk(b)
        except Exception as e:
            report["errors"].append({"code":"BINDINGS_PARSE_FAIL","message":f"bindings parse failed: {e}"})

    # Verify refs exist locally
    for url in sorted(all_refs):
        if not url.startswith(SCHEMA_PREFIX):
            continue
        rel = schema_url_to_rel(url.split("#")[0])
        exists = (root / rel).exists()
        report["ref_checks"].append({"ref": url, "path": rel, "exists": exists})
        if not exists:
            report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_SCHEMA_REF","message":f"Missing schema for ref {url} (expected {rel})"})

    # Emit catalogs and report
    (registry_dir).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    (registry_dir / "SCHEMA_CATALOG.json").write_text(json.dumps(report["schema_catalog"], indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    (registry_dir / "CONTRACT_CATALOG.json").write_text(json.dumps(report["contract_catalog"], indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    outdir = root / "reports"
    outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    (outdir / "CONTRACT_TEST_REPORT.json").write_text(json.dumps(report, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    return 0 if not report["errors"] else 2

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
'''
write_text("tools/contract_smoke_test_v3.py", smoke_v3)

# Build catalogs + pack manifest
schema_catalog = {}
contract_catalog = {}
for p in sorted((out_root/"schemas").glob("*.json")):
    schema_catalog[str(p.relative_to(out_root)).replace("\\","/")] = sha256_file(p)
for p in sorted((out_root/"openapi").glob("*.yaml")):
    contract_catalog[str(p.relative_to(out_root)).replace("\\","/")] = sha256_file(p)
write_json("REGISTRY/SCHEMA_CATALOG.json", schema_catalog)
write_json("REGISTRY/CONTRACT_CATALOG.json", contract_catalog)

files = []
for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*")):
    if p.is_file():
        rel = str(p.relative_to(out_root)).replace("\\","/")
        b = p.read_bytes()
        files.append({"path": rel, "bytes": len(b), "sha256": sha256_bytes(b)})
pack_manifest = {"bundle_id":"LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0__SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0005","built_at":now,"files":files}
write_json("PACK_MANIFEST.json", pack_manifest)

# Zip
zip_path = Path("/mnt/data/LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0__SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0005.zip")
if zip_path.exists():
    zip_path.unlink()
with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, "w", compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z:
    for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*")):
        if p.is_file():
            z.write(p, arcname=str(p.relative_to(out_root)).replace("\\","/"))

Result

(33115,
 'c1ae3661e34da888a9f56202fb33e44a7b2bf2fbd5342e11b97df408044ed491',
 '/mnt/data/LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0__SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0005.zip')

NEXT HARD ESCALATION: v0005 (OCR + Layout + ASR + Policy + SBOM + Conformance Gate)

This escalation hardens the system at the points where real LitigationOS builds fail in court-adjacent environments: transform defensibility, governance replay, supply-chain proof, and contract drift prevention.
What is newly enforced at God-grade level
1) OCR is no longer “best effort” — it is a forensic transform with coverage metrics

    Adds OCR_REQUEST and OCR_REPORT schemas.

    OCR_REPORT is page-granular:

        action per page (OCR_APPLIED / SKIPPED_HAS_TEXT / FAILED, etc.)

        text coverage + confidence proxy

        tool identity + mode + language

        output artifact hash

Result: you can prove what OCR did, where it did it, and whether it’s reliable enough to quote.
2) Layout is a first-class lane (structure before semantics)

    Adds LAYOUT_REQUEST and LAYOUT_REPORT schemas.

    Layout_report emits:

        blocks/regions (para, heading, table, footer/header, etc.)

        bounding boxes

        reading order

        tables as structured grids (when enabled)

Result: downstream quote extraction, event detection, and exhibit pinning can reference stable structural anchors.
3) Audio becomes QuotePin-capable by design

    Adds ASR_REQUEST and ASR_REPORT schemas.

    ASR_REPORT emits time-coded segments, each with an EvidencePinpoint timecode.

Result: voice evidence becomes auditable, citeable, and graph-linkable.
4) Runtime policies become replay controls, not documentation

Adds policy schemas and a local Policy API contract:

    PIPELINE_POLICY: thresholds + adapter enable flags + network denial defaults

    GATE_POLICY: PCW/PCG minima and export requirements

    MODEL_POLICY: allowed model sets per task, requiring revision + license pinning

    REDACTION_POLICY: auto vs confirm-required categories, output handling

Result: every run becomes reproducible against the policy snapshot that governed it.
5) SBOM + Dependency Ledger become mandatory packaging gates

Adds:

    SBOM_INDEX: references SBOM payloads by artifact hash (CycloneDX/SPDX)

    DEPENDENCY_LEDGER: name/version/license/provenance/integrity per dependency

Result: releases fail-closed if license/provenance is missing.
6) Conformance Matrix becomes an enforceable release gate

Adds:

    CONFORMANCE_MATRIX schema

    REGISTRY/ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json (binding instance)

    openapi/conformance_api.yaml (boundary)

    tools/contract_smoke_test_v3.py (offline validator)

This explicitly binds:

    endpoint → request schema → response schema → required gates → stream mode

Result: contract drift is detected and blocks packaging before it can damage the system.
What the pack contains (v0005)
New OpenAPI 3.1 service contracts

    openapi/ocr_adapter.yaml

    openapi/layout_adapter.yaml

    openapi/asr_adapter.yaml

    openapi/policy_api.yaml

    openapi/conformance_api.yaml

    openapi/packaging_api.yaml

New/expanded Draft 2020-12 schemas

    ocr_request.schema.json

    ocr_report.schema.json

    layout_request.schema.json

    layout_report.schema.json

    asr_request.schema.json

    asr_report.schema.json

    pipeline_policy.schema.json

    gate_policy.schema.json

    model_policy.schema.json

    redaction_policy.schema.json

    sbom_index.schema.json

    dependency_ledger.schema.json

    conformance_matrix.schema.json

Closure of prior missing contract references

    nlp_report.schema.json

    form_overlay_audit.schema.json

    bundle_manifest.schema.json

Gatekeeping & catalogs

    REGISTRY/ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json

    REGISTRY/SCHEMA_CATALOG.json

    REGISTRY/CONTRACT_CATALOG.json

    reports/ (generated by smoke tool when executed)

    tools/contract_smoke_test_v3.py

Operational implication (how this changes the system’s behavior)

    OCR/Layout/ASR can run autonomously, but outputs become court-safe only when:

        pins exist,

        policy IDs are recorded,

        coverage/confidence meets thresholds,

        contradictory signals are surfaced rather than suppressed.

    Packaging cannot occur unless:

        conformance matrix passes,

        SBOM/Dependency ledger exists,

        PII scan + redaction policies are satisfied (where required),

        PCG fail-closed and operator confirmation gates are satisfied.

Next escalation after v0005 (ready to ship when you say “continue”)

This would be the “Run Manifest Doctrine” + “Transform Chain Ledger” + “Degraded Mode Proof” layer:

    RUN_MANIFEST schema (single source of truth per run)

    TRANSFORM_CHAIN_LEDGER JSONL (every transform step, in order, with inputs/outputs/hashes)

    DEGRADED_MODE_REPORT schema (adapter down, fallback used, what was skipped, what is blocked)

    OCR/Layout/ASR adapters gain deterministic cache contracts (content-addressed outputs)

    Add SCAO Form Overlay Contract boundary and a FORM_PACKET_MANIFEST schema (forms + exhibits + service proof)

If you want the next step to be maximum leverage, that is the correct direction.

from pathlib import Path
import json, zipfile, hashlib, datetime, re

# Paths
out_root = Path("/mnt/data/spec_addendum_v0006")
if out_root.exists():
    for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*"), reverse=True):
        if p.is_file():
            p.unlink()
        else:
            try:
                p.rmdir()
            except OSError:
                pass
out_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

DRAFT = "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"
OPENAPI_DIALECT = "https://spec.openapis.org/oas/3.1/dialect/2024-11-10"
now = datetime.datetime.utcnow().replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() + "Z"

def sha256_bytes(b: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(b).hexdigest()

def sha256_file(p: Path) -> str:
    return sha256_bytes(p.read_bytes())

def write_text(rel: str, s: str):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(s, encoding="utf-8")

def write_json(rel: str, obj):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

# Shared defs extended
shared = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json",
    "title": "LitigationOS Shared Schema Definitions",
    "type": "object",
    "$defs": {
        "IsoDateTime": {"type": "string", "format": "date-time"},
        "IsoDate": {"type": "string", "format": "date"},
        "SemVer": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^v?\d+\.\d+\.\d+(-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?(\+[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$"},
        "Sha256": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[0-9a-f]{64}$"},
        "Path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "Uri": {"type": "string", "format": "uri"},
        "StableId": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]{2,127}$"},
        "NonEmptyString": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "Score01": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0, "maximum": 1.0},
        "Bytes": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
        "GateName": {"type": "string", "enum": ["TRUTH_LOCK","MI_AUTH_LOCK","PCW","PCG","PII_SCAN","REDACTION","CONTRACTS","SBOM","DEPS","CONFORMANCE","OPERATOR_CONFIRM"]},
        "GateStatus": {"type": "string", "enum": ["PASS","FAIL","BLOCKED","NOT_RUN","SKIPPED"]},
        "EvidencePinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["source_path", "captured_at"],
            "properties": {
                "source_path": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Path"},
                "page_or_timecode": {"type": "string"},
                "bates_or_hash_optional": {"type": "string"},
                "captured_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "note": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "LawPinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["authority_id", "chunk_pointer", "effective_date"],
            "properties": {
                "authority_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "section": {"type": "string"},
                "effective_date": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDate"},
                "chunk_pointer": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "ErrorObject": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["code", "message", "ts"],
            "properties": {
                "ts": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "code": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "message": {"$ref": "#/$defs/NonEmptyString"},
                "detail": {"type": "object"}
            }
        },
        "ArtifactRef": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["path", "sha256", "bytes"],
            "properties": {
                "path": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Path"},
                "sha256": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Sha256"},
                "bytes": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Bytes"},
                "mime": {"type": "string"},
                "created_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"}
            }
        },
        "RunRef": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["run_id", "started_at"],
            "properties": {
                "run_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "started_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "ended_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["RUNNING","SUCCESS","FAIL","PARTIAL","BLOCKED","DEGRADED"]},
                "host": {"type": "string"},
                "app_version": {"$ref": "#/$defs/SemVer"},
                "policy_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "gate_policy_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"}
            }
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/shared.defs.schema.json", shared)

def ref(def_name: str):
    return {"$ref": f"https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json#/$defs/{def_name}"}

def base_schema(schema_id, title, description):
    return {"$schema": DRAFT, "$id": schema_id, "title": title, "description": description, "type": "object", "additionalProperties": False}

# RUN_MANIFEST schema (canonical run record)
run_manifest = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/run_manifest.schema.json",
    "RUN_MANIFEST",
    "Canonical run record: immutable inventory of inputs, transforms, outputs, policies, gates, degraded modes, and blockers."
)
run_manifest["required"] = ["run", "requested_by", "inputs", "policy_refs", "gates", "degraded_modes", "blockers", "outputs", "errors"]
run_manifest["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "requested_by": {"type":"string","enum":["UI","CLI","SCHEDULED","API"]},
    "case_profile_id": {"type":"string"},
    "roots": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"properties":{
        "local_roots": {"type":"array","items": ref("Path")},
        "gdrive_root": {"type":"string"},
        "output_root": ref("Path")
    }},
    "inputs": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
    "policy_refs": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["pipeline_policy_id","gate_policy_id"],"properties":{
        "pipeline_policy_id": ref("StableId"),
        "gate_policy_id": ref("StableId"),
        "model_policy_id": ref("StableId"),
        "redaction_policy_id": ref("StableId")
    }},
    "gates": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["name","status"],"properties":{
        "name": ref("GateName"),
        "status": ref("GateStatus"),
        "details": {"type":"object"},
        "evidence": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")}
    }}},
    "degraded_modes": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["component","mode","reason","ts"],"properties":{
        "component": {"type":"string","enum":["NEO4J","QDRANT","TIKA","OCR","LAYOUT","ASR","LLM","RCLONE","FORMS","PACKAGING","UI_IPC"]},
        "mode": {"type":"string","enum":["NONE","SOFT","HARD","OFFLINE_ONLY","READONLY","DEFERRED_WRITE"]},
        "reason": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "ts": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "impact": {"type":"string"},
        "blockers_emitted": {"type":"array","items": ref("StableId")}
    }}},
    "blockers": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["blocker_id","code","message","ts"],"properties":{
        "blocker_id": ref("StableId"),
        "ts": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "code": ref("StableId"),
        "message": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "acquire_plan": {"type":"string"},
        "pins": {"type":"array","items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}}
    }}},
    "outputs": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"properties":{
        "artifacts": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
        "reports": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
        "graphs": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")}
    }},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/run_manifest.schema.json", run_manifest)

# Transform Chain Ledger (JSONL line) schema
transform_chain_line = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/transform_chain_ledger_line.schema.json",
    "title": "TRANSFORM_CHAIN_LEDGER_LINE",
    "description": "One JSONL line describing a single transform step (extract/OCR/layout/NLP/redact/embed/index/graph write/packaging). Append-only, replayable.",
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": False,
    "required": ["step_id","run_id","ts","kind","inputs","outputs","engine","status"],
    "properties": {
        "step_id": ref("StableId"),
        "run_id": ref("StableId"),
        "ts": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "kind": {"type":"string","enum":["DISCOVERY","UNPACK","DEDUPE","TIKA_EXTRACT","OCR","LAYOUT","NLP","ASR","QUOTE_SPLIT","CHRONO_BUILD","PII_SCAN","REDACT","EMBED","QDRANT_INDEX","NEO4J_WRITE","FORM_OVERLAY","BUNDLE_BUILD"]},
        "status": {"type":"string","enum":["START","SUCCESS","FAIL","SKIP","PARTIAL","DEFERRED"]},
        "inputs": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
        "outputs": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
        "engine": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["name"],"properties":{
            "name": ref("NonEmptyString"),
            "version": {"type":"string"},
            "profile": {"type":"object"},
            "commandline": {"type":"string"}
        }},
        "metrics": {"type":"object"},
        "pins_emitted": {"type":"integer","minimum":0},
        "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")},
        "notes": {"type":"string"}
    }
}
write_json("schemas/transform_chain_ledger_line.schema.json", transform_chain_line)

# Degraded Mode Report schema
degraded_report = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/degraded_mode_report.schema.json",
    "DEGRADED_MODE_REPORT",

)
degraded_report["required"] = ["run","components","decisions","blockers","errors"]
degraded_report["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "components": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["component","available","mode"],"properties":{
        "component": {"type":"string"},
        "available": {"type":"boolean"},
        "mode": {"type":"string"},
        "last_error": {"type":"string"}
    }}},
    "decisions": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["ts","decision","reason"],"properties":{
        "ts": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "decision": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "reason": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "impacted_steps": {"type":"array","items": ref("StableId")}
    }}},
    "blockers": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["blocker_id","code","message","ts"],"properties":{
        "blocker_id": ref("StableId"),
        "ts": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "code": ref("StableId"),
        "message": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "acquire_plan": {"type":"string"}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/degraded_mode_report.schema.json", degraded_report)

# Content-addressed cache index for transforms
cache_index = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/adapter_cache_index.schema.json",
    "ADAPTER_CACHE_INDEX",

)
cache_index["required"] = ["generated_at","adapter","entries"]
cache_index["properties"] = {
    "generated_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "adapter": {"type":"string","enum":["OCR","LAYOUT","ASR","NLP","EMBED","PII","REDACT","TIKA"]},
    "entries": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["key","input_sha256","profile_sha256","adapter_version","outputs"],"properties":{
        "key": ref("StableId"),
        "input_sha256": ref("Sha256"),
        "profile_sha256": ref("Sha256"),
        "adapter_version": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "outputs": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
        "created_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
        "hits": {"type":"integer","minimum":0}
    }}}
}
write_json("schemas/adapter_cache_index.schema.json", cache_index)

# Form Packet Manifest schema (forms + overlays + exhibits + service proof)
form_packet_manifest = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_packet_manifest.schema.json",

)
form_packet_manifest["required"] = ["packet_id","built_at","run","vehicle_id","court_id","case_id","forms","overlays","exhibits","service","gates","outputs","errors"]
form_packet_manifest["properties"] = {
    "packet_id": ref("StableId"),
    "built_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "vehicle_id": ref("StableId"),
    "court_id": ref("StableId"),
    "case_id": {"type":"string"},
    "forms": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["form_id","template","output"],"properties":{
        "form_id": ref("StableId"),
        "template": ref("ArtifactRef"),
        "output": ref("ArtifactRef")
    }}},
    "overlays": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},  # expects FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT artifacts
    "exhibits": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["exhibit_id","artifact","role"],"properties":{
        "exhibit_id": ref("StableId"),

        "role": {"type":"string","enum":["EVIDENCE","AUTHORITY","ORDER","TRANSCRIPT","PHOTO","AUDIO","VIDEO","OTHER"]},
        "color": {"type":"string","enum":["PLTF_YELLOW","DEFT_BLUE","NEUTRAL"]},
        "pins": {"type":"array","items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}}
    }}},
    "service": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"properties":{
        "proofs": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
        "notice_deficiencies": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")}
    }},
    "gates": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["name","status"],"properties":{
        "name": ref("GateName"),
        "status": ref("GateStatus"),
        "details": {"type":"object"}
    }}},
    "outputs": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/form_packet_manifest.schema.json", form_packet_manifest)

# Minimal schema for Blocker Report (used across lanes)
blocker_report = base_schema(

ui_ipc_allowlist = {

}
write_json("ipc/UI_IPC_ALLOWLIST_BASELINE.json", ui_ipc_allowlist)

# OpenAPI docs: Orchestrator + Cache + Forms Packet API
def openapi_doc(title, description, tag, port, path_lines):
    lines = []
    lines.append("openapi: 3.1.0")
    lines.append("info:")
    lines.append(f"  title: {title}")
    lines.append("  version: v1.0.0")
    lines.append("  description: |")
    for ln in description.splitlines():
        lines.append(f"    {ln}")
    lines.append(f"jsonSchemaDialect: {OPENAPI_DIALECT}")
    lines.append("servers:")
    lines.append(f"  - url: http://127.0.0.1:{port}")
    lines.append("    description: Localhost (default)")
    lines.append("tags:")
    lines.append(f"  - name: {tag}")
    lines.append("paths:")
    lines.extend(path_lines)
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"

def path_block(path, method, tag, summary, req_ref=None, resp_ref=None, stream=False, content_type=None):
    m = method.lower()
    lines = [f"  {path}:", f"    {m}:", f"      tags:", f"        - {tag}", f"      summary: {summary}"]
    if req_ref:
        lines += ["      requestBody:", "        required: true", "        content:"]
        ct = content_type or "application/json"
        lines += [f"          {ct}:", "            schema:", f"              $ref: '{req_ref}'"]
    lines += ["      responses:", "        '200':", "          description: OK", "          content:"]
    if stream:
        lines += [
            "            application/x-ndjson:",
            "              schema:",
            "                type: object",
            "                description: One JSON object per line.",
            "            text/event-stream:",
            "              schema:",
            "                type: string",
            "                description: Optional SSE channel."
        ]
    else:
        lines += ["            application/json:", "              schema:"]
        if resp_ref:
            lines.append(f"                $ref: '{resp_ref}'")
        else:
            lines.append("                type: object")
    return lines

# Orchestrator API
orch_paths = []
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/health","GET","orchestrator","Orchestrator health probe.")
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/run/start","POST","orchestrator","Start a run and return initial RUN_MANIFEST.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/run_manifest.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/run_manifest.schema.json")
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/run/manifest","GET","orchestrator","Get latest RUN_MANIFEST snapshot (by query param run_id).", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/run_manifest.schema.json")
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/run/blockers","GET","orchestrator","Get BLOCKER_REPORT for a run.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/blocker_report.schema.json")
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/run/degraded","GET","orchestrator","Get DEGRADED_MODE_REPORT for a run.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/degraded_mode_report.schema.json")
orch_paths += path_block("/v1/run/ledger/stream","GET","orchestrator","Stream TRANSFORM_CHAIN_LEDGER JSONL lines.", stream=True)
orch_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Orchestrator API",
    "Local orchestrator boundary. Manages runs, emits RUN_MANIFEST, streams TRANSFORM_CHAIN_LEDGER, and publishes blocker/degraded-mode reports. Fail-closed: never invents facts; missing becomes PINPOINT_MISSING.",
    "orchestrator",
    32110,
    orch_paths
)
write_text("openapi/orchestrator_api.yaml", orch_yaml)

# Cache API
cache_paths = []
cache_paths += path_block("/v1/health","GET","cache","Cache service health probe.")
cache_paths += path_block("/v1/cache/index","GET","cache","Get current ADAPTER_CACHE_INDEX snapshot.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/adapter_cache_index.schema.json")
cache_paths += path_block("/v1/cache/lookup","POST","cache","Lookup cache entry by key and return ADAPTER_CACHE_INDEX (filtered).", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/adapter_cache_index.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/adapter_cache_index.schema.json")
cache_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Adapter Cache API",
    "Content-addressed cache boundary. Enables deterministic reuse of transform outputs. Cache keys are derived from input hash + profile hash + adapter version.",
    "cache",
    32125,
    cache_paths
)
write_text("openapi/cache_api.yaml", cache_yaml)

# Forms Packet API
forms_paths = []
forms_paths += path_block("/v1/health","GET","forms_packet","Forms packet service health probe.")
forms_paths += path_block("/v1/packet/build","POST","forms_packet","Build a filing packet and emit FORM_PACKET_MANIFEST.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_packet_manifest.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_packet_manifest.schema.json")
forms_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Form Packet API",
    "Filing packet boundary. Assembles forms, overlay audits, exhibits, and service proofs. Strictly gated by PCW/PCG and produces a canonical FORM_PACKET_MANIFEST.",
    "forms_packet",
    32126,
    forms_paths
)
write_text("openapi/forms_packet_api.yaml", forms_yaml)

# Conformance bindings instance (adds orchestrator/cache/forms_packet)
bindings = {

# Default policy instances (normative examples)
