immutable originals store schema + content-addressed CAS index
transform outputs must reference immutable originals by hash and origin pointer
Ontology Enforcement
QUOTE vs FACT vs FINDING vs ORDER vs STATEMENT schemas
contradiction edges require typed claims and pins
Neo4j Contract
schema constraints/indexes expressed as a versioned contract + migration manifest
Form Overlay Compiler Contract
per-form field schemas (MC/FOC) + required pins per field class
overlay artifacts become reproducible builds
CasePack Builder
deterministic multi-case packaging contract with strict exclusions and manifests
ChatGPT said:

Always show details
from pathlib import Path
import json, zipfile, hashlib, datetime, re

out_root = Path("/mnt/data/spec_addendum_v0007")
if out_root.exists():
    for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*"), reverse=True):
        if p.is_file():
            p.unlink()
        else:
            try:
                p.rmdir()
            except OSError:
                pass
out_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

DRAFT = "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"
OPENAPI_DIALECT = "https://spec.openapis.org/oas/3.1/dialect/2024-11-10"
now = datetime.datetime.utcnow().replace(microsecond=0).isoformat() + "Z"

def write_text(rel, s):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(s, encoding="utf-8")

def write_json(rel, obj):
    p = out_root / rel
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

def sha256_bytes(b: bytes) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(b).hexdigest()

def sha256_file(p: Path) -> str:
    return sha256_bytes(p.read_bytes())

# Shared defs (superset for v0007 so the pack is self-validating)
shared = {
    "$schema": DRAFT,
    "$id": "https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json",
    "title": "LitigationOS Shared Schema Definitions",
    "type": "object",
    "$defs": {
        "IsoDateTime": {"type": "string", "format": "date-time"},
        "IsoDate": {"type": "string", "format": "date"},
        "SemVer": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^v?\d+\.\d+\.\d+(-[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?(\+[0-9A-Za-z.-]+)?$"},
        "Sha256": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[0-9a-f]{64}$"},
        "Path": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "Uri": {"type": "string", "format": "uri"},
        "StableId": {"type": "string", "pattern": r"^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9._:-]{2,127}$"},
        "NonEmptyString": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1},
        "Score01": {"type": "number", "minimum": 0.0, "maximum": 1.0},
        "Bytes": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 0},
        "GateName": {"type": "string", "enum": ["TRUTH_LOCK","MI_AUTH_LOCK","PCW","PCG","PII_SCAN","REDACTION","CONTRACTS","SBOM","DEPS","CONFORMANCE","OPERATOR_CONFIRM","RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK","ONTOLOGY","NEO4J_CONTRACT","FORM_OVERLAY","CASEPACK"]},
        "GateStatus": {"type": "string", "enum": ["PASS","FAIL","BLOCKED","NOT_RUN","SKIPPED"]},
        "EvidencePinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["source_path", "captured_at"],
            "properties": {
                "source_path": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Path"},
                "page_or_timecode": {"type": "string"},
                "bates_or_hash_optional": {"type": "string"},
                "captured_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "note": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "LawPinpoint": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["authority_id", "chunk_pointer", "effective_date"],
            "properties": {
                "authority_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "section": {"type": "string"},
                "effective_date": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDate"},
                "chunk_pointer": {"type": "string"}
            }
        },
        "ErrorObject": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["code", "message", "ts"],
            "properties": {
                "ts": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "code": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "message": {"$ref": "#/$defs/NonEmptyString"},
                "detail": {"type": "object"}
            }
        },
        "ArtifactRef": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["path", "sha256", "bytes"],
            "properties": {
                "path": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Path"},
                "sha256": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Sha256"},
                "bytes": {"$ref": "#/$defs/Bytes"},
                "mime": {"type": "string"},
                "created_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"}
            }
        },
        "RunRef": {
            "type": "object",
            "additionalProperties": False,
            "required": ["run_id", "started_at"],
            "properties": {
                "run_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "started_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "ended_at": {"$ref": "#/$defs/IsoDateTime"},
                "status": {"type": "string", "enum": ["RUNNING","SUCCESS","FAIL","PARTIAL","BLOCKED","DEGRADED"]},
                "host": {"type": "string"},
                "app_version": {"$ref": "#/$defs/SemVer"},
                "policy_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"},
                "gate_policy_id": {"$ref": "#/$defs/StableId"}
            }
        }
    }
}
write_json("schemas/shared.defs.schema.json", shared)

def ref(def_name):
    return {"$ref": f"https://litigationos.local/schemas/shared.defs.schema.json#/$defs/{def_name}"}

def base_schema(schema_id, title, description):
    return {"$schema": DRAFT, "$id": schema_id, "title": title, "description": description, "type": "object", "additionalProperties": False}

# ----------------------------
# RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK schemas
# ----------------------------

origin_pointer = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/origin_pointer.schema.json",
    "ORIGIN_POINTER",
    "Origin pointer describing where an immutable original was observed. Used to prove acquisition and avoid invention."
)
origin_pointer["required"] = ["observed_path", "observed_at", "observed_bytes"]
origin_pointer["properties"] = {
    "observed_path": ref("Path"),
    "observed_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "observed_bytes": ref("Bytes"),
    "observed_mtime": {"type":"string"},
    "filesystem_id": {"type":"string"},
    "ingest_method": {"type":"string","enum":["LOCAL_FS","RCLONE","ZIP_EXTRACT","MANUAL_IMPORT","OTHER"]},
    "operator_note": {"type":"string"}
}
write_json("schemas/origin_pointer.schema.json", origin_pointer)

immutable_original_record = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/immutable_original_record.schema.json",
    "IMMUTABLE_ORIGINAL_RECORD",
    "Immutable original record stored in content-addressed storage (CAS). Originals are never modified; transforms reference originals by hash + origin pointer."
)
immutable_original_record["required"] = ["original_id","sha256","bytes","stored_at","cas_path","origin"]
immutable_original_record["properties"] = {
    "original_id": ref("StableId"),
    "sha256": ref("Sha256"),
    "bytes": ref("Bytes"),
    "mime": {"type":"string"},
    "stored_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "cas_path": ref("Path"),
    "origin": {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/origin_pointer.schema.json"},
    "labels": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
    "notes": {"type":"string"}
}
write_json("schemas/immutable_original_record.schema.json", immutable_original_record)

cas_index = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/cas_index.schema.json",
    "CAS_INDEX",
    "Content-addressed store index. Maps sha256->CAS paths and immutable original records. Append-only index; no deletions."
)
cas_index["required"] = ["generated_at","cas_root","records","errors"]
cas_index["properties"] = {
    "generated_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "cas_root": ref("Path"),
    "records": {"type":"array","items":{"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/immutable_original_record.schema.json"}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/cas_index.schema.json", cas_index)

original_ingest_request = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/original_ingest_request.schema.json",
    "ORIGINAL_INGEST_REQUEST",
    "Request to ingest one or more observed artifacts into immutable CAS (RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK). Returns IMMUTABLE_ORIGINAL_RECORD(s)."
)
original_ingest_request["required"] = ["run_id","observed"]
original_ingest_request["properties"] = {
    "run_id": ref("StableId"),
    "observed": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["artifact","origin"],"properties":{
        "artifact": ref("ArtifactRef"),
        "origin": {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/origin_pointer.schema.json"}
    }}},
    "cas_root": ref("Path"),
    "labels": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}
}
write_json("schemas/original_ingest_request.schema.json", original_ingest_request)

derivation_ref = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/derivation_ref.schema.json",
    "DERIVATION_REF",
    "Reference from any derived artifact to one or more immutable originals, plus the transform step ids that produced the derivation."
)
derivation_ref["required"] = ["original_sha256","original_id","origin","transform_step_ids"]
derivation_ref["properties"] = {
    "original_sha256": ref("Sha256"),
    "original_id": ref("StableId"),
    "origin": {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/origin_pointer.schema.json"},
    "transform_step_ids": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("StableId")}
}
write_json("schemas/derivation_ref.schema.json", derivation_ref)

derived_artifact_envelope = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/derived_artifact_envelope.schema.json",
    "DERIVED_ARTIFACT_ENVELOPE",
    "Wrapper for any derived artifact. Enforces RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK: every derived output references immutable originals by hash + origin pointer via DERIVATION_REF."
)
derived_artifact_envelope["required"] = ["artifact","derived_from","run"]
derived_artifact_envelope["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "artifact": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "derived_from": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/derivation_ref.schema.json"}},
    "content_class": {"type":"string","enum":["TEXT_EXTRACT","OCR_TEXT","LAYOUT","ASR","NLP","PII","REDACTION","EMBEDDINGS","GRAPH_EXPORT","FORM_OUTPUT","CASEPACK","BUNDLE"]},
    "notes": {"type":"string"}
}
write_json("schemas/derived_artifact_envelope.schema.json", derived_artifact_envelope)

# ----------------------------
# Ontology Enforcement schemas
# ----------------------------

statement_unit = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/statement_unit.schema.json",
    "STATEMENT_UNIT",
    "Typed statement with pins. This is the parent shape; specialized units must satisfy additional constraints."
)
statement_unit["required"] = ["statement_id","kind","text","pins","status"]
statement_unit["properties"] = {
    "statement_id": ref("StableId"),
    "kind": {"type":"string","enum":["QUOTE","FACT","FINDING","ORDER","STATEMENT"]},
    "text": ref("NonEmptyString"),
    "status": {"type":"string","enum":["CANDIDATE","PINNED","DISPUTED"]},
    "speaker_entity_id": {"type":"string"},
    "about_entity_ids": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},
    "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")] }},
    "confidence": ref("Score01"),
    "metadata": {"type":"object"}
}
write_json("schemas/statement_unit.schema.json", statement_unit)

quote_unit = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/quote_unit.schema.json",
    "QUOTE_UNIT",
    "Exact quote unit. Must be backed by EvidencePinpoint. Text must be verbatim; paraphrase is not allowed in QUOTE."
)
quote_unit["required"] = ["statement_id","kind","text","pins","status"]
quote_unit["properties"] = statement_unit["properties"]
quote_unit["properties"]["kind"] = {"type":"string","const":"QUOTE"}
quote_unit["properties"]["pins"] = {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("EvidencePinpoint")}
write_json("schemas/quote_unit.schema.json", quote_unit)

fact_unit = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/fact_unit.schema.json",
    "FACT_UNIT",
    "Fact assertion unit. Must be supported by EvidencePinpoint(s). LawPinpoint may appear only as governing context, never as the sole support."
)
fact_unit["required"] = ["statement_id","kind","text","pins","status"]
fact_unit["properties"] = statement_unit["properties"]
fact_unit["properties"]["kind"] = {"type":"string","const":"FACT"}
fact_unit["properties"]["pins"] = {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}}
fact_unit["allOf"] = [
    {
        "description":"At least one EvidencePinpoint is required for FACT.",
        "properties": {
            "pins": {
                "contains": ref("EvidencePinpoint")
            }
        }
    }
]
write_json("schemas/fact_unit.schema.json", fact_unit)

finding_unit = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/finding_unit.schema.json",
    "FINDING_UNIT",
    "Court finding unit extracted from an Order/Opinion record. Must include EvidencePinpoint to the issuing record."
)
finding_unit["required"] = ["statement_id","kind","text","pins","status"]
finding_unit["properties"] = statement_unit["properties"]
finding_unit["properties"]["kind"] = {"type":"string","const":"FINDING"}
finding_unit["properties"]["pins"] = {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("EvidencePinpoint")}
finding_unit["properties"]["issuing_order_id"] = ref("StableId")
write_json("schemas/finding_unit.schema.json", finding_unit)

order_unit = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/order_unit.schema.json",
    "ORDER_UNIT",
    "Order unit describing a court order record. Separate from FINDING; this is the issuing instrument metadata + citation pointer."
)
order_unit["required"] = ["statement_id","kind","text","pins","status","order_meta"]
order_unit["properties"] = statement_unit["properties"]
order_unit["properties"]["kind"] = {"type":"string","const":"ORDER"}
order_unit["properties"]["pins"] = {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("EvidencePinpoint")}
order_unit["properties"]["order_meta"] = {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["court_id","issued_date"],"properties":{
    "court_id": ref("StableId"),
    "judge_id": {"type":"string"},
    "issued_date": ref("IsoDate"),
    "docket_ref": {"type":"string"},
    "title": {"type":"string"}
}}
write_json("schemas/order_unit.schema.json", order_unit)

generic_statement_unit = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/generic_statement_unit.schema.json",
    "GENERIC_STATEMENT_UNIT",
    "General statement by a person/entity (party, witness, judge). Not necessarily a FACT or FINDING. Must be pinned."
)
generic_statement_unit["required"] = ["statement_id","kind","text","pins","status"]
generic_statement_unit["properties"] = statement_unit["properties"]
generic_statement_unit["properties"]["kind"] = {"type":"string","const":"STATEMENT"}
generic_statement_unit["properties"]["pins"] = {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}}
write_json("schemas/generic_statement_unit.schema.json", generic_statement_unit)

claim_unit = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/claim_unit.schema.json",
    "CLAIM_UNIT",
    "Typed claim triple with modality and pins. Claims are the unit required for contradictions and support graphs."
)
claim_unit["required"] = ["claim_id","claim_type","subject","predicate","object","modality","pins","source_statement_ids"]
claim_unit["properties"] = {
    "claim_id": ref("StableId"),
    "claim_type": {"type":"string","enum":["EVIDENCE","TESTIMONY","COURT_FINDING","PLEADING_ALLEGATION","AUTHORITY_PROPOSITION","INFERENCE_CANDIDATE"]},
    "subject": ref("NonEmptyString"),
    "predicate": ref("NonEmptyString"),
    "object": ref("NonEmptyString"),
    "modality": {"type":"string","enum":["ASSERTED","DENIED","UNCERTAIN","DISPUTED","ORDERED","HELD"]},
    "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")] }},
    "source_statement_ids": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("StableId")},
    "confidence": ref("Score01"),
    "notes": {"type":"string"}
}
write_json("schemas/claim_unit.schema.json", claim_unit)

contradiction_edge = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/contradiction_edge.schema.json",
    "CONTRADICTION_EDGE",
    "Typed contradiction edge between two CLAIM_UNITs. Contradictions require typed claims and pins; no freeform contradictions allowed."
)
contradiction_edge["required"] = ["edge_id","left_claim_id","right_claim_id","contradiction_type","pins","rationale"]
contradiction_edge["properties"] = {
    "edge_id": ref("StableId"),
    "left_claim_id": ref("StableId"),
    "right_claim_id": ref("StableId"),
    "contradiction_type": {"type":"string","enum":["DIRECT_OPPOSITION","TEMPORAL_IMPOSSIBILITY","IDENTITY_CONFLICT","DOCUMENT_INCONSISTENCY","MUTUAL_EXCLUSION","EVIDENCE_VS_FINDING","AUTHORITY_MISQUOTE","OTHER"]},
    "rationale": ref("NonEmptyString"),
    "pins": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("EvidencePinpoint")},
    "severity": {"type":"string","enum":["LOW","MEDIUM","HIGH","CRITICAL"]},
    "created_at": ref("IsoDateTime")
}
write_json("schemas/contradiction_edge.schema.json", contradiction_edge)

ontology_bundle = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/ontology_bundle.schema.json",
    "ONTOLOGY_BUNDLE",
    "Bundle of typed units (STATEMENT + CLAIM + CONTRADICTION). Used for graph ingest and for report exports."
)
ontology_bundle["required"] = ["run","statements","claims","contradictions","errors"]
ontology_bundle["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "statements": {"type":"array","items":{"oneOf":[
        {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/quote_unit.schema.json"},
        {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/fact_unit.schema.json"},
        {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/finding_unit.schema.json"},
        {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/order_unit.schema.json"},
        {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/generic_statement_unit.schema.json"},
    ]}},
    "claims": {"type":"array","items":{"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/claim_unit.schema.json"}},
    "contradictions": {"type":"array","items":{"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/contradiction_edge.schema.json"}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/ontology_bundle.schema.json", ontology_bundle)

# ----------------------------
# Neo4j Contract schemas + migration manifest
# ----------------------------

neo4j_schema_contract = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/neo4j_schema_contract.schema.json",
    "NEO4J_SCHEMA_CONTRACT",
    "Versioned Neo4j schema contract: labels, relationship types, required properties, and constraints/indexes. Used as a drift gate."
)
neo4j_schema_contract["required"] = ["contract_id","version","generated_at","neo4j_major","node_labels","relationship_types","constraints","indexes","migrations"]
neo4j_schema_contract["properties"] = {
    "contract_id": ref("StableId"),
    "version": ref("SemVer"),
    "generated_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "neo4j_major": {"type":"integer","minimum":4},
    "node_labels": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["label","required_properties"],"properties":{
        "label": ref("StableId"),
        "required_properties": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("StableId")},
        "optional_properties": {"type":"array","items": ref("StableId")}
    }}},
    "relationship_types": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["type","required_properties"],"properties":{
        "type": ref("StableId"),
        "required_properties": {"type":"array","items": ref("StableId")},
        "optional_properties": {"type":"array","items": ref("StableId")},
        "direction_hint": {"type":"string","enum":["OUT","IN","BIDIR"]}
    }}},
    "constraints": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["name","cypher","sha256"],"properties":{
        "name": ref("StableId"),
        "cypher": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "sha256": ref("Sha256")
    }}},
    "indexes": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["name","cypher","sha256"],"properties":{
        "name": ref("StableId"),
        "cypher": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "sha256": ref("Sha256")
    }}},
    "migrations": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["migration_id","description","cypher_file","sha256"],"properties":{
        "migration_id": ref("StableId"),
        "description": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "cypher_file": ref("Path"),
        "sha256": ref("Sha256"),
        "preconditions": {"type":"array","items": ref("NonEmptyString")},
        "postconditions": {"type":"array","items": ref("NonEmptyString")}
    }}}
}
write_json("schemas/neo4j_schema_contract.schema.json", neo4j_schema_contract)

neo4j_migration_manifest = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/neo4j_migration_manifest.schema.json",
    "NEO4J_MIGRATION_MANIFEST",
    "Manifest for Neo4j schema migrations. References cypher migration files and expected digests."
)
neo4j_migration_manifest["required"] = ["contract_id","version","generated_at","migrations","errors"]
neo4j_migration_manifest["properties"] = {
    "contract_id": ref("StableId"),
    "version": ref("SemVer"),
    "generated_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "migrations": neo4j_schema_contract["properties"]["migrations"],
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/neo4j_migration_manifest.schema.json", neo4j_migration_manifest)

# Cypher migrations (init constraints + fulltext)
labels = [
    "Court","Jurisdiction","Judge","Form","Vehicle","Authority","AuthorityChunk","Proposition","ProofObligation","Deadline",
    "Case","Order","Filing","Event","Source","Exhibit","QuotePin","Contradiction","Run","Bundle",
    "Statement","Claim"
]
rel_types = [
    "GOVERNS","REQUIRES","SATISFIED_BY","ISSUED_BY","FILED_IN","SUPPORTS","CONFLICTS_WITH","TRIGGERS","DERIVES_FROM"
]

constraints_lines = []
for lab in labels:
    constraints_lines.append(f"CREATE CONSTRAINT {lab.lower()}_id_unique IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:{lab}) REQUIRE n.id IS UNIQUE;")
constraints_lines.append("CREATE CONSTRAINT artifact_sha_unique IF NOT EXISTS FOR (a:Artifact) REQUIRE a.sha256 IS UNIQUE;")
constraints_lines.append("CREATE CONSTRAINT authority_id_unique IF NOT EXISTS FOR (a:Authority) REQUIRE a.id IS UNIQUE;")
constraints_lines.append("CREATE CONSTRAINT case_id_unique IF NOT EXISTS FOR (c:Case) REQUIRE c.id IS UNIQUE;")
constraints_lines.append("CREATE CONSTRAINT run_id_unique IF NOT EXISTS FOR (r:Run) REQUIRE r.id IS UNIQUE;")

# common property existence constraints (Neo4j has "exists" constraints)
constraints_lines.append("CREATE CONSTRAINT quote_text_exists IF NOT EXISTS FOR (q:QuotePin) REQUIRE q.text IS NOT NULL;")
constraints_lines.append("CREATE CONSTRAINT authoritychunk_text_exists IF NOT EXISTS FOR (c:AuthorityChunk) REQUIRE c.text IS NOT NULL;")
constraints_lines.append("CREATE CONSTRAINT proposition_text_exists IF NOT EXISTS FOR (p:Proposition) REQUIRE p.text IS NOT NULL;")

cypher_0001 = "\n".join([
    "// Migration 0001: base uniqueness + required property constraints",
    "BEGIN",
    *constraints_lines,
    "COMMIT",
    ""
])
write_text("neo4j/migrations/0001_constraints.cypher", cypher_0001)

fulltext_lines = [
    "// Migration 0002: fulltext indexes for search and Bloom-like UX",
    "BEGIN",
    "CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX authoritychunk_fulltext IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:AuthorityChunk) ON EACH [n.text, n.title, n.citation];",
    "CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX quote_fulltext IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:QuotePin) ON EACH [n.text, n.speaker, n.tags];",
    "CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX proposition_fulltext IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:Proposition) ON EACH [n.text, n.tag];",
    "CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX event_fulltext IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:Event) ON EACH [n.summary, n.detail];",
    "CREATE FULLTEXT INDEX order_fulltext IF NOT EXISTS FOR (n:Order) ON EACH [n.title, n.summary];",
    "COMMIT",
    ""
]
write_text("neo4j/migrations/0002_fulltext.cypher", "\n".join(fulltext_lines))

# Build Neo4j contract objects with digests
mig_files = [
    ("MIG_0001_CONSTRAINTS","Base constraints and uniqueness.", "neo4j/migrations/0001_constraints.cypher"),
    ("MIG_0002_FULLTEXT","Fulltext indexes for UX and retrieval.", "neo4j/migrations/0002_fulltext.cypher"),
]
migrations = []
for mid, desc, f in mig_files:
    fp = out_root / f
    migrations.append({
        "migration_id": mid,
        "description": desc,
        "cypher_file": f,
        "sha256": sha256_file(fp),
        "preconditions": ["Neo4j reachable", "Schema user has create constraint/index privilege"],
        "postconditions": ["Constraints exist", "Indexes exist"]
    })

contract_obj = {
    "contract_id": "NEO4J_SCHEMA_CONTRACT_MASTER",
    "version": "v1.0.0",
    "generated_at": now,
    "neo4j_major": 5,
    "node_labels": [{"label": lab, "required_properties": ["id"], "optional_properties": ["name","type","tags","created_at","updated_at"]} for lab in labels],
    "relationship_types": [{"type": rt, "required_properties": ["type"], "optional_properties": ["weight","universe","file","created_at"], "direction_hint":"OUT"} for rt in rel_types],
    "constraints": [{"name": f"constraint::{m['migration_id']}", "cypher": (out_root/m["cypher_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"), "sha256": m["sha256"]} for m in migrations if m["migration_id"]=="MIG_0001_CONSTRAINTS"],
    "indexes": [{"name": f"index::{m['migration_id']}", "cypher": (out_root/m["cypher_file"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"), "sha256": m["sha256"]} for m in migrations if m["migration_id"]=="MIG_0002_FULLTEXT"],
    "migrations": migrations
}
write_json("neo4j/NEO4J_SCHEMA_CONTRACT_v0007.json", contract_obj)
write_json("neo4j/NEO4J_MIGRATION_MANIFEST_v0007.json", {
    "contract_id": contract_obj["contract_id"],
    "version": contract_obj["version"],
    "generated_at": now,
    "migrations": migrations,
    "errors": []
})

# ----------------------------
# Form Overlay Compiler Contract schemas
# ----------------------------

form_field_class = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_field_class.schema.json",
    "FORM_FIELD_CLASS",
    "Defines a field class and its required pin policy. Per-form schemas map fields to classes; compiler enforces class rules."
)
form_field_class["required"] = ["class_id","description","required_pins_min","allow_operator_entry","allowed_pin_types"]
form_field_class["properties"] = {
    "class_id": ref("StableId"),
    "description": ref("NonEmptyString"),
    "required_pins_min": {"type":"integer","minimum":0},
    "allow_operator_entry": {"type":"boolean"},
    "allowed_pin_types": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"string","enum":["EvidencePinpoint","LawPinpoint"]}},
    "pii_sensitivity": {"type":"string","enum":["NONE","LOW","MEDIUM","HIGH"]},
    "redaction_required": {"type":"boolean"},
    "validation": {"type":"object","properties":{
        "regex": {"type":"string"},
        "min_len": {"type":"integer","minimum":0},
        "max_len": {"type":"integer","minimum":0}
    }}
}
write_json("schemas/form_field_class.schema.json", form_field_class)

form_schema = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_schema.schema.json",
    "FORM_SCHEMA",
    "Per-form field map schema. Actual field maps must be sourced from the form PDF and must not be invented. Missing maps are blockers."
)
form_schema["required"] = ["form_id","revision_date","source_template","fields","field_classes","errors"]
form_schema["properties"] = {
    "form_id": ref("StableId"),
    "revision_date": ref("IsoDate"),
    "source_template": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "title": {"type":"string"},
    "publisher": {"type":"string"},
    "field_classes": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_field_class.schema.json"}},
    "fields": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["field_key","class_id","required"],"properties":{
        "field_key": ref("StableId"),
        "label": {"type":"string"},
        "class_id": ref("StableId"),
        "required": {"type":"boolean"},
        "max_chars": {"type":"integer","minimum":1},
        "page": {"type":"integer","minimum":1},
        "bbox": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["x0","y0","x1","y1"],"properties":{
            "x0":{"type":"number"},"y0":{"type":"number"},"x1":{"type":"number"},"y1":{"type":"number"}
        }},
        "acro_field_name": {"type":"string"},
        "notes": {"type":"string"}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/form_schema.schema.json", form_schema)

form_schema_index = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_schema_index.schema.json",
    "FORM_SCHEMA_INDEX",
    "Index of installed per-form schemas. May contain missing_required entries that act as blockers under FORM_OVERLAY gate."
)
form_schema_index["required"] = ["generated_at","schemas","missing_required","errors"]
form_schema_index["properties"] = {
    "generated_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "schemas": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
    "missing_required": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["form_id","reason","acquire_plan"],"properties":{
        "form_id": ref("StableId"),
        "reason": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "acquire_plan": ref("NonEmptyString")
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/form_schema_index.schema.json", form_schema_index)

overlay_compiler_request = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/overlay_compiler_request.schema.json",
    "OVERLAY_COMPILER_REQUEST",
    "Request to compile a form overlay deterministically from a FORM_SCHEMA + input bindings. Produces FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT and output PDF."
)
overlay_compiler_request["required"] = ["run_id","form_id","form_schema_sha256","bindings","output_dir"]
overlay_compiler_request["properties"] = {
    "run_id": ref("StableId"),
    "form_id": ref("StableId"),
    "form_schema_sha256": ref("Sha256"),
    "bindings": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["field_key","value","pins"],"properties":{
        "field_key": ref("StableId"),
        "value": {"type":["string","number","boolean","null"]},
        "pins": {"type":"array","items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")] }},
        "source": {"type":"string","enum":["PINNED","OPERATOR","DERIVED","DEFAULT"]}
    }}},
    "output_dir": ref("Path"),
    "compiler_profile": {"type":"object"}
}
write_json("schemas/overlay_compiler_request.schema.json", overlay_compiler_request)

overlay_build_report = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/overlay_build_report.schema.json",
    "OVERLAY_BUILD_REPORT",
    "Overlay compiler build report. References immutable originals and embeds reproducibility hashes for schema/template/compiler/profile."
)
overlay_build_report["required"] = ["run","form_id","template","form_schema","audit","output","derived_envelope","errors"]
overlay_build_report["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "form_id": ref("StableId"),
    "template": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "form_schema": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "audit": ref("ArtifactRef"),  # FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT artifact
    "output": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "derived_envelope": {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/derived_artifact_envelope.schema.json"},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/overlay_build_report.schema.json", overlay_build_report)

# Re-ship FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT schema (from v0005) so this pack is self-contained
form_overlay_audit = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_overlay_audit.schema.json",
    "FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT",
    "Field-level audit for applying a form overlay: every populated field must trace to pins or be explicitly operator-entered."
)
form_overlay_audit["required"] = ["run", "form_id", "input_artifacts", "field_audit", "output", "errors"]
form_overlay_audit["properties"] = {
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "form_id": ref("StableId"),
    "input_artifacts": {"type":"array","items": ref("ArtifactRef")},
    "field_audit": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["field","value","source"],"properties":{
        "field": ref("NonEmptyString"),
        "value": {"type":["string","number","boolean","null"]},
        "source": {"type":"string","enum":["PINNED","OPERATOR","DERIVED","DEFAULT"]},
        "pins": {"type":"array","items":{"oneOf":[ref("EvidencePinpoint"), ref("LawPinpoint")]}}
    }}},
    "output": ref("ArtifactRef"),
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/form_overlay_audit.schema.json", form_overlay_audit)

# ----------------------------
# CasePack Builder schemas
# ----------------------------

exclusion_policy = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/exclusion_policy.schema.json",
    "EXCLUSION_POLICY",
    "Deterministic exclusions for CasePack/Bundle builds. Prevents weights/media/binaries from entering FULL zips by default."
)
exclusion_policy["required"] = ["policy_id","generated_at","exclude_globs","exclude_classes","max_full_zip_mb"]
exclusion_policy["properties"] = {
    "policy_id": ref("StableId"),
    "generated_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "max_full_zip_mb": {"type":"integer","minimum":1},
    "exclude_classes": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["MODEL_WEIGHTS","RAW_MEDIA","BINARY_TOOLS","NODE_MODULES","PY_CACHE","TEMP","LARGE_ARCHIVES"]}},
    "exclude_globs": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items": ref("NonEmptyString")},
    "include_override_globs": {"type":"array","items": ref("NonEmptyString")}
}
write_json("schemas/exclusion_policy.schema.json", exclusion_policy)

case_profile = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/case_profile.schema.json",
    "CASE_PROFILE",
    "Deterministic case profile describing roots, court ids, and case identifiers used for multi-case builds."
)
case_profile["required"] = ["case_profile_id","case_id","court_id","roots"]
case_profile["properties"] = {
    "case_profile_id": ref("StableId"),
    "case_id": ref("NonEmptyString"),
    "court_id": ref("StableId"),
    "judge_id": {"type":"string"},
    "roots": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["case_root","evidence_root","output_root"],"properties":{
        "case_root": ref("Path"),
        "evidence_root": ref("Path"),
        "output_root": ref("Path")
    }},
    "notes": {"type":"string"}
}
write_json("schemas/case_profile.schema.json", case_profile)

casepack_request = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/casepack_request.schema.json",
    "CASEPACK_REQUEST",
    "Request to build a deterministic CasePack across one or more cases. Enforces strict exclusions and manifest-driven outputs."
)
casepack_request["required"] = ["run_id","case_profiles","exclusion_policy_id","include_kinds","output_dir"]
casepack_request["properties"] = {
    "run_id": ref("StableId"),
    "case_profiles": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/case_profile.schema.json"}},
    "exclusion_policy_id": ref("StableId"),
    "include_kinds": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"string","enum":["RUN_MANIFEST","TRANSFORM_LEDGER","ONTOLOGY","GRAPH_EXPORT","FORMS_PACKET","AUTHORITY_INDEX","TIMELINE","CONTRADICTION_MAP","EVIDENCE_MATRIX","SERVICE_LOG","REPORTS"]}},
    "output_dir": ref("Path"),
    "bundle_kind": {"type":"string","enum":["FULL","PATCH"],"default":"FULL"},
    "notes": {"type":"string"}
}
write_json("schemas/casepack_request.schema.json", casepack_request)

casepack_manifest = base_schema(
    "https://litigationos.local/schemas/casepack_manifest.schema.json",
    "CASEPACK_MANIFEST",
    "Immutable manifest for a CasePack. Lists included cases, artifacts, exclusions applied, gate outcomes, and size budgets."
)
casepack_manifest["required"] = ["casepack_id","built_at","run","cases","exclusions","files","gates","errors"]
casepack_manifest["properties"] = {
    "casepack_id": ref("StableId"),
    "built_at": ref("IsoDateTime"),
    "run": ref("RunRef"),
    "cases": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/case_profile.schema.json"}},
    "exclusions": {"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["policy","applied"],"properties":{
        "policy": {"$ref":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/exclusion_policy.schema.json"},
        "applied": {"type":"array","items": ref("NonEmptyString")}
    }},
    "files": {"type":"array","minItems":1,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["path","sha256","bytes","role"],"properties":{
        "path": ref("Path"),
        "sha256": ref("Sha256"),
        "bytes": ref("Bytes"),
        "role": {"type":"string","enum":["SOURCE","SCHEMA","OPENAPI","REPORT","GRAPH","FORM","EXHIBIT","LEDGER","MANIFEST","OTHER"]}
    }}},
    "gates": {"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":False,"required":["name","status"],"properties":{
        "name": ref("GateName"),
        "status": ref("GateStatus"),
        "details": {"type":"object"}
    }}},
    "errors": {"type":"array","items": ref("ErrorObject")}
}
write_json("schemas/casepack_manifest.schema.json", casepack_manifest)

# ----------------------------
# OpenAPI 3.1 contracts for new boundaries
# ----------------------------

def openapi_doc(title, description, tag, port, path_lines):
    lines = []
    lines.append("openapi: 3.1.0")
    lines.append("info:")
    lines.append(f"  title: {title}")
    lines.append("  version: v1.0.0")
    lines.append("  description: |")
    for ln in description.splitlines():
        lines.append(f"    {ln}")
    lines.append(f"jsonSchemaDialect: {OPENAPI_DIALECT}")
    lines.append("servers:")
    lines.append(f"  - url: http://127.0.0.1:{port}")
    lines.append("    description: Localhost (default)")
    lines.append("tags:")
    lines.append(f"  - name: {tag}")
    lines.append("paths:")
    lines.extend(path_lines)
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"

def path_block(path, method, tag, summary, req_ref=None, resp_ref=None, stream=False):
    m = method.lower()
    lines = [f"  {path}:", f"    {m}:", f"      tags:", f"        - {tag}", f"      summary: {summary}"]
    if req_ref:
        lines += ["      requestBody:", "        required: true", "        content:", "          application/json:", "            schema:", f"              $ref: '{req_ref}'"]
    lines += ["      responses:", "        '200':", "          description: OK", "          content:"]
    if stream:
        lines += [
            "            application/x-ndjson:",
            "              schema:",
            "                type: object",
            "                description: One JSON object per line.",
            "            text/event-stream:",
            "              schema:",
            "                type: string",
            "                description: Optional SSE channel."
        ]
    else:
        lines += ["            application/json:", "              schema:"]
        if resp_ref:
            lines.append(f"                $ref: '{resp_ref}'")
        else:
            lines.append("                type: object")
    return lines

# Record Store (CAS) API
cas_paths = []
cas_paths += path_block("/v1/health","GET","record_store","Record store health probe.")
cas_paths += path_block("/v1/originals/ingest","POST","record_store","Ingest observed artifacts into immutable CAS; returns CAS_INDEX.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/original_ingest_request.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/cas_index.schema.json")
cas_paths += path_block("/v1/cas/index","GET","record_store","Get CAS_INDEX snapshot.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/cas_index.schema.json")
cas_paths += path_block("/v1/blobs/get","POST","record_store","Resolve a sha256 to its cas_path and record metadata.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/immutable_original_record.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/immutable_original_record.schema.json")
cas_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Record Store API (CAS)",
    "Immutable originals boundary. Implements RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK. All derived outputs must reference immutable originals by sha256 + origin pointer via DERIVATION_REF / DERIVED_ARTIFACT_ENVELOPE.",
    "record_store",
    32130,
    cas_paths
)
write_text("openapi/record_store_api.yaml", cas_yaml)

# Ontology API
ont_paths = []
ont_paths += path_block("/v1/health","GET","ontology","Ontology service health probe.")
ont_paths += path_block("/v1/ontology/build","POST","ontology","Build typed ontology bundle (statements/claims/contradictions) from pinned sources.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/derived_artifact_envelope.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/ontology_bundle.schema.json")
ont_paths += path_block("/v1/ontology/validate","POST","ontology","Validate ONTOLOGY_BUNDLE against strict typing rules.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/ontology_bundle.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/ontology_bundle.schema.json")
ont_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Ontology API",
    "Ontology enforcement boundary. Produces QUOTE/FACT/FINDING/ORDER/STATEMENT units and CLAIM_UNITs; contradiction edges require typed claims and evidence pins.",
    "ontology",
    32131,
    ont_paths
)
write_text("openapi/ontology_api.yaml", ont_yaml)

# Neo4j Schema Contract API
neo_paths = []
neo_paths += path_block("/v1/health","GET","neo4j_contract","Neo4j contract service health probe.")
neo_paths += path_block("/v1/contract","GET","neo4j_contract","Get current NEO4J_SCHEMA_CONTRACT.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/neo4j_schema_contract.schema.json")
neo_paths += path_block("/v1/migrations","GET","neo4j_contract","Get NEO4J_MIGRATION_MANIFEST.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/neo4j_migration_manifest.schema.json")
neo_paths += path_block("/v1/migrate/apply","POST","neo4j_contract","Apply migrations (idempotent) and emit a DERIVED_ARTIFACT_ENVELOPE for logs.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/neo4j_migration_manifest.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/derived_artifact_envelope.schema.json")
neo_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Neo4j Contract API",
    "Neo4j schema contract boundary. Provides versioned constraints/indexes and migration manifests; used to gate Graph writes and releases.",
    "neo4j_contract",
    32132,
    neo_paths
)
write_text("openapi/neo4j_contract_api.yaml", neo_yaml)

# Form Overlay Compiler API
overlay_paths = []
overlay_paths += path_block("/v1/health","GET","overlay_compiler","Overlay compiler health probe.")
overlay_paths += path_block("/v1/forms/index","GET","overlay_compiler","Get FORM_SCHEMA_INDEX.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_schema_index.schema.json")
overlay_paths += path_block("/v1/overlay/compile","POST","overlay_compiler","Compile overlay deterministically; returns OVERLAY_BUILD_REPORT.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/overlay_compiler_request.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/overlay_build_report.schema.json")
overlay_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS Form Overlay Compiler API",
    "Form overlay compiler boundary. Enforces per-field class pin requirements and produces FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT + OVERLAY_BUILD_REPORT. Per-form field maps must be sourced; invented fields are forbidden.",
    "overlay_compiler",
    32133,
    overlay_paths
)
write_text("openapi/overlay_compiler_api.yaml", overlay_yaml)

# CasePack Builder API
casepack_paths = []
casepack_paths += path_block("/v1/health","GET","casepack","CasePack service health probe.")
casepack_paths += path_block("/v1/casepack/build","POST","casepack","Build a deterministic multi-case CasePack and emit CASEPACK_MANIFEST.", req_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/casepack_request.schema.json", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/casepack_manifest.schema.json")
casepack_paths += path_block("/v1/exclusions/policy","GET","casepack","Get EXCLUSION_POLICY defaults.", resp_ref="https://litigationos.local/schemas/exclusion_policy.schema.json")
casepack_yaml = openapi_doc(
    "LitigationOS CasePack Builder API",
    "Deterministic multi-case packaging boundary. Strict exclusions by policy; produces CASEPACK_MANIFEST with complete hashes and gate outcomes.",
    "casepack",
    32134,
    casepack_paths
)
write_text("openapi/casepack_api.yaml", casepack_yaml)

# ----------------------------
# Registries + defaults (form schema index missing as blockers)
# ----------------------------

# Default CAS path policy doc
cas_policy_md = """# RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK — Immutable Originals Store (CAS) Policy

## CAS root layout (deterministic)
- {CAS_ROOT}/by_sha256/aa/aabbcc... (first 2 hex as shard)
- {CAS_ROOT}/records/CAS_INDEX.json (append-only index snapshot)
- {CAS_ROOT}/records/CAS_LEDGER.jsonl (optional append-only ingest ledger)

## Invariants
1) Originals are never modified.
2) Any transform output must reference originals by sha256 + ORIGIN_POINTER.
3) Deleting a CAS blob is forbidden; expiration is implemented only by creating a new CAS root and explicitly mapping migrations.

## Origin pointer requirements
At minimum:
- observed_path
- observed_at
- observed_bytes
Optional:
- observed_mtime
- filesystem_id
- ingest_method
- operator_note
"""
write_text("docs/RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK_POLICY.md", cas_policy_md)

# Default EXCLUSION_POLICY
excl_default = {
    "policy_id": "EXCLUSION_POLICY_DEFAULT_v0007",
    "generated_at": now,
    "max_full_zip_mb": 700,
    "exclude_classes": ["MODEL_WEIGHTS","RAW_MEDIA","BINARY_TOOLS","NODE_MODULES","PY_CACHE","TEMP","LARGE_ARCHIVES"],
    "exclude_globs": [
        "**/*.gguf","**/*.bin","**/*.pt","**/*.safetensors","**/*.onnx","**/*.ckpt",
        "**/*.mp4","**/*.mkv","**/*.mov","**/*.wav","**/*.flac","**/*.mp3",
        "**/node_modules/**","**/__pycache__/**","**/*.pyc","**/.pytest_cache/**",
        "**/*.zip","**/*.7z","**/*.rar","**/*.iso","**/*.msi","**/*.exe"
    ],
    "include_override_globs": [
        "schemas/**","openapi/**","docs/**","neo4j/**","REGISTRY/**","tools/**","SPEC_ADDENDUM_*.md"
    ]
}
write_json("defaults/EXCLUSION_POLICY_DEFAULT.json", excl_default)

# Form schema index with blockers (no invented per-form maps)
form_index = {
    "generated_at": now,
    "schemas": [],
    "missing_required": [
        {
            "form_id": "SCAO_MC_FORMS_FIELD_MAPS",
            "reason": "Per-form field maps (MC series) are not included in this pack because field names/coords must be sourced from the official templates; invention is forbidden.",
            "acquire_plan": "Acquire official fillable PDF templates for each targeted MC form, hash into CAS, then run a deterministic 'form_field_mapper' that extracts AcroForm field names and/or coordinate boxes; emit FORM_SCHEMA.json per form and add to FORM_SCHEMA_INDEX."
        },
        {
            "form_id": "SCAO_FOC_FORMS_FIELD_MAPS",
            "reason": "Per-form field maps (FOC series) not included for the same provenance requirement.",
            "acquire_plan": "Acquire official fillable PDF templates for each targeted FOC form, hash into CAS, then generate FORM_SCHEMA per form via extraction. Validate by overlay compile dry-run producing FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT."
        }
    ],
    "errors": []
}
write_json("REGISTRY/FORM_SCHEMA_INDEX.json", form_index)

# Conformance bindings (expands service set for v0007 boundaries)
bindings = {
    "generated_at": now,
    "matrix_version": "v1.0.0",
    "services": [
        {
            "service": "record_store",
            "base_url": "http://127.0.0.1:32130",
            "endpoints": [
                {"method":"POST","path":"/v1/originals/ingest","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/original_ingest_request.schema.json",
                 "response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/cas_index.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":["RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK"],"notes":"ingest originals"},
                {"method":"GET","path":"/v1/cas/index","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"","response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/cas_index.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":[],"notes":"read-only"}
            ]
        },
        {
            "service": "ontology",
            "base_url": "http://127.0.0.1:32131",
            "endpoints": [
                {"method":"POST","path":"/v1/ontology/build","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/derived_artifact_envelope.schema.json",
                 "response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/ontology_bundle.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":["ONTOLOGY","RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK"],"notes":"build ontology"},
                {"method":"POST","path":"/v1/ontology/validate","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/ontology_bundle.schema.json",
                 "response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/ontology_bundle.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":["ONTOLOGY"],"notes":"validate"}
            ]
        },
        {
            "service": "neo4j_contract",
            "base_url": "http://127.0.0.1:32132",
            "endpoints": [
                {"method":"GET","path":"/v1/contract","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"","response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/neo4j_schema_contract.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":["NEO4J_CONTRACT"],"notes":"read-only contract"},
                {"method":"GET","path":"/v1/migrations","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"","response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/neo4j_migration_manifest.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":["NEO4J_CONTRACT"],"notes":"read-only migrations"},
                {"method":"POST","path":"/v1/migrate/apply","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/neo4j_migration_manifest.schema.json",
                 "response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/derived_artifact_envelope.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":["NEO4J_CONTRACT","OPERATOR_CONFIRM"],"notes":"apply migrations"}
            ]
        },
        {
            "service": "overlay_compiler",
            "base_url": "http://127.0.0.1:32133",
            "endpoints": [
                {"method":"GET","path":"/v1/forms/index","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"","response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/form_schema_index.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":[],"notes":"form index"},
                {"method":"POST","path":"/v1/overlay/compile","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/overlay_compiler_request.schema.json",
                 "response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/overlay_build_report.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":["FORM_OVERLAY","RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK","PCW"],"notes":"compile overlay"}
            ]
        },
        {
            "service": "casepack",
            "base_url": "http://127.0.0.1:32134",
            "endpoints": [
                {"method":"POST","path":"/v1/casepack/build","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/casepack_request.schema.json",
                 "response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/casepack_manifest.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":["CASEPACK","RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK","CONFORMANCE"],"notes":"build casepack"},
                {"method":"GET","path":"/v1/exclusions/policy","mode":"JSON",
                 "request_schema":"","response_schema":"https://litigationos.local/schemas/exclusion_policy.schema.json",
                 "requires_gates":[],"notes":"default exclusion policy"}
            ]
        }
    ]
}
write_json("REGISTRY/ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json", bindings)

# ----------------------------
# Contract Smoke Test v5 (validates schemas, $refs, bindings, and Neo4j migration digests)
# ----------------------------

smoke_v5 = r'''#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
LitigationOS Contract Smoke Test v5 (offline, zero external deps)

Validates:
- All schemas use Draft 2020-12 and have $id under https://litigationos.local/schemas/
- Schema filename equals $id basename
- All $ref targets exist locally
- Every endpoint in ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS appears in at least one OpenAPI YAML
- Neo4j migration manifest references existing files and matching sha256 digests
- Emits:
  - REGISTRY/SCHEMA_CATALOG.json
  - REGISTRY/CONTRACT_CATALOG.json
  - reports/CONTRACT_TEST_REPORT.json

Usage:
  python tools/contract_smoke_test_v5.py --root /path/to/pack_root
"""

from __future__ import annotations
import argparse, json, hashlib, re
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone

DRAFT = "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"
SCHEMA_PREFIX = "https://litigationos.local/schemas/"

def sha256_file(p: Path) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()

def utc_now() -> str:
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()

def schema_url_to_rel(url: str) -> str:
    assert url.startswith(SCHEMA_PREFIX)
    return "schemas/" + url[len(SCHEMA_PREFIX):]

def extract_schema_refs(txt: str) -> set[str]:
    refs = set()
    for m in re.finditer(r"\$ref:\s*['\"](https://litigationos\.local/schemas/[^'\"]+)['\"]", txt):
        refs.add(m.group(1).split("#")[0])
    for m in re.finditer(r"\"\\$ref\"\\s*:\\s*\"(https://litigationos\\.local/schemas/[^\"]+)\"", txt):
        refs.add(m.group(1).split("#")[0])
    return refs

def parse_openapi_paths_methods(txt: str) -> set[tuple[str,str]]:
    pairs = set()
    current_path = None
    for line in txt.splitlines():
        if re.match(r"^\s{2}/[^:]+:\s*$", line):
            current_path = line.strip()[:-1]
        m = re.match(r"^\s{4}(get|post|put|delete):\s*$", line)
        if m and current_path:
            pairs.add((m.group(1).upper(), current_path))
    return pairs

def main() -> int:
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--root", required=True)
    args = ap.parse_args()
    root = Path(args.root).resolve()

    schemas_dir = root / "schemas"
    openapi_dir = root / "openapi"
    registry_dir = root / "REGISTRY"
    neo_dir = root / "neo4j"
    reports_dir = root / "reports"
    reports_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    report = {
        "generated_at": utc_now(),
        "root": str(root),
        "errors": [],
        "schema_catalog": {},
        "contract_catalog": {},
        "ref_checks": [],
        "endpoint_checks": [],
        "neo4j_checks": []
    }

    all_refs = set()
    openapi_endpoints = set()

    # Schemas
    if not schemas_dir.exists():
        report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_SCHEMAS_DIR","message":"schemas/ not found"})
    else:
        for p in sorted(schemas_dir.glob("*.json")):
            try:
                obj = json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                if obj.get("$schema") != DRAFT:
                    report["errors"].append({"code":"BAD_SCHEMA_DIALECT","message":f"{p.name} must use {DRAFT}"})
                sid = obj.get("$id","")
                if not sid.startswith(SCHEMA_PREFIX):
                    report["errors"].append({"code":"BAD_SCHEMA_ID","message":f"{p.name} $id must start with {SCHEMA_PREFIX}"})
                else:
                    expected = sid[len(SCHEMA_PREFIX):]
                    if p.name != expected:
                        report["errors"].append({"code":"SCHEMA_FILENAME_MISMATCH","message":f"{p.name} filename must match $id basename {expected}"})
                report["schema_catalog"][str(p.relative_to(root)).replace("\\","/")] = sha256_file(p)
                all_refs |= extract_schema_refs(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            except Exception as e:
                report["errors"].append({"code":"SCHEMA_PARSE_FAIL","message":f"{p.name} parse failed: {e}"})

    # OpenAPI
    if not openapi_dir.exists():
        report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_OPENAPI_DIR","message":"openapi/ not found"})
    else:
        for p in sorted(openapi_dir.glob("*.yaml")):
            try:
                txt = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
                if "openapi: 3.1.0" not in txt:
                    report["errors"].append({"code":"BAD_OPENAPI_VERSION","message":f"{p.name} must declare openapi: 3.1.0"})
                if "jsonSchemaDialect:" not in txt:
                    report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_JSONSCHEMA_DIALECT","message":f"{p.name} missing jsonSchemaDialect"})
                report["contract_catalog"][str(p.relative_to(root)).replace("\\","/")] = sha256_file(p)
                all_refs |= extract_schema_refs(txt)
                openapi_endpoints |= parse_openapi_paths_methods(txt)
            except Exception as e:
                report["errors"].append({"code":"OPENAPI_READ_FAIL","message":f"{p.name} read failed: {e}"})

    # Verify refs exist
    for url in sorted(all_refs):
        if not url.startswith(SCHEMA_PREFIX):
            continue
        rel = schema_url_to_rel(url)
        exists = (root / rel).exists()
        report["ref_checks"].append({"ref": url, "path": rel, "exists": exists})
        if not exists:
            report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_SCHEMA_REF","message":f"Missing schema for ref {url} (expected {rel})"})

    # Endpoint drift check
    bindings_path = registry_dir / "ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json"
    if not bindings_path.exists():
        report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_BINDINGS","message":"REGISTRY/ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json not found"})
    else:
        try:
            b = json.loads(bindings_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            for svc in b.get("services", []):
                for ep in svc.get("endpoints", []):
                    method = ep.get("method","").upper()
                    path = ep.get("path","")
                    present = (method, path) in openapi_endpoints
                    report["endpoint_checks"].append({"service": svc.get("service",""), "method": method, "path": path, "present_in_openapi": present})
                    if not present:
                        report["errors"].append({"code":"ENDPOINT_NOT_IN_OPENAPI","message":f"Endpoint {method} {path} not found in any OpenAPI YAML"})
        except Exception as e:
            report["errors"].append({"code":"BINDINGS_PARSE_FAIL","message":f"bindings parse failed: {e}"})

    # Neo4j migration digest checks
    mig_manifest = neo_dir / "NEO4J_MIGRATION_MANIFEST_v0007.json"
    if mig_manifest.exists():
        try:
            mm = json.loads(mig_manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            for m in mm.get("migrations", []):
                f = root / m.get("cypher_file","")
                exists = f.exists()
                dig_ok = False
                actual = ""
                if exists:
                    actual = sha256_file(f)
                    dig_ok = (actual == m.get("sha256",""))
                report["neo4j_checks"].append({"migration_id": m.get("migration_id",""), "file": str(f.relative_to(root)).replace("\\","/"), "exists": exists, "digest_ok": dig_ok})
                if not exists:
                    report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_NEO4J_MIGRATION_FILE","message":f"Missing migration file {m.get('cypher_file','')}"})
                elif not dig_ok:
                    report["errors"].append({"code":"NEO4J_MIGRATION_DIGEST_MISMATCH","message":f"Digest mismatch for {m.get('cypher_file','')} expected {m.get('sha256','')} got {actual}"})
        except Exception as e:
            report["errors"].append({"code":"NEO4J_MANIFEST_PARSE_FAIL","message":f"neo4j manifest parse failed: {e}"})
    else:
        report["errors"].append({"code":"MISSING_NEO4J_MIGRATION_MANIFEST","message":"neo4j/NEO4J_MIGRATION_MANIFEST_v0007.json not found"})

    # Emit catalogs + report
    registry_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    (registry_dir / "SCHEMA_CATALOG.json").write_text(json.dumps(report["schema_catalog"], indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    (registry_dir / "CONTRACT_CATALOG.json").write_text(json.dumps(report["contract_catalog"], indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    (reports_dir / "CONTRACT_TEST_REPORT.json").write_text(json.dumps(report, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")

    return 0 if not report["errors"] else 2

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
'''
write_text("tools/contract_smoke_test_v5.py", smoke_v5)

# ----------------------------
# SPEC ADDENDUM markdown (dense)
# ----------------------------

spec_md = f"""# LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0 — SPEC ADDENDUM v0007 (Hard Escalation: RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK + Ontology Enforcement + Neo4j Contract + Form Overlay Compiler Contract + CasePack Builder)

Generated: {now}

This addendum implements the next hard escalation block as a **spec-grade contract pack**. It is designed to be enforceable by tooling (contract smoke tests) and to fail-closed under Truth-Lock.

---

## 1) RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK (Immutable Originals + CAS Index)

### 1.1 Core doctrine
- Any file ingested becomes an **immutable original**.
- Originals are stored in a **content-addressed store** keyed by SHA-256.
- Originals are never modified.
- Any transform output (OCR/text/layout/NLP/ASR/graph export/forms/casepack) must reference immutable originals by:
  - `sha256`
  - `original_id`
  - `ORIGIN_POINTER`
  - the transform step ids that produced the output.

### 1.2 Canonical schemas
- `ORIGIN_POINTER`
- `IMMUTABLE_ORIGINAL_RECORD`
- `CAS_INDEX`
- `ORIGINAL_INGEST_REQUEST`
- `DERIVATION_REF`
- `DERIVED_ARTIFACT_ENVELOPE`

### 1.3 Deterministic layout policy
See `docs/RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK_POLICY.md`.

---

## 2) Ontology Enforcement (QUOTE vs FACT vs FINDING vs ORDER vs STATEMENT)

### 2.1 Why this exists
Without strict typing, systems blur:
- verbatim quotes
- paraphrases
- inferred facts
- court findings
- party statements
This causes record contamination and credibility loss. Ontology enforcement prevents that.

### 2.2 Typed units
- QUOTE_UNIT: exact verbatim, EvidencePinpoint required
- FACT_UNIT: factual assertion; requires at least one EvidencePinpoint (law cannot be sole support)
- FINDING_UNIT: extracted court finding; must pin to issuing record (EvidencePinpoint)
- ORDER_UNIT: order instrument metadata; must pin to order record
- GENERIC_STATEMENT_UNIT: statement by a person/entity; pinned

### 2.3 Claims and contradictions
- CLAIM_UNIT is the required unit for contradictions.
- Contradictions are prohibited at the raw statement level.
- `CONTRADICTION_EDGE` must reference:
  - left_claim_id
  - right_claim_id
  - contradiction_type
  - evidence pins justifying the contradiction classification

### 2.4 Bundle for graph ingest
- `ONTOLOGY_BUNDLE` packages typed statements, claims, contradictions.

---

## 3) Neo4j Contract (Constraints/Indexes + Versioned Migration Manifest)

### 3.1 Doctrine
Graph writes are blocked unless:
- the schema contract matches
- migrations are applied
- constraints and indexes exist as declared

### 3.2 Shipped artifacts
- `schemas/neo4j_schema_contract.schema.json`
- `schemas/neo4j_migration_manifest.schema.json`
- `neo4j/NEO4J_SCHEMA_CONTRACT_v0007.json`
- `neo4j/NEO4J_MIGRATION_MANIFEST_v0007.json`
- `neo4j/migrations/0001_constraints.cypher`
- `neo4j/migrations/0002_fulltext.cypher`

### 3.3 Canonical node identity rule
- Every labeled node uses a single canonical property: `id`
- Uniqueness constraints are created for each required label.

---

## 4) Form Overlay Compiler Contract (Per-form maps are required; invention is forbidden)

### 4.1 Doctrine
- Overlay compilation is deterministic.
- Every filled field is either:
  - PINNED (has pins)
  - OPERATOR (explicit operator entry)
  - DERIVED (algorithmic transform with provenance)
  - DEFAULT (declared default)
- Field classes define minimum pins and redaction requirements.

### 4.2 Shipped schemas
- `FORM_FIELD_CLASS`
- `FORM_SCHEMA`
- `FORM_SCHEMA_INDEX`
- `OVERLAY_COMPILER_REQUEST`
- `FORM_OVERLAY_AUDIT`
- `OVERLAY_BUILD_REPORT`

### 4.3 Missing per-form field maps (PINPOINT_MISSING)
This pack does not ship MC/FOC per-form field maps because field names and coordinates must be harvested from official templates.
The blockers and acquisition plan are in:
- `REGISTRY/FORM_SCHEMA_INDEX.json`

---

## 5) CasePack Builder (Deterministic multi-case packaging)

### 5.1 Doctrine
- Multi-case packaging is manifest-driven and deterministic.
- Strict exclusions apply by policy to protect size caps and remove weights/media.
- CasePack emits an immutable CASEPACK_MANIFEST with complete hashes.

### 5.2 Shipped schemas
- `EXCLUSION_POLICY`
- `CASE_PROFILE`
- `CASEPACK_REQUEST`
- `CASEPACK_MANIFEST`

### 5.3 Default exclusions
- `defaults/EXCLUSION_POLICY_DEFAULT.json`

---

## 6) OpenAPI 3.1 Service Contracts (new boundaries)
- `openapi/record_store_api.yaml`
- `openapi/ontology_api.yaml`
- `openapi/neo4j_contract_api.yaml`
- `openapi/overlay_compiler_api.yaml`
- `openapi/casepack_api.yaml`

---

## 7) Release gating and drift control
- `REGISTRY/ENDPOINT_SCHEMA_BINDINGS.json`
- `tools/contract_smoke_test_v5.py` enforces:
  - schema dialect + $id filename matching
  - $ref existence
  - endpoint drift checks
  - Neo4j migration digest checks
- Output report: `reports/CONTRACT_TEST_REPORT.json`

---

## 8) Next escalation (if you say continue)
- RECORD_CHAIN_LOCK runtime implementation adapters:
  - CAS_LEDGER.jsonl writer
  - immutable move-with-verify pipeline
  - hash verification on every read
- Ontology extraction pipeline:
  - Quote splitting with layout anchors
  - Claim extraction with conservative modality
  - Contradiction classifier that only emits edges when both sides are typed CLAIM_UNITs with pins
- Form field mapper tool:
  - AcroForm field extraction and bbox mapping
  - FORM_SCHEMA generator per form, all hashed into CAS
- CasePack builder runtime:
  - deterministic file selection by manifest
  - stable ordering
  - size-budget planning
"""
write_text("SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0007.md", spec_md)

# ----------------------------
# Catalogs + pack manifest + zip
# ----------------------------

schema_catalog = {}
contract_catalog = {}
for p in sorted((out_root/"schemas").glob("*.json")):
    schema_catalog[str(p.relative_to(out_root)).replace("\\","/")] = sha256_file(p)
for p in sorted((out_root/"openapi").glob("*.yaml")):
    contract_catalog[str(p.relative_to(out_root)).replace("\\","/")] = sha256_file(p)
write_json("REGISTRY/SCHEMA_CATALOG.json", schema_catalog)
write_json("REGISTRY/CONTRACT_CATALOG.json", contract_catalog)

files = []
for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*")):
    if p.is_file():
        rel = str(p.relative_to(out_root)).replace("\\","/")
        b = p.read_bytes()
        files.append({"path": rel, "bytes": len(b), "sha256": sha256_bytes(b)})
write_json("PACK_MANIFEST.json", {"bundle_id":"LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0__SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0007","built_at":now,"files":files})

zip_path = Path("/mnt/data/LITIGATIONOS__MASTERv1.0__SPEC_ADDENDUM_v0007.zip")
if zip_path.exists():
    zip_path.unlink()
with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, "w", compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z:
    for p in sorted(out_root.rglob("*")):
        if p.is_file():
            z.write(p, arcname=str(p.relative_to(out_root)).replace("\\","/"))

(zip_path.stat().st_size, sha256_file(zip_path), str(zip_path))
